### Part 021

- D—Don't worry, I'll fix it as quickly as I can. The terminal to disable the trigger mechanism isn't here, so I've got to leave momentarily. Hold on. ｜ 别、别担心，我会尽快处理的。解除触发装置的终端不在这里，我暂时离开一下，稍等。
- Whoa, whoa, whoa, time out, time out! Why's this all suddenly aimed at me? ｜ 停停，怎么突然冲我来了？
- Seems I'm in a bit of a pickle now... ｜ 真是「山重水复」的局面…
- Quickly, bring a dragon of suitable status to the stand! ｜ 快，押来一条有身份的龙！
- Let me adjust my deck first... ｜ 先调整一下卡组…
- About Arama... ｜ 关于兰罗摩…
- View Hint ｜ 查看提示
- Treasure Hoarders ｜ 盗宝团
- #And my name's Paimon. We're also adventurers exploring this place. This little one here is our companion, {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}! ｜ #嗯嗯，然后我是派蒙，我们也是来这里探险的冒险家。还有这个小家伙，{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}，是和我们一起的伙伴！
- Arlecchino has many sources of power.\nThe ancient Balemoon Bloodfire burns within her, the noble blood serving as both curse and blessing — this was her first support.\nThe merciful Tsaritsa pardoned her matricide and granted her a Delusion, proof of royal favor and a badge of honor. That was the third time she obtained a source of power.\nBetween these two, the girl who still called herself "Peruere" received a Vision.\nWhile Clervie yet lived, Peruere had mooted the idea of assassinating "Mother" to her. Perhaps she lacked confidence, or perhaps it was their familial bond that yet shackled her, but Clervie refused.\nClervie's destiny concluded when the cold blade pierced her. But as she slipped away towards death, she was truly happy, for she had finally found her freedom.\nBut for the living Peruere, fate's gears had only begun to turn.\nThe experiment to select a "king" was over, but "Mother"'s ambitions were far from fulfilled.\nPeruere thus decided to undertake the plan that had once been shelved solo.\nFrom that day on, she silently calculated the gap between herself and "Mother." Her martial skills were the fruit of her "Mother"'s tutelage, and the strength flowing through her bloodline was laid bare before "Mother."\nAnd what was a child before adults but a nestling — even one who had emerged as ruler of the roost?\nBut what her life of suffering up till now had not taught her was how to give up.\nThus Peruere constantly honed herself, though her body became riddled with scars from constant battle, though her arms should be burned black from baleful blood-fire she could not completely control.\nThen, on one moonlit night, a Vision came to her without warning or portent.\nThe round Vision lined up perfectly with the moon, and the glimmering gem tinted the latter crimson—\nWas this her wish?\nWas this merely the fruit of hundreds of days and nights of ceaseless thought?\nSuch a question was doomed to remain unanswered, and so she did not obsess over it.\nShe merely concealed the Vision in the place closest to her heart before sending "Mother" a "pleasant little surprise."\nAs a Fatui Harbinger, Arlecchino bows before no god. Yet though it represents the institution of The Seven, she always takes meticulous care of this Vision.\nTo her, this is proof of her defiance of fate, wresting from it command over her future. ｜ 阿蕾奇诺的力量有许多来源。\n古老的厄月血火在她身体中燃烧，高贵的血脉既是诅咒也是天资，这是她最初的助力。\n仁慈的女皇宽恕了她弑母的罪孽，代表着荣誉的邪眼是女皇青睐的证明，那是她第三次获得力量。\n在此之间，她曾获得过一枚神之眼，那时她用的还是「佩露薇利」这个名字。\n克雷薇还活着的时候，佩露薇利就向她提出过刺杀「母亲」的计划。或许是因为缺乏自信，又或许是被亲情束缚，克雷薇并没有答应。\n当身体被冰冷的剑刃刺穿，克雷薇的命运也迎来了终结。至少在迈向死亡的那一刻，她是幸福的，因为她找到了属于自己的自由。\n然而对活下来的佩露薇利来说，命运的齿轮才刚刚开始转动。\n挑选「王」的实验已经结束，「母亲」的野心却远远没有停下。\n佩露薇利决定独自拾起被搁置的计划。\n自那天起，她就默默盘算着自己与「母亲」的差距。她的武艺是「母亲」教授的，血脉中的力量也被「母亲」尽收眼底。\n从孩子们当中脱颖而出的王，对长辈来说依旧只是雏鸟而已。\n但她从未在坎坷的生命中学会放弃。\n佩露薇利不断磨练自己的实力，任由身体在一次次交锋中伤痕累累，任由无法完全掌控的厄月血火将手臂染成漆黑。\n然后，在某个月光明亮的夜晚，一枚神之眼毫无征兆地降临在她的眼前。\n浑圆的神之眼恰好与月亮重叠，晶莹如玉的它将皎洁的明月染成赤色——\n这是她的愿望吗？又或者仅仅是不分昼夜的数百次思索结出的果实呢？\n这个问题注定得不到回答，她也并不执着于问题本身。\n她只是平静地将神之眼藏在距离心脏最近的地方，然后，为「母亲」带去了一份小小的「惊喜」。\n作为愚人众执行官，阿蕾奇诺不向任何神明俯首，但对这枚象征七神体制的神之眼，她却始终认真保管。\n因为这是她反抗命运，掌控一己未来的见证。
- Massive amounts of Hydro energy are coursing through this damp ancient sacrificial altar.\nYou shall earn Weapon Ascension Materials, if — and only if — you can pass the trial. ｜ 这座潮湿的古代祭祀场中，聚积了大量的水元素之力。\n若能通过其中的试炼，或许能获得强化装备的物质。
- Woo! Now how do we turn it on? ｜ 唔哇，然后要怎么让它动起来呢？
- ... ｜ ……
- I'd wager that it's also the one that Childe saw when he was young. ｜ 应该也是「公子」年幼时见过的…
- Go to the painting spot ｜ 前往作画地点
- ...Perhaps you'll even be able to hear the music from atop the hills of Qingce Village. ｜ …也不知道站在轻策庄的山坡上，能不能听到乐声…
- Common Liyue tea. Sometimes, one might compare life to the sweet aftertaste savored upon sipping a cup of tea. ｜ 常见的璃月香茗。有时，所谓人生，或许就如细品一盏茶汤时所感受到的余味回甘。
- Spiral Abyss ｜ 深境螺旋
- Ahaha, we're from The Steambird. I'm Boyi, the editor-in-chief, and this young lady is Shiyun, one of my journalists. ｜ 啊哈哈——我们是蒸汽鸟报社的，在下是主编博易，她叫诗筠，是个记者。
- Just another adventurer passing by. ｜ 一名路过的冒险家。
- Randomly removes 1 Normal or Auspicious <color=#B09057FF>Fortune Stick</color> and awards <color=#B09057FF>{0}</color> Veneficus Points in return. ｜ 选择此签将会随机除去一枚已选择的「平运签」或「祥瑞签」类别的<color=#B09057FF>「灵签」</color>，并以此为代价，获得<color=#B09057FF>{0}</color>点奇术点。
- Hmm... No, it's nothing, really. ｜ 不，没什么事…
- I'm never late... ｜ 我可没迟到…
- Good luck. ｜ 祝你好运。
- Available right away ｜ 初始可用
- I'm sure Amber would be happy to see the Outriders grow as a team. ｜ 那安柏…应该会很高兴侦察骑士的编制增加了吧。
- Why, from those comrades of mine, of course. Apparently, this extremely powerful youkai has been wreaking havoc across rural Inazuma. Whenever it comes across a child who has snuck outside to play, it starts teasing them. ｜ 当然是我的那几位朋友告诉我的啊。据说它妖力高强，一直在稻妻的野外肆虐。只要看见偷偷跑出去玩的小孩，就会过去捉弄他们。
- Bait ｜ 鱼饵
- Hey, don't be like that! At least by talking to me you've ruled out a few more people... ｜ 别那么失望，至少缩小了范围嘛，哈哈。
- It's fine... *cough* There was no way for you to know. Call me Mposo. I tried to go into the volcano once and... well, *cough* I found it to be a dangerous place, alright. ｜ 没事…咳咳，你们不知道也很正常嘛，我叫恩波索，以前就曾经尝试进过火山，所以…咳咳…那可真的是很危险。
- A compilation of stories and legends of various knights-errant in Liyue. Some of them have been told for a long time but are still popular among the people. ｜ 记录了璃月市井传说中诸多侠客的奇书，其中有些故事年代已远，但依旧十分受市井读者欢迎。
- According to the information we've collected, some restaurants in Liyue are suffering from this issue... ｜ 根据我的情报，璃月的部分餐馆也存在这样的缺憾…
- Beacon of the Reed Sea ｜ 苇海信标
- "Focused Impression" Mark Trigger Interval|{param7:F1}s ｜ 「聚焦印象」印记触发间隔|{param7:F1}秒
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility Requirements</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20 and complete the Archon Quest "Song of the Dragon and Freedom" as well as the World Quest "The Shadow Over Petrichor" to unlock "Statue of Marble and Brass." ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20，并完成魔神任务「巨龙与自由之歌」及世界任务「佩特莉可的阴霾」，即可解锁「白石与黄铜的造像」。
- Start by paying a visit to <color=#00E1FFFF>Bolai</color> to fetch the <color=#00E1FFFF>Treasure Maps</color>. Then, find the <color=#00E1FFFF>treasure</color> and <color=#00E1FFFF>take it to him</color>. ｜ 你先去<color=#00E1FFFF>博来</color>那拿<color=#00E1FFFF>藏宝图</color>吧，然后把<color=#00E1FFFF>宝藏</color>直接带回去<color=#00E1FFFF>给他</color>。

- You are...? ｜ 这位是…？
- This was someone else's leave permit. ｜ 是属于其他工作人员的假条。
- They should be somewhere on <color=#00E1FFFF>the two islands in the north</color>... According to our mission progress, they're probably on the <color=#00E1FFFF>northwestern island</color>... ｜ 他们应该在<color=#00E1FFFF>北方的两个岛上</color>吧…按照任务的进度，应该在<color=#00E1FFFF>西北方的那个岛上</color>吧...
- Report back to Tunner ｜ 向特纳回报
- I am going to pay my respects — with or without you. ｜ 我现在就去还愿，你不跟着来也无所谓。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务物品
- A Liyue-style nightstand built from the wood of the Sandbearer tree. Its four legs are wrapped in metal that makes it as sturdy as it is lovely.\nDrawer space here is quite sizable indeed, being enough to even contain a catalyst for self-defense, all the better of the owner of the house to counterattack when roused from sleep. It is said that this design was popularized by a biography of successive Tianquan tenures. ｜ 「却砂木」所制的璃月床头柜，四脚均以金属包边，美观且耐用。\n大型抽屉的空间可观，足以容纳法器用于自卫，以便主人在惊醒之际发起反击。据说这种设计是因历任「天权」的一本传记而走红的。
- What's this...? Some kind of energy flow? ｜ 嗯？这是…力量在流动？
- When <color=#FFD780FF>White Jade Radishes</color> explode, active characters within their AoE will regain HP every 1s based on 0.8% of Yaoyao's Max HP. This effect lasts 5s. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>白玉萝卜</color>炸裂时，处在其影响范围内的当前场上角色将每1秒恢复一次生命值，回复量基于瑶瑶生命值上限的0.8%，持续5秒。
- Kamisato Ayato not only has excellent swordsmanship, but has great skill with a polearm. It's really an honor that I can still serve him as an ordinary doorman. ｜ 神里绫人大人不仅剑术一流，枪术也十分了得，在下能做个普通门客继续为他效命，实属荣幸。
- Activate ｜ 开启
- Go to Chirai Shrine. Her grave should be right beside it... ｜ 去千来神祠吧…她的坟墓就在神祠的旁边呀…
- Not right now. ｜ 暂时不用。
- Domain of Mastery: Biting Frost I ｜ 精通秘境：刺骨之霜 I
- Then I shan't ramble on. I'll get going and find a vet as soon as possible. ｜ 那我就不唠叨了，现在立刻出发，抓紧时间找医生。
- Indeed, and I will remember it. Once the dust settles, I'll ensure that she is rewarded. ｜ 唔，我记住了。等尘埃落定了，她一定会得到应得的报酬。
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- Activates Constellation ｜ 命之座激活
- I was shocked when I heard that you guys defeated Lady Haniyyah. I went to visit Miss Haniyyah and learned about your story... ｜ 听说你们击败海妮耶大人后，我很震惊，斗胆拜访了海妮耶小姐，得知了你们之间的故事…
- However, there are still things that I have yet to do. The research I have on hand has not yet borne fruit, and so I must hurry. ｜ 不过我还有事情没完成。手头的研究课题还没有成果，我得抓紧时间才行。
- So Klee's mother is the friend and rival of Mona's teacher? ｜ 原来可莉的妈妈，就是莫娜师父的「朋友兼劲敌」？
- Skill DMG|{param6:P} DEF ｜ 技能伤害|{param6:P}防御力
- Bystander (B) ｜ (test)路人乙$UNRELEASED
- With appropriate treatment, the disease can be effectively controlled before it progresses to a more serious stage. However, there is, unfortunately, still no true cure for Eleazar. ｜ 如果治疗方法得当，患者的病情发展能够得到有效控制。遗憾的是，魔鳞病至今尚无法治愈。
- Um... No, actually, because one of the guys — the one with oni horns on his head — has always shielded us so far. ｜ 这个…倒是没有，因为有个长着鬼角的人一直在袒护我们。
- #Not to worry, {M#he}{F#she}'s a brilliant flier. You had this pitying look the whole time, so why the uneasy face now? ｜ #没事，{M#他}{F#她}飞得很棒。你刚才一脸同情，现在怎么又是一副不安的表情？
- Game Master ｜ 主持人
- Urgh... Horse stance is pure pain to maintain... C'mon, legs! Hang in there! Three more hours! ｜ 哎呀…扎马真累啊…顶住啊顶住啊！扎多三个钟！
- In the meantime... Hehe, I think I'm gonna treat myself to a few more games of "Eyes on the Feathered Prize"! ｜ 至于我…呵，有那时间，还不如再多玩几把「目随羽视」呢！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Then why don't you duel me, too? I'm the kind of student that learns best in the heat of battle. ｜ 那要来试试吗？我更擅长靠激烈的战斗来学习。
- I feel like the pieces are starting to fall into place... ｜ 感觉我好像已经有思路了…
- Nahida ｜ 纳西妲
- Marvelous. ｜ 精彩至极。
- I didn't think I would meet you here... but this is really bad timing... ｜ 没想到会在这里遇见你们，但…现在的时机可真不巧…
- Elemental Burst: III ｜ 元素爆发·其三
- Now that is a good question... Hilichurls lack the intelligence to craft and operate mechanisms like this, so... Perhaps they are also relics left here by the heroes of old? ｜ 这…是个好问题。以丘丘人的智力，它们是不会制造和处理机关的…所以…或许机关本身也是古代的英雄们留在此地的遗迹吧？
- Tell me about the Fatui. ｜ 关于愚人众。
- Upon searching the area, we found a group of Treasure Hoarders. They tried to flee the moment we were upon them. ｜ 搜查一番，果然发现了盗宝团的人。这帮人见势不好，当即四散而逃。
- Temari Game: Place Ball ｜ 手鞠游戏-放置球
- But just when the knights thought that all hope was lost, a miracle! A mystery traveler showed up out of nowhere and saved the day! ｜ 就在骑士团也束手无策之际，神秘的旅行者拯救了大家！
- Done sorting your manuscript out? ｜ 文稿都整理好了？
- Wait... so you were behind all those mishaps today!? ｜ 难道说，今天现场出的各种问题，就是你捣的鬼！
- Secondary Tanglevine Shaft DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 次级缠藤箭伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Look for the adventurers on Seirai Island ｜ 寻找清籁岛上的冒险家
- Do you ever get the feeling that the Ley Lines have a regular flow, similar to the way that celestial bodies follow fixed orbits? ｜ 你们有没有一种感觉？星辰有其运转的轨迹，地脉也按照它自身的规律流动。
- We've come this far, might as well tell us what testing involves... ｜ 事已至此，先说说测试内容…
- (Lombroso wags his tail happily, as if saying, "I don't understand!") ｜ （郎勃罗梭兴奋地摇着尾巴，好像在说「我不懂耶。」）
- Time to change my strategy... ｜ 我会寻找其他策略…
- Obtain a stage score of {param2} ｜ 本关积分达到{param2}
- Your Majesty, we are most grateful for your— ｜ 这是何等殊荣…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Ally at Low HP: II ｜ 同伴生命值低·其二
- Vinesh ｜ 薇内什
- Haha, I do miss him, but the people of the sea will have to return to the sea one day. ｜ 哈哈，我确实很想念他，但是，大海的子民总有一天要回归大海的。
- Now, lean close in your seats and lend me your ears, for I shall speak now of Rex Lapis. ｜ 惊堂木一拍，承蒙诸位关照，今天咱讲一讲那岩王帝君。
- Whenever a guest walks into the Cat's Tail, they will immediately glance in the direction of the bar.\nBehind it often stands a girl with mildly-twitching cat ears, cocktail shaker in hand, and an unhappy look on her face.\nThis is the mixologist Diona, ascendant star of Mondstadt's wine industry, and the greatest challenger to its traditional powerhouses.\nHowever, she does not make these wonderful cocktails on purpose — indeed, quite the opposite.\nHer mixing methods can seem a little "inscrutable" to an outsider. To herself, Diona tries nothing less than her hardest to ruin that hateful grog.\nBut no matter the drink, it will turn out to be an unimaginably sumptuous brew so long as it passes through her hands.\nThis is a "blessing" she has received, though that blessing is a huge headache for her.\nFor this mixologist proclaims herself to be the "Wine Industry Slayer," and her final objective is the utter destruction of Mondstadt's entire wine industry. ｜ 酒客每次走进「猫尾酒馆」，一定会先把视线投向吧台的方向。\n因为那里经常站着一位猫耳微动的少女，一边晃着摇壶，一边露出一脸不高兴的样子。\n那就是蒙德酒业的超新星，传统势力的最大挑战者，调酒师迪奥娜。\n但调出好喝的酒并非她的本意——不如说，恰恰相反。\n她调酒的配方，在外人看来，似乎是「有些不可思议」。但在迪奥娜自己看来，根本就是「我真的在努力破坏那杯讨厌的液体了」。\n但不论什么品种的酒，只要经迪奥娜之手调制以后，都会变成难以想象的美味佳酿。\n这是一种「受祝福的体质」，而这种体质给迪奥娜造成了很大的困扰。\n因为，对自诩「酒业杀手」的迪奥娜来说，以一己之力摧毁整个蒙德的酒业，才是她的最终目标。
- Resolve Bonus|{param2:F2P} Initial/{param3:F2P} ATK DMG Per Stack ｜ 愿力加成|每层{param2:F2P}/{param3:F2P}攻击力
- He sounds like a great guy! ｜ 听上去是个大好人！
- Uhm, what just happened? ｜ 呜啊，突然发生了什么？
- Great! Awesome! ｜ 太棒了！太棒了！
- Help Needed:\nYou see all sorts of strange things every day when you're observing ocean life. The previous time, I saw someone drowning near the water's surface, and this time, it's a bunch of <color=#3399CC>Eremites</color>.\nSeems like they've taken the <color=#3399CC>Devantaka Mountain</color> for their refuse heap. Could the Corps of Thirty muster up some able hands to settle this? ｜ 求助：\n每天观察海洋生物的时候总能看见些奇奇怪怪的东西，上次是有人在海面附近溺水，这次是一帮<color=#3399CC>镀金旅团</color>。\n看他们的样子像是把<color=#3399CC>降诸魔山</color>当成赃物藏匿点了，希望「三十人团」能尽快调集人手处理。
- "Guard" ｜ 「看守」
- Let's do this. ｜ 开始吧。
- Once you have a light like that, everything will... Everything... ｜ 只要得到了那样的光，一切都会…一切都会…
- Really? I wish I could have seen that for myself. ｜ 是嘛，真想亲眼见一见…
- A trophy taken from the Treasure Hoarders. This box is very small and isn't very heavy, and will not be able to contain the arrogance of certain people. But it should be more than enough to keep a lid on their tricks. ｜ 从盗宝团身上取得的战利品，盒子很小，入手也没有多少重量，绝对盛不下某些人的傲慢之心，但装下此人的心眼应该绰绰有余。
- So, it would seem like this is the end. ｜ 看来时间已经用尽了。
- Traveler, let's go give the perfume to Raef together. I hope he'll like it... ｜ 旅行者，我们一起去把香水送给里夫吧，希望他会喜欢…

- A plant with especially verdant foliage found all over Teyvat.\nLegend says its roots run exceptionally deep, allowing it to draw water from far below the surface and get rid of harmful substances, and also making it a natural reservoir of water. For this reason, adventurers who often mash up the leaves to extract drinking water have given it the name "Green Fountain."\nBranch Master Cyrus, however, cautions the younger generation against simply chewing the leaves, as they are bitter, spicy, and may harm the throat. ｜ 叶片色彩尤为苍翠的植株，在大陆各地寻常可见。\n传说它的根须扎得很深，汲取着地下深处的水分，并将有害的杂质去除，是天然的水库，因此常被远行的冒险家捣碎取水，冒险家们也给了它「青色喷泉」的绰号。\n但冒险家分会长塞琉斯曾告诫后辈，它的叶片又苦又辣，还会伤到咽喉，最好不要直接入口咀嚼。

- In Natlan, trees tend not to be named for their appearance, but according to the ways in which their wood is normally used.\nIn general, curved tree trunks tend to yield wood of a lower durability, making them more suitable for crafting disposable items such as the shafts of throwing spears. ｜ 据说，纳塔习惯根据木材的常规用途，而非形貌来为树木命名。\n一般而言，弯曲的树干往往意味着其产出的木材的韧性可能会稍逊一筹。因此这类树木产出的木材更适合制成那些消耗性的物件，比如投矛的枪杆等…
- Okay! Please follow me! ｜ 好的！请跟我来。
- Timaeus and I are both passionate researchers of alchemy. If it was anything else, Albedo wouldn't have any reason to hide it from us. ｜ 因为我和蒂玛乌斯都是炼金术的狂热研究者，如果是别的东西，阿贝多先生没必要瞒着我们才对。
- I don't quite understand what Xudong meant, really. ｜ 我是不太理解旭东阁下的这句话。
- What!? ｜ 什么？！
- Hopefully this is as far as the situation escalates... If we go on like this, we'll have a diplomatic incident on our hands and no mistake! ｜ 希望这件事能就此结束…再这么下去，非得变成外交问题不可…
- I originally planned to design some novel kimono patterns myself, or use some new dyes to make new cloth and attract customers. ｜ 我本来是想自己设计些新纹样，或者是用些新染料，做出一些新样式的布料和成衣来吸引客人。
- How about you, Darcy's new friends? ｜ 那么，达希的两位新朋友，有兴趣参与吗？
- Didn't I tell you the way!? Surely I did! ｜ 哎哎哎？我、我没说吗？！
- A mantle brooch that has lost its luster. The gold plating that once adorned it was ground away by the wind and the waves long ago. ｜ 色泽暗淡的斗篷别针。原本镀上的金色已经被海风磨去。

Keep your eyes open and learn how her reflections affect your Skill-Balls to alleviate yourself of worry! ｜ 坏坏方块王「优雅危险水仕女」踞身的秘境。这位仕女的作风优雅，但极其危险！稍微不注意，就可能被奇妙的水镜捣鼓得晕头转向。不过仔细观察，搞清了水镜对「术球」的戏法后，也不必害怕或心虚！

- She's a restless one, but whatever the case, we are still friends. I might not be the friendliest person around, but I don't simply forget friendships just like that. ｜ 她是个不安分的家伙，但我们再怎么说也算是朋友。我知道我不讨人喜欢…但我可不能随随便便就把朋友忘了。
- I know where to get some. ｜ 好说，我知道在哪。

- However, if you were to use "dear friend" to address an intimate friend, the recipient would think that you were deliberately trying to estrange them. ｜ 而你如果对真正的挚友只是用「挚友」这个词，对方会觉得你在刻意疏远你们之间的关系。

- The enemy has primarily deployed Flying units. Deploy Ranged units to counter them.\nYou can dispatch Flying units to assault Hydro and Anemo Stronghold Mechanisms, which cannot attack Flying units.\nRanged and Flying units are relatively vulnerable, and its best to use units who can soak up DMG to protect them. ｜ 敌方主要部署「空中」单位，推荐以「远程」单位进行应对。\n我方也可以派出「空中」单位，来进攻无法对空的据点机关·水和据点机关·风。\n「远程」和「空中」单位相对脆弱，最好派遣擅长承受伤害的单位保护它们。

- Corrosion Resistance {0}.\n{1} Max Bokuso Box Energy.\nThe Bokuso Box can disperse greater darkness.\nThe Bokuso Box will mark out nearby Tokoyo Legumes and Aphotium Ore on the minimap.\nUsing the Bokuso Box will also mark out nearby treasure chests and challenges on the minimap.\nAfter the Bokuso Box is used on opponents, their Physical RES and All Elemental RES will be decreased by {2}% for {3}s. ｜ 抗侵蚀强度 {0}。\n睦疏之匣能量上限 {1}。\n睦疏之匣可驱散更强大的黑雾。\n睦疏之匣会在小地图上标记周围的常世之荚和渊海髓矿的位置。\n使用睦疏之匣，会在小地图标记周围的宝箱和挑战的位置。\n使用睦疏之匣对敌人施加影响后， 使其物理抗性和所有元素抗性降低{2}%，持续{3}秒。
- Judging by the wording, it seems to be a notebook that Dunyarzad has left behind. If the writer's hands hadn't turned shaky under the influence of Eleazar, the gracefully-penned writings could appear more elegant. ｜ 看口吻的确是迪娜泽黛留下的笔记本，字迹很优雅，如果不是受魔鳞病的影响而有些难以控制力道，字迹还会更好看一些。

- To preserve our faith and our power... We implanted each of them with a single fragment. ｜ 为了延续信仰和力量…我们马上进行了分别实验。
- Still, I'm only doing some of the simpler reception work. For more details, it'd be best if you asked Kurisu. ｜ 不过我也只能做些简单的接待工作啦。具体的事情还是得找久利须会长咨询。

- I used to always feel that the holidays had nothing to do with me. But now... there seems to be a longing in my heart for the next holiday to come more quickly. ｜ 以前总觉得，任何节日都与我无关，但现在…心中好像有个声音呼唤下个节日早点到来。

- In the end, you, Xilonen, and "Nechca" saved the child whose true name is "Nepecha."\nThe strange noises that plagued the peaks are now still, the one behind the schemes has been brought to justice, and every "name" has returned to its rightful place. Nepecha's future is now in her own hands.\nPerhaps one day, when the mist clears, she may also discover all about her "past"...\nAnd learn the meaning of the name "Nepecha." ｜ 最终，你和希诺宁与「妮赫佳」一起，拯救了那位本名为「妮佩卡」的孩子。\n嵴锋的异响平息了，谋划阴谋的罪人已经伏法，每一枚「名字」也都去往了它们应到的归处。妮佩卡的未来，终将由她自己掌控。\n或许，当迷雾消散的那一天，妮佩卡也能获知自己所有的「过去」。\n以及，得知「妮佩卡」这枚名字的含义。
- I'm her big brother and I should take care of her, but... Mom says we are too poor and she never lets me buy any snacks. ｜ 我是哥哥嘛，应该照顾她，但妈妈说，家里穷，要节约，不让我买零食…
- Oh, hello! May I ask if there is anything I might help you with? ｜ 啊，您好！请问有什么事情是我可以帮您的吗？
- Paimon thinks she's heard of this story somewhere before! It's something like... "Your test began the moment you set foot in this area"! ｜ 我好像在什么地方听说过这类故事，就像是…对你的考察其实从你踏进这片区域的时候就已经开始了！

- A harp model with exquisite craftsmanship, its aqua strings shimmer like the sunlight reflected off rippling waves. It is the same design as the harp model found in the Faded Castle. According to legend, certain epic tales of glorious deeds were sung to the accompaniment of this type of harp. Today, though the protagonists of those stories are long dead, their exalted achievements still dazzle brilliantly, like the instrument's bright strings. ｜ 做工精致的诗琴模型，水色的琴弦波光流动，彷如海面上漾起的层层涟漪，与褪色古堡内的诗琴模型形制相同。在传说中，某些关于功勋与荣耀的伟大史诗，便是用这种诗琴吟诵传唱的。如今，虽然那些故事的主角早已逝去，但他们的荣光依旧耀眼，依旧如琴弦般熠熠生辉。

- Uncle Tian, we'll be heading off now. Remember to get plenty of rest and avoid over-exerting yourself while you're recovering. ｜ 那天叔，我们就先告辞了。这段时间切记不可过于激动，好好休养。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Lavender Melons sure are useful!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Their flesh can be eaten, and their skin can be processed to make dyes.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Paimon sure is useful!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>She can serve as my guide, and she can also give other people ugly nicknames, haha.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Yep! Thank you for your validation!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Wait a minute, is there more? Is Paimon about to get roasted?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon's gonna cover your mouth to stop you from talking! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>堇瓜用处很多呢！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>果肉可以吃，果皮还可以加工成染料。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙用处也很多呢！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>能当我的向导，还会给别人起难听的绰号。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嗯！谢谢你对我的肯定！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>等等，你该不会是准备抖出最后的包袱了吧？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那我要捂住你的嘴，不让你说了！

- Ah, you must be unaware. In the legends of Qiaoying Village, there are strange beasts known as "Xuanwen Beasts." ｜ 这就是你有所不知了，在翘英庄的传说中，有一种名为「玄文兽」的异兽。

My my, I wish you could have heard her operatic version of the Hilitune! ｜ 云堇她在正式场合很优雅，私底下却非常容易亲近哦！上次我跟她打了个赌，输的人要用自己习惯的唱法唱对方填的词。哎呀呀，戏腔版的丘丘谣，你真该听一次！

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nAs summer comes into its own, Fischl receives an important missive and departs with everyone in tow to begin another marvelous sojourn...\nExplore the Golden Apple Archipelago during this event, completing Phantom Realms to collect Iridescent Flotsam that can be exchanged for materials in the Event Shop.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 32 and complete "Autumn Winds, Scarlet Leaves" and "Astrolabos Chapter: Act I" to take part in the "Summertime Odyssey" event. During this time, the Adventure Rank required to accept "Astrolabos Chapter: Act I" will be adjusted to Adventure Rank 32.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Shop</color>\nDuring the event, you can exchange Iridescent Flotsam for precious materials in the Event Shop. When the Event Shop closes, any remaining Iridescent Flotsam in your possession will automatically disappear, and the relevant Event Shop page(s) will also close. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n盛夏时节，菲谢尔意外收到了至关重要的函件，在众人的陪伴下，开启了又一场奇妙的旅程…\n活动期间，探索「金苹果群岛」，完成「幽象谜域」，即可获得「花簇簇的漂流物」，换取活动商店中的物资。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到32，并完成「振袖秋风问红叶」与「映天之章 第一幕」后，即可参与「远海诗夏游纪」活动。活动期间，接取「映天之章 第一幕」所需的冒险等阶也会调整至32级。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动商店】</color>\n在活动持续期间，可以在活动商店中，用「花簇簇的漂流物」兑换珍贵的物资。活动商店结束后，持有的「花簇簇的漂流物」将会自动消失，同时相关活动商店页签将关闭。
- I remember he's one of those Spantamad researchers. But his job is so vastly different from that of those amazing traveling scholars who are always on the road. ｜ 学派的话，我记得他是素论派的，但他的工作跟那些全世界到处跑的厉害游学者不一样啦。

- Oh, that's fine. ｜ 哦，这个没关系。

- To stand in my way is not a sin that one such as you may bear! ｜ …若是执意阻碍，那份罪责，可不是尔等承担得起的！
- A Saurian with powerful hind legs and a fluffy tail, capable of spitting Flamegranate pectin hidden in their cheek pouches out, wrapping around distant objects.\nWhen they're enjoying their free time, the vast majority of juvenile Yumkasaurs are obedient and sweet-natured, making them ideal neighbors and companions for the Scions of the Canopy. Their distinctive greenish hue is well worth close observation... ｜ 拥有强壮的后肢与蓬松的尾部，能够吐出藏在颊袋中的火榴果胶卷住远处物体的龙。\n在闲暇时，大部分幼匿叶龙表现得乖巧可爱， 是「悬木人」们的好朋友与好邻居。它们呈现出独特的青绿色彩，值得仔细观察…

- Jagged rocks that may be found scattered amidst the sands. If you look at them from a specific angle, they may seem similar to a misshapen clay bottle, twisted this way and then at such a perilous angle that one might reasonably fear that it could fall and shatter by itself.\nClay derived from such rocks are especially easy to color, making them a very popular material amongst practitioners of clay masonry. ｜ 散落在沙海之中的嶙峋岩石，从特定角度远看时，就如一只制造失误的陶瓶，歪歪扭扭，有着令人心惊胆战的倾斜角度，仿佛下一秒就会倒下，自行摔个粉碎。\n从这种岩石中获取的陶土品质特殊，只需采用，极易上色，是泥瓦匠们最喜欢的原料之一。
- Uh... ｜ 这…
- Paimon, don't take him too seriously. He's just joking. ｜ 派蒙，老大说的话听听就好，不用往心里去哦。
- Flowers? ｜ 送花？
- "When the cat's away, the mice will play." And so they should — 'cause it's only a matter of time before the cat gets back and gobbles all the mice up. ｜ 俗话说得好，猫咪睡觉老鼠闹，醒来一样全吃掉。
- And... Mizuki? You're back from Inazuma already! ｜ 还有瑞希？你从稻妻过来啦？
- Freminet? FREMINET!! ｜ 菲米尼？菲米尼！
- Or so Paimon might have said, but this trick of yours is getting real old, Miss Masked Maiden. ｜ …我本想这么说，但其实已经习惯了。面具巫女小姐可真没新意。
- Leave Tavern ｜ 离开酒馆
- Go well, go well. ｜ 慢走，慢走。

- Seem to be what, exactly? ｜ 看起来…如何？
- Then what are you doing here? ｜ 那你在这儿做什么呢？

- Time's almost up! Contestants who have yet to collect enough Sacred Fire will need to really push if they want to advance! ｜ 比赛时间快到了！还没集齐圣火的选手，抓紧机会最后一搏！
- If you stay next to a Sunyata Flower for a while, you might just hear its song! ｜ 经常待在「净觉花」身边的话，或许你也能听见它的歌声！
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Are your paintings a hit with the Fontainians? ｜ 枫丹人喜欢你的画吗？
- We'll invite her aboard to play a few matches, and I'll get a taste of playing against a champion. ｜ 把她请来船上，切磋上几局，让我仰望仰望冠军的风采。
- Owner of Sailing Breeze ｜ 「远航之风」店主
- Never mind. It's not like I would know what to say... ｜ 算了，我也不知道该说什么。
- Find out what you can from them now, while they're all in one place. We might not get another chance like this anytime soon. ｜ 如果「檐帽会」的人都离开了，可能就什么都问不出来了。
- #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Do you think that we're too harsh on the hilichurls?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Well... sometimes we really do seem like children who just can't resist kicking the hornet's nest...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> I think we're doing more than just kicking it... ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>对丘丘人，我们是不是做得有点太过分了？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>确实…有的时候，我们就像见到蜂窝一定要捅一下的小孩子一样。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯…只是「捅一下」的程度吗？

- I agree. Although I didn't get to observe the match myself, I did listen along. And from what I could hear, you both performed at a rather high level. ｜ 确实，虽然没能亲眼目睹，但只靠耳朵听也可以听出，刚才的对局具有相当的水准。
- What happened... ｜ 到底发生了什么事…
- Storage devices can provide energy to Transfer and Research Terminals.\nPick up a portable storage device and put it next to a terminal that has stopped functioning to return it to normal operation. ｜ 储能装置可为包括研察终端、迁能终端在内的各类装置供能。\n拾取迁移式储能装置并放置于终止运作的装置旁，该装置将会恢复功能继续运作。
- Once the enemy appears, I will pull them into the Plane of Euthymia immediately... I will not put the people in danger. ｜ 既然如此…敌人若是出现，这一次，我会在第一时间将其拉入「一心净土」…以免波及旁人。
- Well, if you're so smart, what do you think it is? ｜ 那你说这个是什么吧！
- I think I need a moment to calm down. ｜ 让我再冷静一会儿吧。

- Hehe... Where was I... Ah yes, let's not forget the perfume... ｜ 嘿嘿…那么该搭配什么香水好呢…
- (One cannot help but wonder why the Fatui Skirmishers would use this method to start a fire when they could simply drive elements.) ｜ （令人不禁好奇，愚人众先遣队明明能够驱使元素力，为何还要使用这种方式生火。）
- Ho? So this is Pilos Peak? Not much to show for itself now, eh? ｜ 哦？这就是从前的尖帽子峰吗？变得好小呢。
- I'll sell it to you for the fixed price of one million Mora! ｜ 一口价，一百万摩拉！
- ... ｜ ……
- Laugh if you want. I'm... I'm a useless man. ｜ 想笑就笑吧，我…我真是个没用的男人啊。
- Dirge of Coppelia: The protagonist is Coppelia, a lady of the clockwork meka. At the climax of the performance, Coppelia will halt at the center of the dance floor and expose her artificed clockwork component charged with <color=#FFE14BFF>ousia</color>, thereby drastically increasing the efficiency of her exertions and summoning countless whirlwinds of dirge. ｜ 「歌裴莉娅的葬送」：主角为发条机关女郎「歌裴莉娅」。在演出的高潮阶段，歌裴莉娅将停留在舞池的中央，露出能源特征为<color=#FFE14BFF>荒性</color>的奇械发条，极大提升出力效率，召来葬送的无数旋风。
- Thus, we teapot spirits were created to help guard their realms and manage their affairs. ｜ 所以仙人才创造了我们「壶灵」，帮他们镇守洞天，打理诸事。

- "An exceptional ceremony? I'll have to charge an exceptional price." I swear, no other concept exists in that boy's brain... ｜ 「额外的仪式？那是额外的价格。」天知道他有多在乎价格！
- Right? Even Paimon knows that's just not how the world works. ｜ 就是就是。就算是派蒙，也很难相信世界上能有这种好事。

- Don't forget to drop by every day to get another "theme." There will be a total of four such themes for you to figure out. ｜ 两位也别忘了每天揭晓一道的「花题」哦，一共有四道「花题」等着你们作答呢。
- Huh? Wait a second, aren't birthday gifts supposed to be a surprise? ｜ 欸…欸？等一下，等一下，生日礼物不都是要悄悄准备，然后给人一个大大的惊喜吗？
- Ally at Low HP: II ｜ 同伴生命值低·其二
- That is such a sloppy plan. ｜ 这计划真够潦草的。
- I mean, it looked like she was in a good mood. She even stopped to say hello. And no... I didn't see anyone else. ｜ 没有…我见到的时候她就一个人，还和我打招呼呢。精神不错。
- It reads like a fairytale... ｜ 完全是一本寓言。
- Across the Wilderness ｜ 跨野寻踪
- Husk of Opulent Dreams ｜ 华馆梦醒形骸记
- Really? But she sounded like such a gentle person... ｜ 真的吗？我还以为她是个很温柔的人呢。
- And yet, he wanted to keep this secret formula, so he hid it. Greedy guy, that Takayuki... he must have wanted to have it on hand just in case he needed to employ it again in the future, and make someone else disappear... ｜ 但他还是隐瞒并保留了这个秘密配方，太贪心了，大概是想在未来有需要时，故技重施，秘密谋害什么人…
- I sense the time and effort that you have put into this place, which reminds me of the time and effort I myself spent when constructing the Jade Chamber. ｜ 我感受到的，是你在此投入的心意，这让我想起自己当初建造群玉阁时的样子。
- We of the Shogunate serve the Almighty Shogun, while Sangonomiya worships the already-slain god, Orobaxi. Such a huge gulf in our beliefs will not be bridged by a little ceasefire agreement. ｜ 幕府信奉雷电将军大人，而珊瑚宫供奉的却是已被斩杀的魔神奥罗巴斯。这样巨大的差异，是不可能被一份小小的休战协议抚平的。
- From an aesthetic point of view, this place looks better without them. ｜ 美观起见，这里拆掉柱子顺眼多了。

- A withered flower worn on the shirt. Its former owner insisted on wearing it even in exile, so it must mean something. ｜ 带在身上的黯淡的花。是流放之身也要带着，一定有重要的意义吧。
- For 3s after using an Elemental Burst or creating a shield, the equipping character can gain the Primordial Jade Regalia effect: Restore <color=#99FFFFFF>5</color> Energy every 2.5s, and gain <color=#99FFFFFF>0.5%</color> Elemental DMG Bonus for their corresponding Elemental Type for every 1,000 Max HP they possess, up to <color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>. Primordial Jade Regalia will still take effect even if the equipping character is not on the field. ｜ 施放元素爆发或创造护盾后的3秒内，将产生「定土玉圭」效果：每2.5秒恢复<color=#99FFFFFF>5</color>点元素能量，并基于装备者的生命值上限，每1000点使其对应元素类型的元素伤害加成提高<color=#99FFFFFF>0.5%</color>，至多提高<color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>。装备该武器的角色处于队伍后台时，依然能产生「定土玉圭」效果。
- Hmm, since it was swallowed up by a slime, maybe we can use Elemental Bait to lure all the nearby slimes to us. ｜ 嗯…既然是被史莱姆吞了，那可以用「元素诱饵」把附近的史莱姆全都引过来吧？
- Basically, it's a future transaction, as opposed to a spot deal. Now, suppose I have a type of Slime Condensate in my hand, priced at 100 Mora a bottle. ｜ 那是一种和现货交易对应的未来交易，假设我手里有一种史莱姆凝液，价格是一百摩拉一瓶。
- Mix Kaeya the specified drink ｜ 为凯亚调制指定饮品
- Oh!? Uh, sorry! Paimon shouldn't have assumed anything. ｜ 啊！对不起，我又说错话了。
- The smithies in Inazuma forge their blades from Jade Steel... ｜ 稻妻的师傅会用「玉钢」锻剑…
- A masterpiece created by the Sumeru Fishing Association. After being replicated using adeptal energies, it serves the same functions as a "Pool of Sapphire Grace."\nFramed with top-quality Adhigama Wood, this fish tank is made of transparent glass and wooden panels with unique patterns. Its extremely extraordinary size can easily accommodate multiple large Ornamental Fish inside. Word has it that a certain senior angler spent a fortune on the tank so as to better appreciate the magnificent fish he had caught. Experts were specially hired to design the tank, the making of which even utilized Fontaine's most advanced technologies to fashion the tank out of a single piece of glass. Two pieces of curved glass bent at different angles were then used to form the sides of the fish tank, such that the size of the fish inside might be optically shrunk, allowing onlookers to move their eyes less when admiring his beloved fish.\nIt's just that such large pieces of glass are of fairly limited strength. Therefore, it would be unwise to tamper with the irritable kinds inside the fish tank, such as Betta, or else you will probably have to spend the whole day rescuing the dying fish, picking up glass shards, and cleaning up the floor. ｜ 须弥钓鱼协会的杰作，经由壶中洞天的仙力再现后，有着与「灵沼云池」相同的功能。\n这种鱼缸以品质优良的证悟木为框架，采用了通透的玻璃与带有别致花纹的板材，尺寸极为夸张，能容纳若干体型较大的观赏鱼。据说某位资深鱼师为了更舒适地欣赏自己钓获的绝品，特意聘请专人设计了这型鱼缸，为此还特意用到了枫丹的新锐技术，高价制作了一体成型玻璃。将两块曲度不同的玻璃搭配，组装成鱼缸的外壁。利用光学效应适当缩小了鱼缸中游鱼的体积，以减少人们在观赏时的眼动频率和行程。\n只不过大面积玻璃的强度尚且有限，在这种鱼缸中养殖斗棘鱼这类暴躁的品种时，切勿隔着玻璃挑衅它们，否则就要花费不少功夫来抢救濒死的鱼，收拾玻璃碎片和打扫地板了。
- Wouldn't Seymour just have shattered on impact? ｜ 那样会直接摔碎吧…
- Oh... Paimon sees what happened here... ｜ 唔…我好像明白了。

- You want to put your top speed to the test? I totally understand, after all our goal is the stars and the abyss, right? Ad astra abyssosque! ｜ 想挑战自己速度的极限对吧？嗯嗯，我太明白你的想法了，毕竟我们的目标是星辰与深渊嘛！
- I was born here, and I have never seen anyone from the outside world. ｜ 说来，妾身从出生起就在白夜国，从未见过世外之人。
- The man in pursuit is the <color=#00E1FFFF>kingdom's famed fighter</color>. Though the sun continues to blaze, he continues spiritedly with his chase. ｜ 原来是<color=#00E1FFFF>名震寰宇的勇士</color>，只看他抖擞精神追逐恶龙甚至不畏炎炎烈日。
- Something's not right here... Wait. Could they all have been captured by those people? ｜ 不对劲…难道说，它们都是被那群人强行抓起来的？
- A worthy investment... ｜ 找笔投资…
- Not to mention, a lot of people are enjoying it now. ｜ 现在这个成果，已经被好多好多人喜欢啦。
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- #{NICKNAME}, you aren't at drinking age yet — are you? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你还没有到喝酒的年纪吧。
- Don't worry, I feel much more relaxed now than I was at the Akademiya. ｜ 不用担心，和在教令院的时候相比，现在的我已经很放松了。
- Paimon gets it! You're a great kid, Iotham! ｜ 原来如此，优丹是个好孩子！要好好听话哦！
- Delicious Lotus Seed and Bird Egg Soup ｜ 美味的莲子禽蛋羹
- Domain of Blessing: Fires of Purification V ｜ 祝圣秘境：净化之炎 V
- ...As long as I don't hurt anyone, yes. ｜ …只要不会伤害到别人，我愿意。
- #This barrier is composed of an extremely hard and resistant will. But the Holy Blade is in your hands now, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #这面屏障是由极其坚硬的抗拒意志构成的。但是圣剑已经在你的手上，{NICKNAME}。
- I'm not saying you can't add these new features. I'm just saying that you have to be mindful of how many there are and when they are added. ｜ 我也不是不让你使用这些设定，但就算要用，也要慎重地选择使用的方法和次数。
- Haha, are you worried that you won't be able to walk over by then? ｜ 你是担心到时候你会走不动路，过不来吗？
- Everyone seems so devoted to the troupe. I'm sure if you keep chipping away, you'll find a way through. ｜ 既然大家的感情都很好，那么就携手共渡难关吧。
- Kurisu is always telling us that repaying favors is all the more important for us as merchants. ｜ 会长常常叮嘱我们，我们是商人，更要懂得知恩图报。
- Hmm... Liloupar, are you alright? Why are you so quiet? ｜ 唔…利露帕尔，你还好吗？怎么突然没反应啦…？
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- We took care of it, but— ｜ 已经了结了，但是…
- Thinking Like a Vahumana Scholar ｜ 像因论派学者一样思考
- Pigeons Go AWOL ｜ 鸽子习惯一去不回
- Well, Paimon was providing running commentary. That takes energy too! ｜ 我也有一路陪你说话嘛，说话也是会消耗能量的。
- Trade Supervisor ｜ 贸易监察
- Perhaps it might have been the work of survivors among them — survivors who later returned to gather most of the... abandoned belongings. Alas, I cannot be sure. Either way, it was a highly disquieting scene. ｜ 或许是他们中有的幸存者回来，归拢了大部分…遗留下来的东西。我不确定…太让人不安了。
- She needs to know regardless. ｜ 这是最快的办法了。
- Guilt? ｜ 愧疚感？
- I'm fine. What's past is past — we need to look towards the future. ｜ 没关系。已经是过去的事了，人总是要向前看的嘛。
- Haha, things are finally looking up! ｜ 哈哈，好兆头！
- Consumable ｜ 消耗品
- Defeat the awakened Inazuman device ｜ 击败苏醒的稻妻装置
- My grasp of language has expanded from merging with those Oceanid Creatures. I can now comprehend the message from Springvale. ｜ 通过和纯水小动物结合，词汇量增加了。明白了清泉镇的信息。
- #You can always count on Miko to tease {NICKNAME} relentlessly. ｜ #神子果然还是老样子，不逗一逗{NICKNAME}就不舒服。
- It appears that the Millelith managed to get the captured Treasure Hoarder to talk. ｜ 看来，千岩军是把那个盗宝团的嘴给撬开了。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param6:F1P}
- The Steambird said that Mr. Leroy fell from a very high place while climbing a mountain, and went tumbling down. ｜ 蒸汽鸟报上说，勒鲁瓦先生爬山的时候从很高的地方摔下来，摔了一个大跟头。
- Hence, I deliberately hid the fact that I had one of the Kory Drums and entrusted it to an acquaintance I have in the Akademiya... ｜ 因此我才故意隐瞒了其中一个「俱利鼓」就在我手中的事情，然后拜托了教令院的熟人…
- Farewell, and may Vennessa watch over you. ｜ 再见，愿温妮莎注视着你！
- Blueprint for the Future ｜ 未来蓝图
- So why did the Abyss Order... ｜ 但为什么深渊教团…
- The Arataki Gang... ｜ 荒泷派…
- Sent Snowman Components ｜ 所赠送的「雪人部件」
- I'm a bit curious, indeed... ｜ 确实…有点兴趣…
- Let me show you how this ends. ｜ 看看结局吧。
- Must be someone really new, to do something that dumb! This is why you need to read the operating manual before you use it... ｜ 肯定是新人吧！干这种蠢事！所以说操作之前一定要读操作手册…
- I'm ready any time. ｜ 我随时可以出发。
- Talk to Katheryne in Mondstadt ｜ 询问蒙德的凯瑟琳
- Northern Apple Stew ｜ 北地苹果焖肉
- But were I to say I've already gotten completely used to it... Would you think I'm lying? ｜ 但要是我说，我已经完全适应了…你会不会觉得我在撒谎？
- <color=#765F4EFF>Imaginarium Theater</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>This is the ceaseless drama of adventure played out in the interstice between reality and fantasy.\nComplete the challenges (that is, performances) within to obtain rare treasures.\nThe challenges and restrictions of the Imaginarium Theater will change each season.</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>Rules: Alternate and Principal Casts</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>· Principal Cast: A pool of characters that can be used directly when gameplay challenges begin, and can be directly added to your team for combat;\n· Alternate Cast: Cannot be directly used. Travelers must complete Combat Events, trigger Companion Events, or use other methods in order for Alternate Cast members to join the Principal Cast.</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>Rules: Selecting Characters</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>· Opening Characters: 6 characters designated at the start of each season. These 6 characters will be set as your initial Principal Cast. The Imaginarium Theater will offer trial versions of all 6 characters.\n· Required Elemental Types: Only characters that meet the Elemental requirements for that season may participate.\n·Supporting Cast: Characters chosen by your friends to offer as support characters, other than your own characters.\n· Special Guest Stars: A special pool of selectable characters that do not need to meet the Elemental requirements for that season.</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>Rules: Vigor</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>Characters start out with 2 Vigor, and after completing a Combat Event, characters will lose 1 Vigor.\nOnce all Vigor is exhausted, the character cannot participate in combat.</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>Themes and Resets</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>The first day of every month, the Imaginarium Theater will automatically reset, and the challenges and Elemental restrictions will also undergo corresponding changes.</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>Fantastical Blessings</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>After unlocking the Imaginarium Theater, the Fantastical Blessings available will refresh each season, offering buffs for the Opening Characters.\nThese buffs will be effective both during Imaginarium Theater challenges and in your adventures outside the theater.</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>Rewards</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>After completing certain numbers of Acts and the challenges are finalized, you may obtain rewards.\nIn addition, you may also earn Toy Medals, which can be exchanged with Wolfy for Thespian Tricks for certain characters, increasing the number of poses available for characters when taking photos.\nNew Thespian Tricks will be added and updated as the Theater updates.</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>Stellas and Medals</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>After finalizing a Star Challenge, you can earn a Stella corresponding to the Act.\nDepending on which Act was completed, you will earn different levels of Performance Medals, which will be displayed in your profile.</color> ｜ <color=#765F4EFF>【幻想真境剧诗】</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>这是在幻想与真实的隙间上演着的无休止的冒险剧。\n完成其中的挑战亦即演出，就能获得珍奇的宝藏。\n每期幻想真境剧诗的挑战与限制，也会发生变化。</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>【规则：可出战与待命角色】</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>·可出战角色：在玩法挑战开始时就可用的一批角色，能直接加入队伍出战；\n·待命角色：待命角色并非直接可用。旅行者需要通过完成战斗，或者触发抽取伙伴事件等方式，使这些待命角色转变为可出战角色。</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>【规则：角色的选取】</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>·开幕角色：当期指定的6名角色，这6名开幕角色将构成初始的可出战角色。幻想真境剧诗会提供这些角色的试用版。\n·符合元素类型：符合当期元素限制的角色才能参与挑战。\n·助演角色：除自己的角色外，好友选取提供的角色。\n·特邀角色：当期指定的部分不受元素限制的可选角色。</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>【规则：角色的耐力】</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>角色初始具有2点耐力值，在完成战斗事件后，将消耗1点耐力值。\n耐力值耗竭后，角色将无法参与战斗。</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>【规则：主题与重置】</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>每月首日，幻想真境剧诗将自行重置，挑战与元素类型限制也会发生相应的变化。</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>【幻境祝福】</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>解锁幻想真境剧诗后，将出现每期更新的幻境祝福，为当期开幕角色提供增益效果。\n这些增益效果无论是在幻想真境剧诗的演出挑战中，还是剧场外的冒险中都会生效。</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>【奖励说明】</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>通过一定幕数的挑战并完成结算后，可以获得奖励。\n除此之外，还有机会获得玩具勋章，能够用于从小狼处交换特定角色的「表演诀窍」，丰富角色拍照时可用的姿势。\n「表演诀窍」会随幻想真境剧诗更新增加。</color>\n\n<color=#765F4EFF>【星章与勋章】</color>\n<color=#7E756FFF>达成一幕演出挑战的明星挑战并完成结算后，可获得相应一幕的星章。\n根据通过的演出幕数，还将获得不同华丽程度的勋章，这些勋章能在个人资料界面展示。</color>
- Well, one more string to our strategic bow. Although I didn't learn much about my enemy, I've still learned a lot from everyone. ｜ 又积累下来了一条策略。虽然没有做到知己知彼，但我也从大家身上学到了许多。

- You've, uh, noticed then... Heh. Yeah, Benny's Adventure Team has been me on my own for a long time now. Reason is, I have such bad luck that even the most benign of adventures end up turning into the adventure from hell, and no one wants to come with me... Do you feel the same way? ｜ 你看出来了啊…呵呵，没错，「班尼冒险团」很久之前就只有我一个人了。因为我很倒霉，无论是多么简单安全的冒险都会变得险象环生，没人愿意跟着这样的团长…你也会这么想吗？

- Synopsis (Shots 1 to 4):\nShowcase <color=#e5870a>Sucrose's</color> concerns about the effectiveness of the <color=#e5870a>ordinary potions</color>, but at <color=#e5870a>Noelle's</color> insistence, she chooses them all the same. However, when <color=#e5870a>faced with hilichurls</color>, the potions prove unsatisfactory, failing to improve Noelle's terrible state and causing her to <color=#e5870a>perform poorly</color>. ｜ 脚本规划（第1至第4镜）：\n展示<color=#e5870a>砂糖</color>对<color=#e5870a>普通药剂</color>的药效心存担忧，在<color=#e5870a>诺艾尔</color>的坚持下她们仍旧选择了普通药剂。但在<color=#e5870a>对阵丘丘人</color>时，药剂效果不尽如人意，并未改善诺艾尔的糟糕状态，导致她<color=#e5870a>表现不佳</color>。

- Adventurers' Guild Announcement ｜ 冒险家协会公告
- A basic level designed by Haniyyah. It centers around that most common combination of Pyro Slimes and Blazing Axe Mitachurls. These simple and straightforward features will allow players to quickly understand how best to play the game.\nAccording to Souka's comments, "these monsters are like workers hired by the Adventurers' Guild, with their job being to give new people their first test." Despite the analogy, Souka doesn't intend to pay out salaries to those "workers." In fact, she hasn't even registered at the Adventurers' Guild, or paid the fee.\nFor a Patrol member like Turenna, these are very familiar opponents indeed. As such, commanding them might be a slightly strange experience for her. ｜ 海妮耶主导设计的基础关卡，以提瓦特最常见的魔物组合火史莱姆和火丘丘暴徒作为对手棋子的原型。简单直观的特征让刚刚接触「小小灵蕈大幻戏」的玩家也能迅速理解最有效的对抗方法。\n按照左右加的评论，「这些魔物就像是冒险家协会雇佣的打工者一样，专门负责为新人提供最初的考验」。感慨归感慨，左右加并不打算给对方发工资——她甚至还没在冒险家协会登记注册，连会费都没交。\n对于特巡队的蒂蕾娜而言，这两种魔物也是相当熟悉的对手，指挥它们的感觉自然也特别奇妙…
- Score {param2} points ｜ 评分达到{param2}
- I shall be here waiting for him, and for you. ｜ 我会一直在这里等着罗泽尔，也等着您！
- The Boss Brick "Mesmeric Marine Maiden" can summon multiple watery mirrors onto the field: When the Skill-Ball hits one such mirror, it will <color=#E165B8FF>randomly come out from another</color>. After taking a certain amount of damage, the "Mesmeric Marine Maiden" will summon bricks to protect itself. These summoned bricks will disappear if you <color=#E165B8FF>shoot the Skill-Ball through mirrors enough times</color> or if you wait for a set period. ｜ 坏坏方块王「优雅危险水仕女」可以在场上召唤多面水镜：「术球」命中水镜后，将<color=#E165B8FF>随机从另一面水镜飞出</color>。受到一定伤害后，「优雅危险水仕女」将召唤游艺方块保护自身，将「术球」<color=#E165B8FF>打入水镜一定次数</color>，或是等待一段时间后，被召唤的游艺方块将消失。

- Hitting an opponent with a Normal Attack decreases the Stamina consumption of Sprint or Alternate Sprint by <color=#99FFFFFF>22%</color> for 5s. Additionally, using a Sprint or Alternate Sprint ability increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color> for 5s. ｜ 普通攻击命中敌人后，冲刺或替代冲刺的能力消耗的体力降低<color=#99FFFFFF>22%</color>，持续5秒。此外，使用冲刺或替代冲刺的能力后，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>，持续5秒。

- Almost every business in Liyue has a booth at the annual Xiao Market — but despite its popularity, this is the one time of the year they're not looking to make a profit. The street market exists solely to raise the funds and materials required for the Mingxiao Lantern construction. ｜ 「霄市」上的摊位，是璃月各路商行一年一度、难得不为赚钱，只为筹集「明霄灯」的建设资材而开设的。$UNRELEASED

- That's what our tea times were like before. *sigh* I never thought the station would end up sinking like this... ｜ 我们当初的下午茶就是这样的。唉，没想到，站点最后也像这样沉到水里去了…
- Alright, that'll just about do it. Soaking the scales in the mucus collected from the fish will help preserve them for now. ｜ 好了，这样就可以了，这些鳞片泡在这瓶从鱼身上刮下来的黏液里，能够保存一段时间。
- Haven't you already taken your weapon back? ｜ 你不是已经拿回武器了么？
- Huh? Are these... components? Are you just giving them to us? ｜ 欸？这个是…零件？要直接给我们吗？
- Children have yet to be well-informed and are easily swayed by emotions, but it does not mean that they can be disrespected or mocked.\nFrustration and disappointments do indeed grant them a taste of reality — but at the cost of robbing them of innocent thoughts and exuberant emotions.\nThe children who unluckily run across such negativity would always hear a gentle, warm voice on some ordinary night.\nShe listens attentively to the children, uses her wonderful metaphors to clarify principles to them, plays with them, and talks about their favorite games and snacks... until dawn.\nThough the night is short, such company would let the children believe that there is still someone in this world who understands them.\nHatred and frustration are thus melted away by the warmth in their hearts, and the children would gain an opportunity to make a change in their lives such that they can grow in confidence and gladness.\nHowever, none of them could recognize to whom the gentle, warm voice belonged. Everyone knows, after all, that Greater Lord Rukkhadevata had departed a long time ago.\nA group of children gathered in secret and discussed this mystical phenomenon. Suddenly, a child who seemed to know a lot more than their peers mentioned a somewhat unusual name, "Lesser Lord Kusanali."\nThey soon accepted that theory. And, of course, none of their parents believed them.\nBut what did that matter? Lesser Lord Kusanali was already their friend. ｜ 孩童们见识尚不充分，又容易被情绪左右，但这不意味着他们可以不被尊重，或是被肆意嘲笑愚弄。\n挫折与失落固然能让他们品尝到现实的滋味，却也会让他们失去纯真的想法与炽热的情感。\n不幸遭遇到这类事情的孩子，往往会在某个平常的夜里听到一缕温柔之声。\n她认真倾听孩子的倾诉，也会用奇妙比喻为孩子阐明道理，还会陪他们做游戏，聊喜欢的游戏与点心…直到天明。\n一夜的陪伴虽然短暂，但孩子们会因此相信世上仍存在着可以理解他们的人。\n仇恨与对抗心在暖流中融化。他们变得有机会邂逅生活的转机，变得自信与快乐。\n然而，没有一个孩子说得出梦中的声音是谁。即便人们知晓「大慈树王」之威名，无比伟大的她毕竟也已与世长辞。\n几个小孩子悄悄聚在一起，讨论这神奇的现象。突然，某位看上去懂得很多的孩子提到了「小吉祥草王」这个有些生僻的名字。\n大家很快就接受了这样的说法，当然，没有哪位家长相信他们。\n可那有什么关系？「小吉祥草王」已经是他们的朋友了。
- Thank you so much! Your affirmation fills me with greater confidence. ｜ 实在感谢！得到了你们的肯定，我更有底气了。
- Yeah, even Vacher wasn't sentenced to death by the Oratrice... You know, the real evil mastermind behind the serial disappearances case. ｜ 是啊，就连当时少女连环失踪案的罪魁祸首瓦谢，都没有被判处死刑呢。
- Support Card ｜ 支援牌
- Only those that wish for an end will find one. For me, it's nothing more than a mirage. ｜ 渴望结束的人才会寻找终点。我不一样，我根本不在乎这些虚无缥缈的事。
- That's weird. Where is he? ｜ 奇了怪了。他去哪里了？
- Place of Swallowing ｜ 吞咽之间
- In Sumeru, both scholars who study King Deshret's civilization and those followers of his who can recite the names of Al-Ahmar and his Seven Pillars by heart know the significance of the "Temple of Silence."\nIt is an extremely ancient organization, and if people knew of its mission, they would sum it up with two words: "sublime" and "stewardship."\nIt has been over a thousand years since Hermanubis, the greatest of all sages, established the Temple of Silence. Their sole aim is one that is also truly sublime, and that is to steward the knowledge that should not find its way out into the world. Over the long centuries, the desert has experienced great turmoil. The Temple of Silence has fled from the devastation of war, taking with them all the knowledge they possessed as they moved from place to place. For a time, they came to the rainforest and worked with the Akademiya, but as they could not trust those wielding power in the Akademiya, they left. Finally, they found a place for themselves in a forgotten corner of the world.\nSethos, the one who tells this story, is himself from the Temple of Silence. Despite his claims to be ordinary, he is anything but. Or perhaps an ordinary identity is how Sethos wishes to make up for his own life.\nSethos was born in the desert. His mother is said to have been a merchant, and his father a mercenary, and a number of clues have led some to conjecture that they must originally have come from a desert tribe with a tiny population. But alas, it is unfortunate that Sethos has no memory of his birth parents. As far back as he can remember, he was already in the care of Bamoun, living in the Temple of Silence as his adoptive grandson.\nAfter some years, it was discovered that Sethos's special constitution was capable of receiving a Ba fragment of Hermanubis. As a result of this, he was indwelt by a great power with which he established a sacred connection.\nThe other whose childhood experiences were similar to his — Cyno, the General Mahamatra — had long gained the admiration of Sumeru's people. But Sethos didn't want to become a famed, high-profile figure like Cyno. Therefore, after arriving in Sumeru City, he chose to live in anonymity, assuming the most ordinary of ordinary identities.\nHe found a place to live and invented a perfectly normal and reasonable-sounding family background for himself. Sometimes, he serves as a desert guide, while others, he helps merchant caravans with this and that. When he is bored, he can be found in various locales, chatting with friends to pass the time.\nOf course, that is when he is free; things are very different when he is busy. Lesser Lord Kusanali sometimes invites him to meet with the sages to discuss various issues that arise as they work together — for Sethos has now succeeded Bamoun as the leader of the Temple of Silence, and under his leadership, the Temple has once again established a collaborative relationship with the Akademiya.\nOn the one hand, a perfectly ordinary new resident of Sumeru City; on the other, the new leader of the Temple of Silence. Both of these identities are his, despite the apparent gulf between them.\nIf you were to ask him which life he preferred, however, rather than choosing between them, he would simply reply: "Ah, come on now, there's no need for that! Making unnecessary choices is such a tiring way to live! Think about it, you wouldn't force someone to choose between a bottle of liquor and a cup of coffee, would you? Aren't they both me?" ｜ 在须弥，研究赤王文明的学者与能熟练诵读赤王阿赫玛尔及其麾下七柱名号的追随者都理解「缄默之殿」的意义。\n那是一个极为古老的组织，假如人们知晓它的使命，定会以这两个词语概括它：「崇高」，以及「管理」。\n众贤之至贤赫曼努比斯建立缄默之殿迄今已逾千年。他们唯一也最崇高的目的，便是管理不应流传于世的知识。千百年来，沙中动乱，缄默之殿带着他们所拥有的知识，躲避战火，辗转迁移，一度投靠雨林与教令院合作，又因为不信任教令院的掌权者而离去，最终走入了被人遗忘的角落。\n故事的讲述者，赛索斯，他正是来自缄默之殿。他绝非自己所说那般平凡，更或许，平凡身份是他给自己人生的补偿。\n赛索斯出生在沙漠，据说他的母亲是商人，父亲是佣兵，也有人通过种种线索推断他的父母都来自人口稀少的沙漠部族。但很可惜，赛索斯本人对亲生父母毫无记忆，自记事起，他就被巴穆恩收留，以养孙的身份留在缄默之殿。\n数年后，赛索斯被发觉体质特殊，能接受赫曼努比斯的跋灵。因此，他被伟大的力量凭依，与其建立起神圣的关联。\n童年经历与他相似的另一人——大风纪官赛诺，早已得到须弥人的敬仰。赛索斯不乐意像赛诺那样威名远扬又引人注目，来到须弥城后隐姓埋名，成了个最普通的人。\n他给自己编造了普通又合理的家庭状况，又安排了住处，有时当沙漠向导，有时给商队帮点小忙，无聊时还会去各个地方找朋友聊天打发时间。\n当然，这只是没事的时候，忙起来可就不一样了。小吉祥草王有时会请他过去，与贤者们一同探讨合作中的诸多问题——是的，赛索斯如今已从前代首领巴穆恩那里继承了缄默之殿管理者的位置，他将引导缄默之殿再次与教令院建立合作关系。\n平凡的须弥城新居民赛索斯，缄默之殿新任首领赛索斯。两个身份天差地别，却都是赛索斯正在经历的。\n假如问他更喜欢哪一种生活，他绝不会做出选择，而是会说：「哎哎哎，没必要吧。人啊，太喜欢取舍就容易活得很累。想想看，一瓶酒和一杯咖啡，干嘛非要去掉一样？不都是我的吗？」

### Part 022

- A pagoda from Sumeru Mansion: Meditative Retreat built around twin ancient trees, one large and one small. The flowers on their crowns are of moderate size but act as one of the most important founts of fragrance in the Sublime Spicewood. They also have an otherworldly characteristic; no matter the distance from the trees, the fragrance will always maintain an appropriate strength, just on the edge of helping one sink into deep meditation. ｜ 「静虑寓所」的高塔，大小双生的两株古树，树冠之上的花卉尺寸适中，不算豪放，却是「妙香林」中至为重要的芳香源泉之一，且拥有殊奇的特性——无论距离远近，嗅到的香气都不浓不淡，恰到好处，维持在助人深思的边界之上。

- Talk about what! You jerk! ｜ 谁和你有话好说，大坏蛋！

- A pitch-black scale that fell to the ground after the battle against the Lord of Eroded Primal Fire.\nThe ancient dragons once used their fallen scales as a means to transmit secret messages and edicts.\nThis scale has been utterly corroded by the power of darkness, the light that was once engraved upon it wholly devoured, leaving naught but twisted, dark remnants. ｜ 在与蚀灭的源焰之主战斗后，落于地面的漆黑鳞片。\n古老的龙众曾经用自身脱落的鳞片以传递秘密的信息与谕令。\n完全被漆黑之力腐蚀的鳞片，原本镌刻其上的光芒被噬尽后，唯留有扭曲与黑暗的残余。
- Whatever the case, thank you two for your help. ｜ 总之，非常感谢二位的帮助。

- An ancient ruined city that was once used by a now-bygone secret order as an ad-hoc site of assembly.\nNow, all that remains to rule the roost are beasts bereft of language or intellect. Defeat them, and you may claim precious artifacts. ｜ 一度被过去的秘密社团用做临时集会所的古代废都，它曾是更古老的团体所使用的据点之一。\n如今占据这里的只有不具语言与智慧的魔物。将它们击败，或许能获得珍贵的圣遗物吧。
- This one should be okay too. There might still be other leaky pipes nearby, let's take a look! ｜ 这个也好了吧。不知道附近还有没有气体泄露的管道，再检查一下吧！
- #So for future top chef {NICKNAME} and super foodie Paimon, Sweet Flowers are like the starting point, the beginning of everything. ｜ #这么说来，对于将来的顶级厨神{NICKNAME}和超级美食鉴赏家派蒙来说，甜甜花也算是起点一样的食材了。
- Hehe, I'll leave it to you then! ｜ 嘿嘿，那就交给我们吧！

- ...I got it! I'll put it back on the fire for a bit, that'll do the trick. ｜ …有了！我把它热一热再吃吧。

- Ah, no need to be so polite! Indeed, I should say that you have impeccable timing. ｜ 不，请别客气！你们来得正是时候！
- But she meant well! Since the separation was inevitable, she hoped that you would be able to come to grips with such a cruel parting a little later in life. ｜ 但她是善意的，如果怎么都要面对残酷的离别，她也希望能稍微晚一点。
- Uh... ｜ 呃…

- After completing the hilichurls' commissions, they will reveal <color=#FFE14BFF>clues as to the time</color> when the Unusual Hilichurl will appear, and they will help the Traveler mark out locations where the Unusual Hilichurl may appear. ｜ 完成了丘丘人的委托后，他们会将「奇怪的丘丘人」出没的<color=#FFE14BFF>时间线索</color>告诉旅行者，并帮忙在地图上标出「奇怪的丘丘人」出没的区域。
- What's the hurry? Since you heard their thoughts, you must be aware that not only do they plan to continue with their crimes, but that they also have plenty of accomplices. ｜ 你别着急嘛。既然你也听到了，就该知道，他们不仅打算继续作恶，而且还有不少同伙…
- Surely a well-designed course would require us to put our knowledge into practice, and then... have our teacher correct the poems we compose. ｜ 把知识投入实战，让老师批改自己亲手写出的情诗，这样才算是完整的学习流程嘛。

- Sometimes the law is compatible with human nature, but sometimes the two conflict. Balancing the two is a discipline in its own right... ｜ 法理与人情有时冲突，有时兼容。权衡二者，真是种学问呢。
- Abyssal creatures with plant-like forms that have descended from a deep, dark, unfathomable, contorted otherworld.\nThese twisted monstrosities are capable of infiltrating deep down into the bowels of the earth, extracting memories to imitate and manipulate. Through this process of distorting the past's memories into more abstruse and sordid forms, they gradually draw closer to Irminsul's core, threatening to undermine its very existence.\nSome say that these aberrations work constantly to corrupt the many colors of light, leaving only pitch-black information in their stead. Such a hypothesis seems to be confirmed by the branches they extend outward, as if to pierce the void itself... ｜ 于深邃晦暗的扭曲异界降临此世的深渊魔物，拥有类似植物的形态。\n此种扭曲的魔物已然能够侵蚀入大地的深处，从中提取记忆以供其模仿与驱使。过往的回忆被扭曲成更加污秽与深邃的样貌，它们借由此种行为，逐渐接近世界之树的核心，以此动摇其存在的根本。\n据说该种魔物无时无刻不在扭曲光芒中蕴含的种种色彩，并将之转化为漆黑的信息，在张开时仿佛要扎入虚空中的枝节似乎也在佐证这一点…
- Ningguang is good to work with. But I have to be mindful of our identities when I'm out in public. When I meet a Qixing as an employee of the Ministry of Civil Affairs, they're "Sir" or "Lady" to me. ｜ 凝光是个不错的合作对象。不过我平日在外行走，得注意身份。总务司雇员见到七星，难免要尊称一声大人了。

- ...No, I suspect that any such rulership would be something entirely new, surpassing our traditional conceptions. ｜ …不，那是有别于传统概念的崭新的王。

- My only complaint is that they're always going out drinking at night, but they never let us join them. ｜ 唯一的遗憾就是，他们晚上经常抱团出去喝酒，却不让其他人跟着。

- *sigh* I'm so sorry, Traveler... ｜ 抱歉，旅行者…呃、呃…

- Huts built around the square by vendors during the Lantern Rite Festival. The frames are made from Sandbearer Wood with incipient decay and covered with a ruby Red roof. The six lanterns hanging high are particularly eye-catching. According to some vendors, the lanterns hanging high against the red roof have a symbolic meaning of "bouts of good fortune". ｜ 海灯节期间，商贩们在广场边缘搭建的棚屋，以初腐的「却砂木」制成框架，配以「玉红」色泽的顶棚，高悬的六盏灯笼尤为醒目，据一些商贩所说，高高悬挂的灯笼映照着红色的顶棚，有着「洪福齐天」的寓意。

- No problem! Please, blast away to your heart's content! ｜ 没问题！请尽情享受这个新奇的游乐项目吧！

- That was way too hard... ｜ 太难了…

However, the reason for the victim being Cowell and the reason for the chosen lady's disappearance remain mysteries. ｜ 警备队的调查显示，魔术表演即将结束时燃放的烟花，烧断了悬吊水箱的绳子，导致水箱坠落，箱中的考威尔身亡。显然林尼是最有可能利用魔术道具作案之人，只是死者为何是考威尔，被选中的少女为何失踪，都仍然是谜团。

- But even if forbidden knowledge has been completely removed, its influence still remains, which is why The Withering remains even after forbidden knowledge has disappeared. ｜ 就算「禁忌知识」已经根除，它们留下的影响还会存在，「死域」并不会一起消失。

- If Captain Beidou is the star that guides us in the night sky, then Rex Lapis is what keeps the whole sky up in place. ｜ 如果说北斗大姐像是天空中指引我前行的星斗，那岩王爷就是撑起整片天空的人吧。

- As expected. Let's follow him. ｜ 正如预料，我们也跟上去看看。

- The golden boat-guy said that he'd scrounge some people up to help me search, but it doesn't look like anyone's coming! So I thought that since you're here, you can help me out too! ｜ 金色的撑船人答应会寻人来帮我一起找…可是等到现在都没有人影…我就想，既然你来了，也请拜托帮帮我吧！
- Regardless, I need to first investigate the sages' motives, make things right, and punish them if needed... But I'll have to be discreet, or they'll see me coming. ｜ 总之，必须优先查明贤者们的意图，进行纠正与惩罚…但也当心不要打草惊蛇。
- "This was once the realm of a god. Now, a pheasant sits upon the throne." Just like the world today. ｜ 「这里本来就是天父的雄邦，如今王座上坐着的却是雉鸡」。和如今的世界一样。
- Paimon thinks we should go ask Kaveh now. If he's searching for the book, he must know something. ｜ 我觉得，我们现在应该去找卡维问问，他既然在找，那势必知道些情报。

- Ah, it's Mom! And Big Sis Talochard, and Big Bro Curve! ｜ 是妈妈！还有托萝莎姐姐和曲线大哥！
- Not to worry! Health is the greatest wealth, after all. ｜ 哎，不用客气。身体健康是最重要的。
- See, I'm a youkai too, right, and I'm already a natural in human society. I bet there's not a single person in Inazuma who hasn't heard of Arataki "The One and Oni" Itto! ｜ 本大爷身为妖怪，却在人类社会混得风生水起，全稻妻没有一个人不知道本大爷的威名！
- They argued for such a long time. My father eventually stormed out and slammed the door behind him. I didn't get a single sentence of apology, or any words of comfort... ｜ 但两个人吵了很久很久，最后我父亲摔门而出，我没能等到一句道歉，安慰也没有…
- Huh? An "empty yet fervent passion"? What does that even mean? ｜ 哈？「空无又热切」的…「激情」，这是什么奇怪的形容？
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Hmm, let me think... ｜ 让我想想…
- Let's leave that aside for now, then. On to the military question: Watatsumi Island's forces will need to come back under the jurisdiction of the Tenryou Commission. ｜ 既然这样，那我们聊聊治安吧。我想让海祇岛的治安部队，回归到天领奉行的管辖之下。
- *roars* ｜ 嚎——
- She came to me recently to discuss the reopening of the Bishui trade route. She even asked me what Rex Lapis would do if it were him. Admittedly, what we came up with was not quite on par with what he would have chosen. But... seeing the way she kept starting her plan from scratch over and over again, I think I started to understand her a little bit. ｜ 最近她主动与我讨论起了修复碧水商路的方案，还问我，是帝君的话会怎么做。我们商量出来的举措固然不比帝君，不过…看到她反复推演着沙盘的样子，隐约能够理解她的心情了。
- That should have been something good to hear, but my body is instinctively rejecting it. I feel like I'll black out if I try to remember... ｜ 本该是听了会高兴的事情，身体却本能地抗拒。强行回忆的话，会痛到几乎失去知觉。
- Hah, the cusp of midsummer's night is as a fleeting dream. If only things could stay this way... ｜ 哈，如梦一般的，将入夜幕的夏日…如果能一直如此就好了…

- Heart of Depth ｜ 沉沦之心
- These are the walls of the Refined Estate. The wood on the lower half section has had a layer of glue produced by boiling Amur Maple bark painted on it, which makes it exceedingly resistant to wind, rain, and insect infestation. Its load-bearing capacities are also quite impressive, resisting collapse even when large stones roll down from the mountains and strike them. However, the worst that your Serenitea Pot could throw at them is probably a Forest Boar charge... ｜ 「雅练上邸」的围墙。下半部分的木材涂有羽扇枫树皮长期熬制所得的胶体，格外耐受风雨和虫蛀。承力结构也相当出色，即使被山上滚落的巨石撞击，也不会倒塌。不过在这尘歌壶中，至多只需要抵挡野林猪的冲撞吧…

- Weapon Ascension Material.\n"Sumirezome Sangetsu Kogetsukan" depicts the fierce oni Torachiyo shattering the Shogun's naginata with a single bite, thus gaining the upper hand for a time. As such, masks that are based on him have finely crafted fangs.\nIn the denouement of this tale, the wounded oni fled into the forest, deathly afraid of showing himself even to the cold moonlight. The wind that whispers through the alleys and valleys can be said to resemble his quiet cries of agony, and so there is a poetic seasonal expression for this in Inazuma: "Torachiyo's Wind." ｜ 赋予武器突破之力的材料。\n《菫染山月虎啮鉴》中描绘的鬼人「虎千代」，曾以利齿咬碎将军的薙刀，取得过一时的上风。因此以他为原型制造的面具上往往有精心雕琢的尖牙。\n在其结局中，负伤之兽般遁入林野，连清凉的月光也避之唯恐不及。穿过窄巷与峡谷的风声像是受伤的鬼在低声哀嚎，因此也有「虎千代风」这一季语。

- In the past, I always stood behind her at tea parties, sword at the ready. But now, I get to sit at the table and enjoy the tea and treats along with her.\nI'm now beginning to understand why she complains all the time about how hard it is to maintain her physique. ｜ 从前参加茶会的时候，我总是扶着剑站在她背后，现在我却能在长桌对面就座，与她分享茶点。\n位置变化之后，我开始理解为什么她会成天念叨着「控制体态」了。

- Two snowman eyes brimming with life. Can be used to build a Puffy Snowman.\nThe first child to build such eyes claimed that he had referred to Ella, the smartest among his companions, when making them. Indeed, there is no snowman mounted with such eyes that does not look wise beyond the pale, and reliable to boot. ｜ 炯炯有神的雪人双眼，可用于组装「噗噗雪人」。\n首个制作这种雪人眼睛的孩子宣称，他的参考对象是小伙伴里最聪明的艾拉，正是因此，无论哪种造型的雪人，安上这对双眼后，都像是具有了非凡的智慧，看起来无比可靠。

That would be a nice gift for my daughter. ｜ 前段时间，外子{0}的时候，看见了一个…总之，长得有点像菫瓜的家伙。紫紫的，戴着面具。脑袋上有两个像兔子一样的尖耳朵。听他的描述还挺可爱的，想问问哪里有这样的玩偶卖？如果送给女儿做礼物，应该会很不错。

- When you have enough Fayz Force, use an <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Skill</color> or <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Burst</color>. Then, stop all actions immediately to create Supersense Particles.\nSupersense Skill\nUnleash a shockwave at the character's position, dealing True DMG to nearby opponents and restoring HP to all nearby party members equal to 100% of the character's Max HP.\nIn addition, unleash a Geo shockwave at the location of the character that deals AoE Geo DMG every 2s for 20s. ｜ 「溢神能量」足够时，施放<color=#FFCC33>元素战技</color>或<color=#FFCC33>元素爆发</color>后立刻停止行动以生成「超感光粒」。\n「超感技能」\n在角色的位置释放冲击波，对附近的敌人造成真实伤害，并为队伍中所有角色恢复生命值，回复量相当于角色生命值上限的100%。\n此外，每2秒，还将在角色的位置释放岩元素冲击波，造成岩元素范围伤害，持续20秒。

- A flying squirrel wearing both a crown and a noble, resolute appearance. Can be placed on a "Good Shelf" for display.\nThis model is based on a certain Princess from the Kingdom of Breezes and Bells. Interestingly, when this princess was posing for the model, she chose an identical pose to that of Clanche — arms folded in, ready to vault into the skies. Perhaps the scene of themselves "seizing the skies" is something that all flying squirrels envisage in their hearts. ｜ 头戴冠冕的的飞鼠模型，形貌高贵且坚毅，可被摆放在「好架子」上进行展示。\n这个模型是根据铃风王国某位公主的形象制作的。有趣的是，这位公主在担任模特时，选择了与克朗谢一致的姿势——双臂收拢，仿佛随时准备飞身一跃的造型。或许「搏击天空」正是每位飞鼠心中潜藏的愿景吧。
- I was on my way to go shopping earlier when I overheard your conversation next to the Crafting Bench. From what I could gather, you are trying to investigate a bizarre prophecy? ｜ 我刚才去商店街买东西，碰巧听到了你们在炼金铺旁的谈话。几位是在研究一则神奇的预言对吧？
- The energy extractor device within the Eremite camp seems to serve some unspeakable purpose.\nYou must look for a control key somewhere in the surrounding rooms to shut it down.\nHowever, even the smallest movement might interrupt the termination sequence, so make sure to keep the area free of obstruction till the machine shuts down. ｜ 镀金旅团营地里设立的能量提取装置，似乎要借此达成某些不可告人的目的。\n需要在周围房间中寻找到控制钥以关闭。\n但凡有一点微小的动作都会阻碍其关闭进程，所以直到完全关闭为止，都需要留心摒除周围的干扰。
- So, you also followed a suspicious person here? ｜ 你们也是追着可疑人士来的？
- Elemental Bursts Used ｜ 使用元素爆发次数
- Indeed. Then perhaps you could tell us everything that happened during that one minute. ｜ 确实，那你大可以就在我们的面前，把这一分钟的事从头到尾说上一遍。
- No need to hurry. Our deal is hardly the urgent matter here. Atoning for your transgressions is the main order of business. ｜ 别急啊，交易是小事，认错才是大事。
- A seed obtained from the Seed Dispensary. A quality seed full of life, just waiting to be planted in the fields of the Realm Within. After some time, it will grow into a Windwheel Aster. ｜ 通过「化种匣」获取的种子，富有活力，品质上佳，种植于壶中洞天的田亩后，可在一段时间后生长为「风车菊」。
- #Good night, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，晚安。

- Okay, understood. ｜ 好的，我明白了。
- That makes sense — it is the same for people! ｜ 好现实，根本就和人一样嘛。

- Mmm, fascinating... Which game are you looking forward to the most? ｜ 嗯——挺有意思呢。那你现在最看好的是哪支队伍？

- A fitting end for Mihir, perhaps, but not for me. ｜ 对米希尔这样的家伙来说或许是好结局吧，但这个结局并不适合我。

- A pagoda from Sumeru Mansion: Meditative Retreat built around a thriving giant tree. The crown of the tree and its flowers are exceedingly large and can be seen from hundreds of meters away, emitting a calming and serene feeling. As a structure, it appears as something like a unique signifier, silently constraining visitors' actions and reminding them that they have stepped into the realm of silent meditation. ｜ 「静虑寓所」的高塔，环绕壮盛的巨树而建，树顶的枝叶与繁花尺寸惊人，远在百步开外就能清晰观望，给人一种安心、平静的观感，似是独一无二的标识，提醒来客「业已踏入静谧沉思之地」，从而凭借视觉的暗示达成行为的约束。

- A golden fragment that fell from the centaur golem's chest. Putting the tune inscribed upon the shattered rubble back together, it appears to be a small sliver of a grander musical movement.\nOne legion, one symphony, one rhythm — when the conductor of Legion Athanatoi should lift up the song of flagrant revolt against fate, countless burning blades of titanic aspect would follow their marshal's melody and strike forth in concert against the foes of their God King.\nPeople once believed that the song of eternal happiness and harmony would resound throughout the world till the end of all destinies. But harmonies can be changed. When the rebellious God King fell from his throne, the imperishable capital was reduced to refuse and rubble — for whom, then, shall the lyre in the hands of a legion-less commander play? ｜ 半人马魔像胸前掉落的金色别章。与之连缀的碎石上所镌刻着的曲调，似乎是某部宏大乐剧的断章。\n统一的军团、统一的乐章、统一的节律，当不朽军团的指挥者奏起妄图摇撼命运的曲调，无数柄燃火的巨剑便会跟随统帅的旋律，成为击倒神王之敌的华章。\n曾有人认为，永恒幸福的谐和音律将会响彻寰宇，直至一切命运的尽头，但谐律亦会变奏。最终，当叛逆的神王跌落王座，不朽的王都化为丘墟，失去了军团的统帅手中的琴又要为谁人奏响呢。

- You'd better leave at once. If you stay any longer, it'll be too late... ｜ 你们还是快点走吧，再不走就来不及了…
- I am insinuating that you had plenty of opportunities to transfer the raw materials for Imitation Sinthe from the harbor to a boat, and then sail over to the meeting place full of floating barrels. ｜ 也就是说，你有足够的机会，借职务之便偷换出港口封存的原料，再开船接近浮桶。
- I won't take up any more of your time. Thank you — this lunch was everything I was hoping for and more. I can't wait to try out everything I've learned. ｜ 那我就不打扰你们了，这顿午餐我非常尽兴，现在已经跃跃欲试了。
- P·A·I·M·O·N ｜ P·A·I·M·O·N
- Oh! Wait! Paimon thinks she's starting to understand. "Pahsiv" is yes and "Melusine" is no. Could that be it? ｜ 啊！等等，我好像有点听出来了…「珀西芙」的意思是肯定，「美露莘」的意思是否定，难道是这个意思？

- Investigate the altar ｜ 调查祭坛

- "Trapped or not, this is the only life we know. We can't leave..." ｜ 「不是困在岛上，是我们只能这样生活，谁都走不了…」
- Think about it for a moment. ｜ 你再好好想想。

- The entrance? You mean... we'll put the treasure chest right by the door? ｜ 正门？你是说，要把宝箱放在入口附近吗？
- #Thank you, Golden Nara {NICKNAME} and Paimon. Arana has lost those memories, but Arana knows you are good Nara. You helped Arana meet Narana. Arana is so happy. ｜ #谢谢，金色的那菈{NICKNAME}、派蒙。兰拉娜不记得了，但你们一定都很好。你们让兰拉娜认识了那菈拉娜，很开心。
- Collect Explosive Barrels and defeat your opponents! ｜ 收取炸药桶，击败敌人！
- It would be nice if we had one of these too. ｜ 要是我们也有一个这样的壶就好了。
- Well... If that's what you think, Lulu... I—I guess it's okay by me. ｜ 璐璐都这么说了，那…那也行吧。
- I'm here for the free meals! ｜ 我又来蹭饭了！
- As her full name, "Mona Megistus, the Astrologist," is far too long, she permits those around her to call her Mona.\nMona's hydromancy is masterful and accurate, but people are often unwilling to accept the cruel truths presented to them through astrology.\nAt the same time, astrological tools and resources are necessary and regular expenses for a brilliant astrologist such as her, but they are not cheap by any means.\nDue to this and her lack of financial management skills, she lives a frugal life and can barely make ends meet.\nHowever, in her own words, Mona has simply chosen this simple life to penetrate the truths of this world. For how could the Great Astrologist Mona be shackled by poverty? ｜ 由于少女占星术士的全名「阿斯托洛吉斯·莫娜·梅姬斯图斯」实在太长，她姑且允许身边人称她为莫娜。\n莫娜的水占术高妙而精准，不过，人们却往往不愿接受那些残酷直白的占卜答案。\n同时，作为一名优秀的占星术士，占星工具和资料这些必需品也得定期购置，这方面的开销可不是小数字。\n正因如此，不擅管理财务的她不得己过着简朴的生活，长期徘徊在温饱线边缘。\n当然，按莫娜本人的说法，选择简朴的生活是为了看破世界的真实，「伟大的占星术士莫娜」才不会被贫穷束缚。
- Did you need me for something? ｜ 找我有事？
- On purpose, though... right? ｜ 是他故意的吧？

- So, you know that name, too... ｜ 你们居然也知道这个名字…

- Good question. Surprising indeed — I was under the impression that you knew I lived here. ｜ 好问题。真叫人惊讶，我以为你们都知道这里是我家。

- Sometimes I wonder if things were harder for her because she was so beautiful. People were always drawn to her beauty first, only to realize she had a sensitive and vulnerable heart underneath. ｜ 有时我会想，是因为她长得美丽吗？人们总是为她的外表所吸引，随后才察觉到她有颗纤细敏感的心。
- It also just so happened that a friend of mine was planning to come here to check out the tea business, so I tagged along. ｜ 正巧我有一个认识的朋友要来翘英庄考察茶叶生意，我就搭着顺路船过来啦。

- A smiling woodcarving head that can be used to assemble an "Aranara Carving." It is unpainted and has the unique texture and aroma of logs.\nThe curvature of one's mouth is proof of one's friendliness and politeness. Just like most of the Aranara in the fairy tales, these make new friends with sincerity and a smile. ｜ 露出笑容的木刻脑袋，可用于组装「兰那罗木刻」。未经上色，拥有原木的独特质感与香气。\n嘴部弯曲的弧度是友好与礼貌的证明。童话中大部分的兰那罗便是这般，靠着真诚与笑容结识了一个又一个新朋友。
- Speaking of dates, if you're struggling to decide, please do come and talk it over. I'd hate to see you still alive and kicking when your big day comes. ｜ 要是决定不了，至少也先来和我说一声。不然到时候看见你还活蹦乱跳的，我会很失望哦。

- That bard awakened first, but strangely, my healing powers had almost no effect on him... ｜ 那位诗人是先醒的，但奇怪的是，我的治疗对他的伤几乎没有效果…
- Welcome to the Komore Teahouse! How can I help you? ｜ 这位客人，今日光临「木漏茶室」有何贵干？
- "Playing games every now and then forces you to think outside the box, which'll surely come in handy for writing papers... right?"\nHint: Layla's deck includes large numbers of Companion Action Cards, which help Character Cards perform actions more frequently, thereby triggering the Shooting Stars effect more often. ｜ 「偶尔玩些游戏，也能换一换思维，对之后写论文有益…嗯，应该吧？」\n【提示】莱依拉的牌组包含大量的「伙伴」行动牌，以支援角色牌进行频繁的行动，从而更多地触发「飞星」的效果。
- Ah, even though the Qixing have made peace with the adepti after the latter had denounced Liyue, they still want to pay their respects to the illuminated ones... ｜ 唔，之前众仙来璃月问罪，虽说事情已经谈和，但「七星」还是希望能展现对仙人们敬重的一面…
- "Meow." "Some of our companions are quite sensitive to sharp and clear sounds. I've heard that deep in the snowy peaks, such a sound would make your hair stand on end..."\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: "Cryo Hypostasis" gains immunity to Frozen, Stun, Petrification, and starts with "Elemental Lifeform: Cryo" attached. When "Cryo Crystal Core" is triggered, Cryo Hypostasis will be healed to 6 HP. At the start of the Action Phase, trigger the following up to once: If Cryo Hypostasis does not have "Cryo Crystal Core" attached, then attach "Cryo Crystal Core" once more.</color> ｜ 「喵。」「我们的一些同伴对清脆的声音非常敏感，听说在雪山深处，就有着能让我们浑身毛发都竖起来的声响…」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「无相之冰」免疫冻结、眩晕、石化，初始附属「元素生命·冰」，触发「冰晶核心」时会恢复到6点生命值；行动阶段开始时，最多触发1次：如果「无相之冰」未附属「冰晶核心」，则重新附属「冰晶核心」。</color>
- Take, for example, my foray into ceramics. At first, soil from the ground is granular and unforgiving, but add the right amount of water, and it becomes soft, moldable, and able to take shape. ｜ 就拿陶艺品来说，泥土本来松散，但加入适量的水后就变得柔软湿润，得以塑形…
- Over drinks, they swore an oath. The blue oni would play the role of evil oni to help the crimson oni integrate into human society. But the blue oni's leader gave two conditions. ｜ 他们饮酒立誓，青鬼将会扮演恶鬼的角色，帮助赤鬼融入人类社会，但青鬼的首领也提出了两个条件。

- Now that I've been acknowledged by the relic, I shall do whatever I wish. ｜ 现在圣物已经认可了我，那本公主可是想做什么就做什么了。
