- Once, there were more Fontainian ships in the harbor. I don't know when it started, but at some point, there were more foreign ships instead. ｜ 之前柔灯港港口里的船，还是枫丹的船最多…但不知道从什么时候起，柔灯港里的船，就是外国的船更多啦。
- Explore the domain ｜ 探索秘境
- Strange giant bubbles known as Dew Bubbles will sometimes appear. After bursting, they will release ripples that will cause reactions in many objects, such as the Harmonious Reed Pipes. ｜ 有时会出现奇异的被称为「清露泡沫」的巨大泡泡。这些泡泡在破裂后会放出波纹，似乎有不少物件会对这种波纹做出反应，比如谐律簧管。
- I... need to get better. ｜ 我…还不够。
- Load the ship ｜ 把重物搬上船
- Plain ｜ 朴素
- What is it? ｜ 怎么？

- The true mastermind is too rich and too powerful for me. I've accepted that I will never be able to avenge my mother alone. ｜ 那人有太多的权和钱了，我深知自己一个人已经无法完成复仇。
- What? It actually worked for him? ｜ 什么？他真的成功了？

- There should be a Fatui spy nearby, right? She apparently just started working at the Royal Hot Springs. Let's go ask around. ｜ 这附近应该有一个愚人众间谍吧？听说她刚到御温泉工作，我们先去打听一下吧。
- We'll be in Fontaine for a while, so I look forward to seeing you again when you're done with whatever you're doing. ｜ 我们还会在枫丹停留一段时间，期待你们忙完手头的事，再来玩的那天。

- "Feather-Light Praise" ｜ 「轻羽的礼赞」
- Hehe, aw, don't worry, kid! I'm sure you'll be growing a couple of tails of your own in no time! ｜ 嘿嘿，小妹妹你别着急，我觉得你也很快就能长出两条尾巴来的！

- Ahh, that's right! They are just little darlings, aren't they? Harut and Marut... ｜ 啊对的，小哈鲁特和小玛鲁特，真是可爱。

- (He seems to have been fleeing from something, no doubt suspecting that something terrible was afoot.) ｜ （他拼命地想要逃离什么，多半是预感到有大事将要发生了。）
- What kinds of tea are there? ｜ 都有什么茶？
- Heh, that's what sets us professionals apart from the amateurs. ｜ 哼，跟业余爱好者不一样，我可是专业的。
- What do you say? Is this arrangement acceptable? ｜ 不知两位意下如何？
- Is it my turn yet? ｜ 换我了哦？

- Inspiration's also close at hand, so I believe that the rest of this book will be a cinch! ｜ 还能随时找到灵感，把新书顺顺利利写下去！
- Oh! Looks like Cyno caught someone! ｜ 哇！真的抓到了！

- He's been in Sumeru for a really long time and has adopted the local way of life. He's also very low-key in everything he does. ｜ 他来须弥很久了，早就融入了我们本地的环境，做事很低调。
- A small desktop clock, whose former owner was a scholar sat in a windowless room buried in books. This was probably the only reference they had to the time of day. ｜ 适合放在桌面上的小钟，对久不见天日的学者来说是唯一的时间参考吧。
- Good Morning ｜ 早上好…
- Quite a few books. ｜ 书不少。
- So if you're interested, Traveler, take these potions with you and go investigate the Domain. I'll mark its location on your <color=#00E1FFFF>map</color>. ｜ 旅行者，如果你有兴趣的话，就带着这些药剂，去那处秘境里看看吧，我等会把秘境的位置标在你的<color=#00E1FFFF>地图</color>上。
- Careful, folks, we've got company! ｜ 大家小心点，有人来找我们的麻烦了！
- Still, twenty years is still a long time. Long enough that the people involved from the beginning no longer remember nor care. ｜ 二十年还是太久了，久到当初的事情已经无人记得、也无人在意了。
- For every point of the entire party's combined maximum Energy capacity, the Elemental Burst DMG of the character equipping this weapon is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>0.12%</color>. A maximum of <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color> increased Elemental Burst DMG can be achieved this way. ｜ 队伍中所有角色的元素能量上限的总和，每1点能使装备此武器的角色的元素爆发造成的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>0.12%</color>，通过这种方式，元素爆发造成的伤害至多提高<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>。
- Rex Incognito (I) ｜ 帝君尘游记·一
- I do not understand. ｜ 无法理解。
- That's true. We don't know if we'll be able to obtain the Twin-Horned Chaplet yet, never mind extinguish the Sign of Apaosha... So she's worried that she's falling behind Mihir? ｜ 连「双角的花冠」能不能顺利拿到都不知道，就更别提熄灭「焚真之天象」了…所以斯露莎是担心自己和米希尔相比落后了？
- Not in a million years! ｜ 我不要！
- The divesuits were just left by the house... Almost like they were prepared for us. ｜ 这些潜水服，就放在那间屋子旁边，简直就像是专门为我们准备的。

- Hopefully not at a detriment to your own health, though? ｜ 对你没什么影响吧？
- Left-Side Table File Box ｜ 左边桌上的卷宗箱
- So apparently, some detectives in Fontaine manage to solve cases without ever setting foot outside their homes. They call them "armchair detectives"... ｜ 听说枫丹廷有足不出户就能解明真相的侦探。
- Next to you is... Ah, it's the Death After Noon that I ordered! Yes! Did you bring this to my table? Thanks, Noelle! ｜ 旁边的…这不是我点的「午后之死」吗？是你送来的吧，谢啦，诺艾尔！
- When will we finally be able to go into the city...? ｜ 到底什么时候才能进城呢…
- Azure Crane ｜ 蓝翎鹭
- But at least the kingdom has been saved, so now I have more time to contemplate these questions. ｜ 但是，至少王国已经得到了拯救。我有了更多的时间来思考这个问题。
- We often use these materials for thaumaturgy during exorcisms — I never knew they could be used to purify one's own spirit, too. ｜ 驱邪的术法也常常用到这些材料，没想到还能用于提升自己的灵气。
- Omen of Thunderstorm ｜ 降雷的凶兆
- Don't worry. I will handle them properly. ｜ 没关系的，没关系的…我会对一切做出应有的处置…
- "Going forward, Kshahrewar will be the only Darshan dedicated to the study of mechanisms"... Hmph, if you ask me, the Kshahrewar scholars have gotten way ahead of themselves. When I was cracking puzzles all over Sumeru, they were still playing with rudimentary building blocks. ｜ 「刹诃伐罗学院是未来唯一有能力研究机关的学院」…哼，现如今，妙论派的宣言也未免太过自大了，我在须弥解谜的时候，他们还不知道在哪玩积木呢。
- These are for you. They're all home-grown. Hope you like them. ｜ 这些送给你，都是我亲手种的，希望你喜欢。
- Greater Lord Rukkhadevata returned to Sarva, and Marana's rampage through the earth began. Once the forest recovered its vitality, the Aranara hid the real Vanarana in a dream to protect themselves. ｜ 树王归还了沙恒，无留陀开始在地上肆虐。而丛林终于恢复生机后，兰那罗为了保护自己，将真正的桓那兰那藏在了梦中。
- (On that day, we lost consciousness in battle... When we woke up, we found ourselves in Gandharva Ville, and Tighnari and Collei were looking after us.) ｜ （那一天，我们在战斗中失去了意识…醒来之后发现自己身处化城郭，提纳里和柯莱负责照看我们。）
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Guess you've got no choice... ｜ 这也没办法…
- Level 3 Lumidouce Case Duration|{param2:F1}s ｜ 柔灯之匣·三阶持续时间|{param2:F1}秒
- Thundering Shield ｜ 霆雷之护
- He said that he enjoys growing flowers and the thing that troubles him most is finding the right soil. ｜ 他说自己经常养花，最烦恼的事就是寻找合适的花土。
- Be that as it may, it is naught but lingering on in agony. This is precisely what I did not understand about humans. ｜ 即便是这样也要苟延残喘地活下去，这正是我当初无法理解人类的地方。
- Sorry, I didn't control my strength back then... ｜ 抱歉、刚才没收住手…
- About Gaming: This Day and Age ｜ 关于嘉明自己·今时今日
- Eh? So you knew this whole time, but didn't tell Paimon? ｜ 欸？其实你早就想好了办法，却不告诉派蒙吗！
- Flat stomach, stomach, so hot... ｜ 肚子扁扁，肚子，热热…
- *coughing* Ah, Paimon accidentally choked on some water again while riding the Koholasaur... ｜ 咳咳…骑着鳍游龙进入水流的时候，我又呛了一口…
- Primo Geovishaps Defeated: #1#/%1% ｜ 击败古岩龙蜥：#1#/%1%
- That bridge over there seems way too high up. Will it really be okay... ｜ 那边的桥看起来好高啊，真的没问题吗…
- If I remember correctly, there are two knights stationed by the gates. They should be quite knowledgeable of Mondstadt and could give me some good recommendations! ｜ 我记得城门旁边就有两个骑士在站岗，他们应该很在行，可以给我很好的建议！
- Message Board of Puspa Café ｜ 普斯帕咖啡馆留言板
- Thank you, I—I'll leave it to you, then, I guess. ｜ 嗯，太麻烦你了。
- Go to Angel's Share's stall ｜ 前往「天使的馈赠」摊位
- The wandering tribes in the desert have no unified law, nor written rules.\nThe only things that can restrain them are what has been rooted in their blood and habits. ｜ 沙漠中流浪的氏族并无统一的法度，也没有成文的规则…\n能约束他们的只有根植于血脉与习惯的成规。
- When I'm not on a delivery run, I do wushou dancing on the streets of Liyue Harbor. Do you think you could come along and watch sometime to support me? No, no, it's completely free. As long as people are entertained, I'm a happy guy. ｜ 不用运货的时候我一般在璃月港路边表演舞兽戏，赏个脸来看看？不要钱的不要钱的，只要街坊朋友看得开心我就很满足啦。
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Delicious Golden Crab ｜ 美味的黄金蟹
- Hey, isn't this the place we passed by looking for Mihir? Though, Mihir shouldn't be here right now, right? ｜ 哈，这不是之前来找米希尔时经过的地方么。不过米希尔现在应该不在这里吧？
- Cannot guess the ending. ｜ 结尾，猜不到。
- Should you say that it was... fortunate that Royce ate that first? ｜ 该说…好在是先让罗伊斯吃掉了吗？
- Mmm. ｜ 嗯。
- See you. ｜ 再见。
- *yawn* ｜ 呵——欠——
- A witness from our tribe claims they saw one of the Qucusaurs that dwell nearby carrying that statue off from the ruins... We're here to find out what the situation is. ｜ 有部族的成员目击，说是供奉在遗迹中的雕像被附近栖居的绒翼龙偷走了…所以我们就过来看看情况。
- Huh? ｜ 欸？
- Ah, you got here sooner than I expected. ｜ 嗯，是你们。你们来得比我想象中要快。
- Let me check... Yep! Thanks! ｜ 我看看…没错，太感谢了！
- A wandering samurai from Inazuma who is currently with Liyue's Crux Fleet. A gentle and carefree soul whose heart hides a great many burdens from the past. ｜ 来自稻妻的浪人武士，如今栖身于璃月船队「南十字」中。性情温和而洒脱，心中埋藏着许多往事。
- A little bit of sugar and a good view really go a long way for relaxation. ｜ 糖分和风景都能让人放松下来呢。
- What's your plan next? ｜ 接下来有何打算？
- "Today in the mountains I ran into a child I have admired for a long time. But alas, I could not approach her, my heart filled with anxiety and unease." ｜ 「今日在山野之间遇到了倾慕已久的孩子。望之而不可即，使我忧心如焚，寝食难安。」
- A fragrant flower that will bloom for all eternity and never wither. ｜ 永远娇嫩的鲜花，历经长久时光仍不枯萎地散发着芬芳。
- I've thought about this a lot of times in the past, but it's taken me this long to finally pluck up the courage to perform for you at such close distance. ｜ 我思考过很多次，现在是鼓起勇气，才敢在那么近的地方表演给你看的。
- Not by brute force, that's for sure. But that's not a problem. The terrain here gives us an advantage, and we haven't given away our position so far. ｜ 直接突破恐怕很难。不过没关系，此处地形对我们有利，而且我们的位置没有暴露。
- Decimate ｜ 摧坚
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- Tiara of Thunder ｜ 祭雷礼冠
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:P}
- A flower that blooms even amidst ferocious thunder and lightning. To this day, it still grants courage to travelers in thunderstorms. ｜ 仅于雷霆之怒中傲然盛放的花朵，至今仍能赐予行走在雷雨中的游人勇气。
- Xinyan was someone who never fit in in Liyue Harbor, and she only found where she belonged when she encountered rock 'n' roll.\nBut because she lived in a land that had no place for rock 'n' roll yet, she needed to be able to attract enough attention.\nShe immersed herself in the world of music, looking for a way to move people's hearts. She broke many an instrument and played till calluses formed on both hands, but still, it was unsatisfactory.\n"Who'd want to listen to this racket?"\nThe rotten-tomato reviews she received were starting to get to her. She wondered if she should quit.\nSitting on top of Mt. Tianheng, she looked down over Liyue Harbor. But though the lights lit the streets and alleys of the harbor, they could not light the flame of the spirit of rock 'n' roll.\nShe considered leaving, to go someplace where rock 'n' roll was appreciated. But would this not be running away? Would it not be a betrayal of rock 'n' roll's spirit of resistance?\nNo, she would not leave. She would become a "flame" that could light Liyue Harbor up.\nShe started experimenting with the use of fire to move people, adding sparks and explosions to her music.\nBut this was no mean feat for an ordinary person.\nWho knows how many times she must have burnt her fingers or blown her instrument up. But still, she continued to practice every single day on top of Mt. Tianheng.\nAnd perhaps it was that the gods themselves had great expectations of this new form of music that would soon grace the seven nations...\nBut regardless, the boiling-hot Vision would be the final stroke of perfection.\nXinyan dashed down the mountain and began her very first rock 'n' roll concert in Liyue Harbor.\nThus did her musical journey begin, with showers of sparks and explosions keeping time. ｜ 辛焱是个与璃月港格格不入的人，直到她邂逅「摇滚」的那一天，她才找到了真正的归宿。\n但她所生存的地方没有摇滚的土壤，想让这里的人接受她的音乐，必须足够引人注目。\n她沉醉于音乐的世界，寻找可以震撼人心的方法，她弹坏了很多把乐器，双手都磨出了茧，结果还是不尽如人意。\n「这么吵的东西，谁爱听啊。」\n屡屡遭到这等恶评，让辛焱产生了放弃的念头。\n她坐在天衡山上，俯瞰夜晚的璃月港。火光虽然点亮了街道，却点不亮她眼中这座商业都市的「摇滚魂」。\n她也想过远走高飞，去一个懂得欣赏摇滚的地方。但在她看来这是一种逃避，与摇滚天生的反抗精神背道而驰。\n——她不仅要留下来，还要成为真正能照亮璃月港的「火」。\n她开始尝试用火焰去震撼人心，往音乐中加入火花与爆炸。\n可对普通人来说，要控制火焰谈何容易？\n训练的时候，她不知道多少次烫伤了手指，炸飞了乐器。但她仍然坚持在天衡山上练习，每天如此。\n或许是神灵也很期待，某种全新的音乐形式席卷尘世七国吧…\n滚烫火热的「神之眼」，成为了画龙点睛的最后一笔。\n辛焱跑下山去，在璃月港举行了她的第一次摇滚音乐会。\n火花与爆炸为她打着节拍，她的音乐之路，由此开始。
- Perfect! I know how the story goes from here! I'll pair this with the accidental encounter with the strongest opponent from before! I have to remember it for now... ｜ 好耶，我知道这个地方该怎么写了！配合前期就碰上最强对手的意外，一定很有看点！先牢牢地记在脑袋里吧…
- So when I passed by and saw a tournament taking place, I... I made a bet too. I mean, who cares if you've got a "defending Tepetlisaurus champion" or a "Qucusaurus, the decade's strongest rookie"... ｜ 于是路过这里的时候，看到比赛，我、我也下注了，什么卫冕冠军嵴锋龙，什么十年来最强新秀绒翼龙…
- Monster Mayhem ｜ 魔物引起的混乱
- Every 1,000 points of Nilou's Max HP above 30,000 will cause the DMG dealt by Bountiful Cores created by characters affected by Golden Chalice's Bounty to increase by 9%.\nThe maximum increase in Bountiful Core DMG that can be achieved this way is 400%. ｜ 基于妮露生命值上限超过30000的部分，每1000点生命值上限将使处于「金杯的丰馈」状态下的角色触发的丰穰之核造成的伤害提升9%。\n通过这种方式至多使丰穰之核造成的伤害提升400%。
- "Persuade" him, Navia! ｜ 娜维娅，你来「说服」他！
- Is there anything I can help you with? ｜ 你们找我有什么事吗？
- Character Ascension material.\n"Welcome to this world." ｜ 角色突破素材。\n「欢迎来到世界。」
- Sneku ｜ 斯内库

- Halcyon Years Unending ｜ 不凋的盛年
- Are we not taking the boat this time? ｜ 我们不坐船吗？

- This place is a mess... The flower box is gone. Let's go to the next spot. ｜ 这里简直就是一团糟嘛…盒子和花也不见了，我们去下一个地方看看吧。
- Yep. ｜ 没错。
- Yeah, just stop plotting all this bad stuff! Why are you so obsessed with these paints, anyway? Are they really worth you resorting to such despicable actions...? ｜ 是呀，不要再打什么坏主意了！说到底，到底为什么对这些颜料这么执着呀？还不惜做出这种坏事…
- He initiated a fell ritual that aimed to restore the shattered "Symphony" and revive the ruined realm. To this end, he did not hesitate to dissolve the will of our kin and plunder the souls of Fontainians everywhere. ｜ 他施行邪恶的仪式，试图修复破碎的「乐章」，重建灭亡的国家。为达目的，不惜溶解同族的意志，四处掠夺枫丹人的灵魂。
- Still, I only knew that there was someone in the bushes. At first, I thought Scrooge had laid an ambush for me. I never thought that it would be you. ｜ 不过，我也只是知道「旁边的草丛里藏着某人」，一开始我还以为是斯格鲁奇这家伙在那埋伏了他的手下，没想到居然是您在那。
- Uh-oh, looks like the trail's already run cold. ｜ 怎么办，这样的话好像线索已经断了。
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P}×2 ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}*2

- You're done, then? ｜ 你已经收拾好了吗？

- ...The Fravashi Trees are no doors. You'll disturb the residual Pari residing within if you simply barge through them. ｜ …这些「灵谷木」可不是什么门扉，若是冒冒失失地穿过去的话，可是会打扰到寄宿在其中的残灵的。
- A wooden marker sign, placed here by Lamiya, indicating that she has placed some animals around the site. Use the Inscribed Mirror to find the animals she left in the area. ｜ 拉米雅竖立在此处的木牌，说明她将几只实验用的小动物放在了周围。使用「铭随流镜」，找到她放置在周围的那些动物吧。
- Well, here's the Jademouth. But how are we gonna find all that jade underwater? ｜ 这下到宝玦口啦，不过要怎么找到水底的玉石呢…
- Grants <color=#FFFFFFFF>1 $[K6] point</color> to your active character. (Can stack. Max 2 points.) ｜ 为我方出战角色提供<color=#FFFFFFFF>1点$[K6]</color>。（可叠加，最多叠加到2点）

- Uh... Thanks, but no thanks. I've got my own way of naming them and I'm gonna stick with it. It's simple, straightforward. It helps me with managing them. ｜ 多此一…多谢了。我有自己习惯的起名方式，重要的是简单直观，便于指挥。
- Nine stone pillars stand stoic near Cuijue Slope. They seem to hide a certain secret... ｜ 在翠玦坡附近，有九根巨大的石柱巍然耸立，似乎隐藏着什么秘密…
- The Nilotpala Cup qualifiers have started. Time to fight alongside Bongo-Head against other beast tamers! ｜ 「月莲杯驯兽师大赛」的预赛开始了，是时候和「咚咚小圆帽」并肩作战，对阵其他的驯兽师了！
- But, what about the you from right now? You're just gonna die? ｜ 那现在的你要怎么办呢，姐姐的人生就这么结束了吗？
- A staple dish with many ingredients. Insufficient heat and all-too-abundant moisture have left the taste lackluster, lacking the smoky flavor it should have. Better luck next time, preferably while frying on higher heat... ｜ 用料丰富的主食。因火候不到且水分过多，导致口感糜烂，根本感受不到应有的烟火气息。或许下次，应该试试用更大的火力炒制…
- So, in the end, The Captain still hasn't told us his real goal. ｜ 结果到最后，「队长」还是没说他的目的到底是什么。

- Well, we're here, aren't we? ｜ 就在你眼前…

- To be frank, things don't look good. We already have our hands full dealing with the meteorites' aftermath. But we also need to guard against monsters and the Treasure Hoarders... ｜ 老实说…不太乐观，除了要处理陨石相关的诸多事宜外，还要提防魔物和盗宝团…

- Yes. Water is a blessing from the Three Gods, so the water supply station is also a temple. Is that so weird? ｜ 嗯，水是三神的恩赐，所以供水站也是神殿。很奇怪吗？

- It's essentially a convenient and harmless vestibule for knowledge. Unfortunately, it's illegal in Sumeru to privately possess or trade them. ｜ 基本上来说，它是个方便又无害的知识库，不过很遗憾，私自持有和交易这东西，在须弥都是违法的。

- Hehehe, I bet the crops back in the orchard are loving this weather! Guess the saurians won't have to water them today. ｜ 嘿嘿嘿，果园里的作物应该很开心，龙龙们今天也可以不用忙着浇水了。

- A mild and luscious dish. The shrimp are quickly sautéed and the sauce thickened. This method of cooking is exceedingly simple and brings out the wonderful natural flavor of the shrimp meat, granting it a place in humble home-cooked dinners and lavish banquets alike. ｜ 清淡润口的菜肴。将虾仁上浆后快速炒熟勾薄芡。极其简单的调味方式，为的是衬托虾肉本身的鲜美。从家常小菜到宴请宾客，都有它的一席之地。

- {SPRITE_PRESET#2107}{SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Bloom</color>: DMG +1 for this instance, creates a [<color=#FFFFFFFF>Dendro Core</color>] that grants +2 DMG to the next instance of Pyro or Electro DMG\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2107}{SPRITE_PRESET#2103}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Burning</color>: DMG +1 for this instance, creates a [<color=#FFFFFFFF>Burning Flame</color>] that will deal 1 Pyro DMG at the end of the Round (Takes effect once, max 2 stacks)\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2107}{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Quicken</color>: DMG +1 for this instance, creates a [<color=#FFFFFFFF>Catalyzing Field</color>] that grants +1 DMG to the next 2 instances of Dendro or Electro DMG ｜ {SPRITE_PRESET#2107}{SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#FFFFFFFF>绽放</color>：本伤害+1，生成使下次火元素或雷元素伤害+2的[<color=#FFFFFFFF>草原核</color>]\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2107}{SPRITE_PRESET#2103}<color=#FFFFFFFF>燃烧</color>：本伤害+1，生成回合结束时造成1点火元素伤害的[<color=#FFFFFFFF>燃烧烈焰</color>]（可用次数1，最多叠加到2）\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2107}{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}<color=#FFFFFFFF>原激化</color>：本伤害+1，生成使下2次草元素或雷元素伤害+1的[<color=#FFFFFFFF>激化领域</color>]

- I favor blue and black. ｜ 黑色和蓝色我都很喜欢。
- Oh my, if it isn't an old friend. Did you come all this way just to see me? ｜ 欸~这不是我的老朋友嘛，难道是专程来看我的？
- Why would the Dodo-King not want to see you, Klee? ｜ 为什么呢？

- Let's play Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 进行「七圣召唤」的对局吧。
- Regular examinations... ｜ 要定期体检。
- Oh! I was lost in thought! What a jump scare you are! ｜ 哎哟！我正想事情呢，你这一出现，吓我一跳。
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- The Fatui's numbers are thinning! ｜ 登上群玉阁的「愚人众」，正在减少！
- It doesn't matter. I'm not tired. ｜ 没关系，我不累。
- We saved you? Did we do that? ｜ 恩人…？我们做过什么好事吗？
- Everyone... goes... home. Not just... us. ｜ 只有。我们。回家。不行。
- Sacred Simulacrum ｜ 仙像

- The Mysterious Control Unit... ｜ 神秘的控制装置…
- Good. Here I go, then. ｜ 很好，请赐教。

- Amazing! The second stage couldn't even slow you! ｜ 了不起！这第二关根本拦不住你！
- That night, I cried miserably. To this day, I still remember how sad I felt. I don't want Klee to feel the same way. ｜ 那天晚上我哭得非常伤心，直到今天，我还能记得那时候我有多难过，我不想让可莉也感受到这些。
- Complete the challenge by dispersing the Electro fog ｜ 完成驱散雷雾挑战
- I didn't know that you thought so much about these things. No wonder you wrote a novel like "Onibudou." ｜ 没想到，你这家伙还想得挺多的嘛，不愧是写出《鬼武道》的作家啊。
- You're back. Did you find anything special in the desert? ｜ 二位回来了，在沙漠中有什么收获？

- Why do these birds want the carving tools so badly? Paimon doesn't get it... Anyway, let's put them away! ｜ 这些鸟儿为什么要抢雕刻工具呢？搞不懂了…还是先收起来吧！
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- The bizarre crystals within The Chasm have many names, one of which is "Wishstone."\nSome superstitious miners believe that through certain strange methods, they can help make otherwise impossible wishes come true. ｜ 层岩巨渊地下的怪异晶石有许多名字，其中之一是「愿望石」。\n在一些迷信的矿工当中有传说，认为它能够以奇怪的方式，实现某人求而不得的愿望。

- (What in the world happened to her?) ｜ （究竟发生了什么…）

- Obtain Taliesin's gift. ｜ 获得塔列辛的赠礼。
- There seems to be a crestfallen person near the Flower-Feather Clan... ｜ 在花羽会附近，似乎有位失意的人…
- That's how this place became Lovi's secret clockwork research base. As for me... Well, I'm her assistant. ｜ 所以，这里就成了洛薇研究发条机械的秘密基地啦，而我嘛…就是她的助手。
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- Well, I shall look forward to seeing you again next time. I just hope I'll still be able to recognize you. ｜ 那，期待下次再见，希望我还能认出你来。
- Placeholder ｜ 预留
- Hey! Not so loud... ｜ 喂！嘘…
- Did you think of something? ｜ 想到了吗？
- Eh? No more mushrooms!? That means no more Chicken-Mushroom Skewer! ｜ 欸？没有蘑菇的话，连野菇鸡肉串也做不了了！
- Vision ｜ 神之眼
- Thank you, Paimon! ｜ 谢谢派蒙！
- Records of Gurabad: Part III ｜ 居尔城记事·其三
- Heart of Frost ｜ 凛冬霜心
- The language I spoke was hidden in the music. You won't notice it, but it'll find its way into your heart... and expand your mind. ｜ 刚才我说的那种语言就藏在我的乐曲中。你们看不到它，但它会进入你们的心中…引发你们的思考。
- (...Oh? How interesting. Those two managed to deduce quite a lot through guesswork alone.) ｜ （…哦？真有意思呢，这两位先生仅凭猜想，就能推理出不少强有力的信息。）
- The ancients had a saying, "He who has not known poverty has yet to become a true man." I might only have this hut and my book collection to my name, but I'm optimistic that my time will come again sooner or later. ｜ 古人云「未曾清贫难成人」，虽然现在只有一屋子藏书陪着我，但属于我的机会肯定会再出现的。
- The musician sat before their organ, a grand instrument that had played during countless balls, and which was powerful enough to send its music through to every last corner of the palace. ｜ 乐师坐在了管风琴前，这台管风琴曾经为无数场舞会奏乐，它足够强大，能将音符送到王宫的每一个角落。
- A crude wooden vessel filled only with memories. ｜ 木制的粗糙容器，其中空洞洞地盛满了回忆。
- The Special Patrol did some digging into Imitation Sinthe. Our records indicate that it's very difficult for ordinary people to detect traces left behind by this stuff. I'm sure that was the case for Pierre as well. ｜ 特巡队的资料里有提过，常人很难察觉「仿制乐斯」留下的痕迹，这对皮埃尔来说也是一样的。
- If Paimon becomes a seed, Aranakula will take good care of her, water her properly, and put her in a sunny place and loosen the soil for her. ｜ 如果派蒙变成种子，兰那库拉会好好照顾派蒙，给派蒙浇水，还会让派蒙住在有阳光的地方，给派蒙松土。
- Have you found that sword of yours? ｜ 你找到那把剑了吗？
- Plunge DMG|{param7:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param7:F1P}
- Surely, the entire population of Fontaine didn't convene and pick this one day to come and return my clothes. What is going on? ｜ 不可能所有人都挑着今天来我店里退货吧？到底发生了什么事？
- Score a total of {param0} points across all floors in this trial ｜ 当前试验所有阶层挑战分数合计达到{param0}
- An exquisite gift offered by Haniyyah. It contains Marvelous Jellies much loved by the Fungi, and the Jellies themselves come in many unique flavors that can be fed to the Fungi based on their individual preferences.\nThe Marvelous Jellies are a refined version of the Floral Jellies that preceded them and retain their crystalline translucence and springy texture, sans the dangerous ingredients, thus making them the ideal feed for Fungi. That said, one should probably take care that the children don't eat it by mistake when storing it at home... ｜ 海妮耶赠送的精巧礼盒，其中装有蕈兽们喜爱的「妙妙琼脂」，琼脂被分成了多种独特的口味，可以根据蕈兽个体的喜好来投喂。\n「妙妙琼脂」基于此前的「花花琼脂」改进而来，保留了晶莹剔透、富有弹性的质感，去除了所有危险的成分，是喂养蕈兽的理想载体。只不过…存放在家中时，还需格外小心，防止它们被贪吃的孩子误食？
- Hehe, my current job also comes with lots of free time, and no one's keeping an eye on me... ｜ 嘿嘿，而且干这个活，在工作时有很多空闲时间，而且也没人一直盯着我…
- Alpha Pose ｜ 叉腰

### Part 025

- Whoa... Did it just... Did it jump into the crater? ｜ 哇…它是…跳进火山口里了吗？
- A tea pastry containing egg yolk. The salted yolk is first steamed, then stuffed and wrapped in tea powder-infused dough. It's then kneaded into the shape of a full moon before being baked. This results in a crispy, flaky exterior with a salty and sweet interior, the different layers forming a delicious and addictive delicacy. ｜ 内藏蛋黄的茶酥。先蒸熟咸蛋黄，裹上馅儿，再包上加入了茶粉的面皮，揉成圆月般的形状，烤熟。外皮酥酥脆脆，内馅咸甜可口，层次丰富惹人迷恋。
- "So swiftly now, stop and rest. Hurry not, do not press"... Oh, it's you. Is there something I can help you with? ｜ 「快些停步休憩，勿要匆匆前行」…哎呀，你来了。今天有什么事情吗？
- ... ｜ ……
- When it comes to burglars, they are generally associated with prying or rummaging through things. What Venti means is that he did not hear anything unusual like that. ｜ 提起窃贼，一般都会联想到「撬开门锁」或者「东翻西找」吧，刚才温迪的意思是，他没有听到这种明显不自然的声音。
- Flamestrider Normal Attack 2-Hit DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 驰轮车普通攻击二段伤害|{param5:F1P}
- Party members other than the equipping character will provide the equipping character with buffs based on whether their Elemental Type is the same as the latter or not. If their Elemental Types are the same, increase Elemental Mastery by <color=#99FFFFFF>64</color>. If not, increase the equipping character's DMG Bonus from their Elemental Type by <color=#99FFFFFF>26%</color>. The aforementioned effects can have 3 stacks. Additionally, all nearby party members other than the equipping character will have their Elemental Mastery increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>48</color>. Multiple such effects from multiple such weapons can stack. ｜ 队伍中每个其他角色，都会依据元素类型与装备者相同与否，为装备者提供提升效果。相同：元素精通提升<color=#99FFFFFF>64</color>点；不同：装备者元素类型的元素伤害加成提升<color=#99FFFFFF>26%</color>。上述提升效果每种至多叠加3层。此外，队伍中装备者以外的附近角色的元素精通提升<color=#99FFFFFF>48</color>点，多件同名武器产生的此效果可以叠加。
- Confuzzled Tubbers ｜ 迷糊圆圆
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- Be careful. These mechanical life forms are up to no good. It'd be best if you stayed far, far away from them! ｜ 你们也小心点。这种机械生物都不是什么好东西，越早离开它越好！
- Ride your Saurian as far as you can along the designated course within the time limit. I'll help you keep score. The results are divided into 4 grades, and we'll count this as your win if you can beat the second-highest tier. ｜ 在限定时间内，尽全力沿固定赛道驭龙飞行，我会帮你计分，飞行成绩按得分高低分四档，只要超过第二高的分档就算你赢了我。
- ...Or else my novel will never get written! ｜ 不然的话，小说始终没办法写啊！
- Yoimiya's fireworks! ｜ 宵宫的烟花！
- Films are different from the real world. They are a form of art and represent the wishes in people's hearts. ｜ 映影和现实不同，它是艺术，是人们内心的向往。
- Well, when you like what you do, it's not work at all! ｜ 怎么会，我乐在其中。
- We value your opinion, Xiao. ｜ 魈的意见很重要。
- The Chasm is a dangerous place for ordinary people. Plants and fungi growing here could also be harmful to the human body. That's why Huishan Hall has set strict rules against eating these things. ｜ 层岩巨渊下面的环境对于普通人来说很是凶险，生长的菌类和植物说不定也对人有害，所以辉山厅是严禁矿工进食那些东西的。
- Varesa ｜ 瓦雷莎
- You look tired, do you need to take a rest? ｜ 你看上去有点累，要不要先休息一会儿呢？
- *sigh* What you're seeing now is the Central Laboratory of the Fontaine Research Institute... Or should I say, what was once the Central Laboratory. ｜ 唉，二位现在所见的，是枫丹科学院的「中央实验室」…曾经的「中央实验室」。
- Oh, Master Jean! So glad we found you. ｜ 呀，琴团长！太好了，找到你啦！
- I'm worried. She's not a fighter, and I can't leave to check on her. I want her to stay out of this, so if you see her, can you please tell her to take shelter? ｜ 她不擅长战斗，我很担心她，可惜现在我也没办法离开，能不能麻烦你们看到她的话，让她不要到处乱跑了，快去避难。
- I understand, you need evidence of the Tenryou Commission's betrayal. Let me think... ｜ 情况我已经了解了，总之是要找到天领奉行叛变的证据，让我想想…
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Flying Hatter's Trick ｜ 飞帽匠戏法
- Eh, you know what, forget about it... Thanks for your help. Here's your payment. ｜ 算了，不说这些闲话了，总之这次多谢你们了，这些报酬还请收下吧。
- Gain 1 stack of Canopy's Favor after hitting an opponent with an Elemental Skill. This can be triggered once every 0.5s. After a nearby party member triggers a Burning or Burgeon reaction, the equipping character will gain 3 stacks. This effect can be triggered once every 2s and can be triggered even when the triggering party member is off-field. Canopy's Favor: Elemental Skill and Burst DMG is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color> for 6s. Max 6 stacks. Each stack is counted independently. ｜ 元素战技命中敌人后，会获得1层「悬木祝赐」，该效果每0.5秒至多触发1次；队伍中附近的角色触发了燃烧或烈绽放反应后，装备者会获得3层悬木祝赐，该效果每2秒至多触发1次，队伍中的角色处于队伍后台时也能触发。悬木祝赐：元素战技伤害和元素爆发伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>，持续6秒，至多叠加6层，每层持续时间独立计算。
- This is our prop manager, Veronique. She'll be in charge of all the film's props and items. ｜ 这是我们团队的道具师，薇若妮卡。她将负责映影拍摄时所用到的道具。
- Gang Bylaws, Article 2: No bullying of small children. ｜ 「派中法度」第二条：不得与小孩子争抢。
- Yes. ｜ 找到了。
- Miitoboru ｜ 「大肉丸」
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Humanity's best friend!\nLegend has it that the Inazuma Shogun once greatly adored this canine breed, and they spread across the once-booming trade routes to become one of the most well-loved pets in the seven nations. Gentle, loyal, and intelligent, they are especially good at guard duty and being companions. Some say that there are still mysterious ninjas in Inazuma who train these dogs to become "ninja dogs." ｜ 人类最好的朋友！\n传说是稻妻的将军曾经宠爱的犬类，随着一度兴盛的商业航道而走遍提瓦特七国，成为了提瓦特大陆上最受欢迎的宠物犬之一。脾气温柔忠厚，头脑聪明，尤其擅长看家护院与陪伴家人。传说在稻妻依然生活着将这种犬类训练成「忍犬」的神秘忍者。
- Where will your journey take you, Traveler? ｜ 旅行者，你将去往何方？
- Perennial Illumination ｜ 「依常之光」
- Have you seen our weapons anywhere, sir? ｜ 看守先生，您来的时候看到我们的武器了吗？
- Surely a little bit of Anemo power will be all it takes to clear these leaves. ｜ 这堆落叶，用「风」就能轻松扫除掉吧。
- About the flood... ｜ 关于之前的水灾…
- But it's nothing for you to worry about. If Chang the Ninth won't sell, I can buy from someone else. ｜ 不过这不需要您担心，就算那个常九爷不卖，我从其他人手上买就行了。

- Rank 1st place in Fish-Off Mode ｜ 在竞技模式中获得第1名
- Hmm, most of them look like works in progress... ｜ 唔，感觉大多数都只写了一半呢…
- Sigh... To think that after a thousand years of heritage, the Guhua Clan's head doorkeeper must cheat others to survive... What shall we do, what can be done... ｜ 唉，不想我古华派千年传承，到头来竟落到了门长带头骗吃骗喝的境地…奈何，奈何啊…
- Yoimiya: Friendly ｜ 宵宫·友好
- (Focus on the general surroundings.) ｜ （拍摄周围环境）
- I know it's only one or two, but I don't want to just let them wither away. ｜ 虽然只有这么一两枝，但我也不想让它们就这样白白枯萎。
- That's why you've gotta train hard and become a super strong bake-danuki! ｜ 所以，吉法师要努力修行，变成了不起的大妖狸！
- A Blazegem Inscription... ｜ 「燃晶名刻」…？
- Add water first, then add crushed leaves before mixing them up. ｜ 先加清水，再加碎叶，最后搅拌。
- Legend-Inscribed Woven Scroll ｜ 记载着传说的织卷
- Crimes committed: Absconding, robbery, night-time assaults, conspiring against officials, distributing belongings to innocent villagers to incite rebellion. ｜ 罪名：逐电；劫盗；夜讨；谋害长官；向无辜村民散发财物，企图谋反。
- Always remember that you can rely on your friends. When the going gets tough, don't soldier on alone — just get in touch and I'll be there! Oh — but hopefully it won't come to that, knock on wood! Here's hoping that next time you get in touch, everything's peaches and cream, and you just need a dim sum buddy! ｜ 记住啊，出门靠朋友，有什么困难不要硬顶喔你，需要我帮手随时出声！欸，大吉利是！最好就别听到你有难的消息啦，出门在外，最紧要是平平安安顺顺利利，我更希望听到你约我得闲饮茶咯。
- Hmph, that's what you get for messing with the Hero of Natlan and Granny Itztli! They could give Regrator a run for his Mora! ｜ 哼，有纳塔大英雄和黑曜石奶奶在，就是「富人」亲自来了也一样！

- The loot's on the <color=#00E1FFFF>opposite cliff</color>. We're gonna hang back here and watch the show... ｜ 宝贝就在<color=#00E1FFFF>对面的山崖</color>上，我们就在这儿准备看你的「好戏」…
- Scorchwind Trial: In this Trial, after reaching a certain stage in the battle, the Burning-Aflame Wayob Manifestation will recite an incantation to summon an infernal skyfire that covers the entire field. You can use the remaining Gaseous Phlogiston Current on the field to dodge attacks, and if at this time you <color=#F39000FF>use the power of the Wind Currents to attack the Burning-Aflame Wayob Manifestation</color>, the incantation to summon the skyfire will be interrupted. ｜ 焚风的试炼：在此试炼中，战斗到了一定阶段之后，焚燃·大灵显化身将吟诵召唤覆盖全场的焚燃天火，可以借助场中残留的气态燃素风场躲避攻击，若在此时<color=#F39000FF>借助风场之力冲击焚燃·大灵显化身</color>，亦可打断其召唤天火的吟诵。
- Though the Sangonomiya resistance may seem weak, they are a hundred times stronger still than the cold, unfeeling Shogunate. ｜ 和幕府的军队相比，珊瑚宫的反抗军虽然看起来弱小，但还是比冷漠无情的幕府强上百倍。
- Unfinished Natlan Tribal Chronicles ｜ 尚未完成的纳塔部族纪闻
- Once you've tried my tabletop game "Bing-Bang Finchball", I'm sure you wouldn't hesitate to shout out "Finches are the cutest!" ｜ 如果你们来玩过我这款桌上游戏「哐哐当当雀雀球」，也会像我这样大声告诉别人，团雀最可爱！
- Still, I've heard that not all the Saurians here are friendly. I haven't met any other types of Saurians yet, so I'm looking forward to it. ｜ 不过听说也不是所有的龙都和人类亲近，我还没见过别的呢，有点期待。
- ... ｜ ……
- #Nara {NICKNAME}, Paimon, you've come. Intentional or not, it fills me with great pride. I've always wanted to hang out with Nara friends here. ｜ #那菈{NICKNAME}、派蒙，你们果真来做客了。无论有心无心，于我都是殊荣。我一直很希望能在这里，与那菈朋友一起玩。
- Mortuary Rite DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 冥祭伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Your order from last time is ready. Are you here to collect it, or to place a new order? ｜ 之前的委托已完成。还有吗？
- Ooh, this picture looks great. Lenne should get the inspiration he needs like this! ｜ 嗯，这张画片拍的不错，应该可以作为莱内先生的灵感素材！
- That's great. Could you tell me? ｜ 太好了，能说给我听吗？
- Tahmina ｜ 塔米娜
- My favorite is easily a Satisfying Salad. The best of Mondstadt's natural produce on one plate — highly nutritious, and a low calorie count. No, I never get sick of eating it — it's delicious! I've been eating it for ten years now. ｜ 当然是「满足沙拉」，蒙德的自然水土汇于一盘，营养均衡，热量也不会超标…你问吃不腻吗？当然不会，很好吃的！我已经吃了十年了。
- In the meantime, feel free to take a look around our settlement. It would mean a lot to the elders if you got to know some of our people. ｜ 这段时间如果您有空，可以在部族里转一转。长老们也希望您能多在族人面前露露脸。
- What would that accomplish? And what do the events of ten years ago have to do with you, anyway? Look, you of all people should know that a magician never reveals their secrets — and in any case, dead men don't talk. So if you really care about your magician's pride, then you'll forget about Cesar and move on. ｜ 有必要吗？十年前的事跟你有什么关系？魔术最忌讳的就是刨根问底，你真应该把自己那无用的好奇心收一收。
- Obtained through capture ｜ 捕捉获得
- ...Sheriff Shyam still has some questions for me, so I've got to go. ｜ …夏姆先生还有些问题要问我，我得先告辞了。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- How absurd! Did you not see the plume glowing with holy light on that young boy's back? ｜ 愚昧！汝可曾看到那位少年背后圣耀的翎羽？
- I know how you feel, and I'm very sorry that such an excellent record was destroyed... Look, I'll help you record a new one! No one's stealing anything from you as long as I'm around — I guarantee it! ｜ 我明白您的心情。这么优秀的唱片被毁，我很抱歉。但我愿意和您一起再次制作唱片！有我在，没人能再抢走您的唱片了！
- The plan is too radical and carries a high risk for casualties. I've given it a lot of thought, and in the end, I still can't agree to it. ｜ 做法太激进，很可能造成伤亡。我考虑过…还是无法同意。
- Furnishing Creation Material ｜ 摆设制作材料
- Return to the site of the Test of Courage ｜ 回到试胆大会现场
- A book about the local folklore and ballads of Chenyu Vale. It contains many far-fetched folk legends. ｜ 一部关于沉玉谷本地民俗故事与歌谣的专著，其间记载了许多荒诞不经的民间传说。
- <color=#FFCC33>So we leave it to you.</color> ｜ <color=#FFCC33>星星就交给您吧。</color>
- Fatui Soldier ｜ 愚人众士兵
- Their ancestors seized from us the realms that should have been ours by right, and they must pay the price for that original sin! ｜ 他们的祖先夺走了本应属于我们的国家，他们当然也要为此付出代价，这就是他们的原罪！
- You return to Vimara Village to gather intel based on what you've learned. You question the villagers until, eventually, the sky grows dark... ｜ 你们针对现状，再次向维摩庄的村民们收集了线索，直到天色暗了下来…
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- It seems that Chalmet is still buried under various chores at the Materials Office... ｜ 沙尔梅似乎依然在资料院之中做着各类杂务…
- "If you're trying to get in the Akademiya, then visit this coffee shop often." ｜ 「想考进教令院的话，请务必多多光顾这家咖啡馆。」
- You can't uncover the truth without taking some risks, right? If I hadn't disassembled the Inscription myself, I would have never realized her actual motives. ｜ 不冒点风险，怎么能找到真相呢？如果不是亲手拆解了那枚「中枢名刻」，我也不会意识到婶婶真正想要做的事。
- Wait, I thought I was the one who commissioned you... ｜ 不，我记得好像我才是雇主…
- Echoing Conch ｜ 回声海螺
- Once we determine the route the Snowboars took, the next stage would be to go to Dragonspine to investigate their survival out in the wild. Let's keep an eye out for the huge prints then as well. ｜ 等调查清楚了雪猪的行进路线，下一阶段就是去龙脊雪山实地考察它们的生存状况了，到时候也留意一下巨大脚印的事吧。
- ... ｜ ……
- Just give it some time, hehe, and it'll produce some even better rocks... Hehe... One, two... ｜ 只要再过段时间，嘿，就会长出更好的石头的，嘿嘿，一颗…一颗，两颗…

- <color=#FFFFFFFF>When the battle begins:</color> Each Geo character on your side grants your side 10 $[C135] points. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>战斗开始时：</color>我方每有1个岩元素角色，我方获得10点$[C135]。
- Target location is the same as the current location. Cannot switch. ｜ 目标场景与当前场景相同，无法进行转换
- Anyway... We haven't met before, have we? You look so familiar somehow... ｜ 不过话说回来…明明是头一次见面，但总觉得…好像已经在哪见过了？
- Old Notes ｜ 陈旧的笔记
- Oh! You're really interested in my academic theories? ｜ 啊呀，你对我的学术理论感兴趣吗？
- Hmm? It seems that you have some questions for me, yes? ｜ 嗯？看您的表情…是有事想问我？
- After an opposing character is Frozen: Create 2 Omni Dice. (Can be triggered up to twice per Round)\nEnd Phase: Heal all of your opponent's characters who have not been afflicted by the Frozen Status and have used a Skill in this Round for <color=#{0}>6</color> HP; if you have characters afflicted by the Frozen Status, your active character will be unable to use Skills during the next Round. ｜ 敌方角色受到冻结反应后：生成2个万能元素骰。（每回合最多触发2次）\n结束阶段：治疗所有未附属「冻结」状态且本回合使用过技能的敌方角色<color=#{0}>6点</color>；如果我方存在附属「冻结」状态的角色，则下回合中我方出战角色将无法使用技能。
- May the Anemo Archon protect you. ｜ 愿风神护佑您。
- Perhaps it's her intuition. ｜ 也许是她的直觉吧。
- #Yeah, we should explain... Take it away, {NICKNAME}! ｜ #呃…请仔细听{NICKNAME}讲哦。
- It's so rare to find a traveler passing through a remote out-of-the-way place like this. ｜ 真少见呢，这么偏远的角落居然也会有旅行者经过。
- #{NICKNAME}, Paimon, come with me. I need to talk to you. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，派蒙，你们跟我过来先，有事要找你们。

- Activate the Arrayed Emplacement and complete the challenge ｜ 启动「阵战兵机」并完成挑战。
- That's right, and at the end of that great training arc, Guoba-san brought Adeptus Cloud Retainer's Bloom Pruner. That sure was a gap in ability if I've ever seen one... ｜ 没错没错，那次大修行最后，锅巴兄带来留云仙君的「花羽叶月神机」，让我和鬼王意识到了双方的力量差距…
- Fragrant Rice Pudding ｜ 清香的米饭布丁
- Ah, so... the Vasara Trees in Ashvattha's Concourses were all once Aranara? ｜ 啊，难道…觉树之堂的莎兰树，也是兰那罗变成的？
- Why, experience would be a better teacher than I, wouldn't you say? ｜ 与其问我，不如亲自体验一下如何？
- ...*sigh* I truly admire your professionalism, Ms. Chronie, but are you sure you'll be able to make it the rest of the way there? ｜ …唉，我十分敬佩您的职业精神，但克洛妮艾小姐，您确定接下来的路还能走得动吗？
- They are just monsters. There is no need to worry about me. If it weren't for the ingredients, I would have been able to take them all. ｜ 只是些许魔物罢了，无需担心，若不是担心食材，我一人就能对付这两处魔物。
- Custom Gift Envelope No. 6 ｜ 如意祝柬·之六
- Our neighbors still have to keep an eye on that dragon, so I'm on my own for the time being. ｜ 村里的邻居们还要去盯着那头龙，我只能暂时一个人想想解决办法。
- My head is dizzy, and I feel like my brain's going to burst. *sob* I'm definitely going to die soon... ｜ 头昏又脑涨，我肯定命不久矣了，呜呜…

- Ugh... How could you lose something so important!? ｜ 明明是这么重要的东西！
- Perplexed ｜ 挠头

- Ready? ｜ 您准备好了吗？

- You may no longer be the crybaby Jakob, but as you are now, you are still not worthy of eternity. ｜ 你就算已经不是爱哭鬼雅各布了，也不应该用现在的模样成为永恒。
- Whatever the case, she left the city. If you follow that road, you should be able to find her. ｜ 反正她出城去了，你们顺路应该就能找到她。
- Vermeer... Ah, yes, that artist. Let me see... by my count, this is indeed the agreed date. ｜ 梵米尔…啊，那个画家，我算算日子，也确实该是履行约定的时候。
- After an opposing character takes Dendro-related Reaction DMG: Create 2 Omni Dice on your side.\nAll opposing characters will start with <color=#{0}>Belligerence Unfettered</color>: When they would be defeated, they will not be defeated and instead be healed to 1 HP. <color=#{0}>2 Usages.</color> ｜ 敌方角色受到草元素反应伤害后：我方获得2个万能元素。\n所有敌方角色初始具有<color=#{0}>「战意倍增」</color>：被击倒时免于被击倒并治疗到1点生命值，<color=#{0}>可用2次</color>。
- CD|{param2:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param2:F1}秒
- Beidou's Troubles ｜ 北斗的烦恼…
- I took an editing job recently, and I'm working on a manuscript right now. It's interesting, but it's gonna keep me busy for a while. ｜ 我最近接了份编辑活，正给人改稿子，挺有意思的，但还得忙一会。
- Sweet Madame... This dish seems simple enough, but it's quite the test of a chef's skills. ｜ 甜甜花酿鸡吗…是一道看似简单，但很考验厨师真材实料的菜呢。
- Ugh, do you really have to put it that way? ｜ 不不不，这个词不是这么用的吧？！
- It's been a long time since I last saw Masters Diluc and Kaeya sharing a meal together. The atmosphere was... ahem, was not something that a maid of my lowly stature should be commenting on. ｜ 很久没看到迪卢克老爷和凯亚少爷一起用餐了。至于气氛…嗯，不是我一位小小女仆能够评价的。
- Sailwind Shadow ｜ 帆影游风
- She might be the only one who's not actually acting, Kachina. ｜ 可能只有她没有在表演吧。
- Low HP: I ｜ 生命值低·其一
- When your $[A1306], who has this card equipped, creates an <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C113061]</color>, its $[K3] +1. ｜ 装备有此牌的$[A1306]生成的<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C113061]</color>的$[K3]+1。
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Mondstadt has so many windmills, doesn't it?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Well, the city is built above water, so it probably relies on the windmills to draw the water upwards.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> That's correct! The winds blow through Mondstadt all year, so this supply of water is very stable.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Also, the windmills are what they call "visible winds" — and wind chimes are called the "audible winds."\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon guesses they can be thought of as mascots and prayers to the Anemo Archon for protection.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Ah, mascots. So, like you then, Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> No! Not at all! They're made of wood, and you can't eat them in an emergency either, 'cause all you'll do is grind your teeth down!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Uhh...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> ...I don't know what to say to that. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>蒙德有很多风车呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>因为蒙德城建在水平面的上方，所以是靠风车把水抽上来的吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>回答正确！蒙德四季风吹不断，所以水源的供应也很稳定。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>而且，风车就是所谓「看得见的风」吧——然后，风铃就是「听得见的风」。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>也算是一种祈求风神护佑的吉祥物啦。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>原来如此，和派蒙一样是吉祥物啊。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不一样！风车是用木头做的，不能当应急食品，只能用来磨牙啊！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>…我该接话吗？
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- I'm gonna hit the hay. Wanna catch the sunrise tomorrow. ｜ 睡了睡了，准备迎接明天的太阳！
- Bounties ｜ 讨伐悬赏
- Hohoho! "That was quick," you say? It sounds like I've got some catching up to do! Please, fill me in. ｜ 呵呵…你们的第一反应是「这么快」，看来已经提前知道真相了啊。
- We may have interacted quite a bit with hilichurls during our travels, but Paimon has never seen a race like the Aranara! ｜ 虽然我们在旅途中和丘丘人打过不少交道，但像「兰那罗」这样的种族，是第一次见呢！
- Staying there for a short period of time shouldn't have an effect on the person, but with the Abyss in the picture, it's a different story. ｜ 通常来说，短暂停留在夜神之国并不会有什么影响，但如果加上深渊的作用，就另当别论。
- The Spina's on the case! ｜ 刺玫会出马！
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P}+{param5:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}+{param5:F1P}
- See you. Things will get better still, you'll see! ｜ 再见，生活会越来越好的！
- Thank you. ｜ 谢谢。
- Depends on who's ordering what. You'll understand that I can't be completely frank with you. ｜ 视买家和预订内容而定。有些话不方便明说，你应该理解吧。
- Well? I was pretty helpful, right? You know, everyone usually jumps at the chance to work with me. Not my own sister, though... No, she avoids me like her life depends on it. ｜ 你看吧，像我这样的好帮手，别人肯定都求之不得，只有自家的姐姐会嫌弃我，这叫什么事啊。
- Defend the Flower of Sanctity ｜ 守护圣洁之花
- What? My brother's looking for me? Huh. It's been some time, hasn't it? I hadn't noticed at all! ｜ 什么？哥哥在找我？咦，怎么都这个时间了，完全没有注意到！
- After all, it's my responsibility as the leader to make sure that no one falls through the cracks. ｜ 毕竟我作为会长，没能及时帮助遇到困难的成员，那也算是我的责任嘛。
- It was also they who helped deliver the new formulation to me this time. ｜ 这次他们是受托帮忙把新配好的药剂带过来给我的。
- Yeah! And even though we might not be viewing the meteor shower from here, it's a good place to practice. ｜ 虽然流星雨不一定是在这里看，但作为练习的地方很合适。
- Give me a moment. ｜ 稍等。
- I do not have anything with which I can thank you. But if you do not mind, allow me to tell you the secret of the Dragonbone Orbs. ｜ 我没有别的东西能够感谢你，如果不介意的话，请让我把龙骨花凝珠的秘密告诉你。
- Delusions are treasures of incredible power, granted by Her Majesty the Tsaritsa in person. Whether faith or Vision, a Delusion makes them all look like child's play. ｜ 「邪眼」是由女皇陛下亲自赐予的宝物，有着强大的力量，只要有了它，无论是信仰还是「神之眼」，都是哄小孩的把戏。
- Some Domains available for a limited time ｜ 部分秘境限时开放
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Mansion Courtyard — Warbling Pavilion ｜ 穹居台榭-「吟鸣之亭」
- Uh oh, Eula's gonna add that to her long list of scores to settle... ｜ 完了，优菈要对小孩子记仇了。
- Follow the aura trail and find the ingredients ｜ 跟随气息的踪迹，寻找食材
- You mean, the show? ｜ 关于演出…
- A Cooling Mix ｜ 清爽的冰棍配方
- My father once told me that such ores were born from the influence of Ley Line energies, and are more valuable than Crystal Ores by far! ｜ 听我爹说，这些矿石是受到了地脉能量的影响变异而成的，这比水晶矿可珍贵多了！
- Report to Tsarevich ｜ 向查耶维奇报告
- Massive amounts of Hydro energy are coursing through this damp ancient sacrificial altar.\nYou shall earn Weapon Ascension Materials, if — and only if — you can pass the trial. ｜ 这座潮湿的古代祭祀场中，聚积了大量的水元素之力。\n若能通过其中的试炼，或许能获得强化装备的物质。
- Friend, have you heard the legend of the Dance of Sabzeruz? Would you like to feel the breath of the Goddess of Flowers? ｜ 朋友，听说过花神之舞的传说吗？想感受花神的气息吗？
- Which cat do you like the most? ｜ 罗莎莉亚最喜欢哪只猫？
- Natlan ｜ 纳塔
- You are not as important to them as you think. ｜ #你在{M#他们}{F#她们}的心里其实没有那么重要。

- Wing House: Dawn & Dusk ｜ 古宅厢房-「庭中朝暮」
- Mmm. ｜ 哦。
- Hey, let's not leave him here like that! Paimon feels he's just too embarrassed to ask for our help... You see, asking someone for help when you're in trouble isn't something to be ashamed of at all. ｜ 别真走呀！我猜他就是不好意思向我们求助…真是奇怪，遇到困难找人帮忙并不是丢脸的事情呀。

- Here we go! Show us what the flight school's future star is capable of! ｜ 哦！也让我们见识一下飞行学校明日之星的本领吧！
- It's a bit hard to put it into words... ｜ 还说不清楚…
- A long sofa found in The Cat's Tail. Colored with the green found between the mountains and the woods, this sofa has a freshness akin to the feeling when one returns to nature. The main reason behind the use of these colors is because Sneku the duel cat often likes playing outdoors, and constantly yearns to frolic around in the free wilderness...\nIn reality, however, the inhabitants of the woods were not nearly as pliable to Sneku's demands as the cards are. After a failed attempt at issuing a command, Sneku fled into the shrubbery to avoid potential mistreatment by the riled inhabitants. Henceforth, all items and materials with the same coloring as woodland greenery instill an additional sense of safety in Sneku. ｜ 猫尾酒馆中的长条形沙发，采用了山间林地般的青蓝配色，有种回归自然般的清爽观感。采用这种色彩的原因，是猫之牌手「斯内库」偏爱在户外玩耍，总是向往着自由的山林…\n但现实之中，山林中的住客们可不像卡牌那样，会乖乖听「斯内库」的话。经历了一次失败的指挥后，斯内库藏进了灌木丛中，才免受住客们的粗暴招待。自此，灌木丛和相似色彩的物品就能为「斯内库」提供额外安全感。

- The fresh meat of an Unagi/Eel. If handled properly, it can be used to make fresh, lovely food. ｜ 陆鳗鳗的新鲜肉块。经过适当调理，可以做成极其鲜美的佳肴。

- And now, it looks like we've finally found our first clue... ｜ 一路下来，终于在这里发现了线索…
- In that case, the situation could be worse than we thought. ｜ 这样的话，好像更糟糕了。

- It's a bomb again, isn't it? ｜ 不会又是炸弹吧？

- Beginnings and endings, creation and change... Mavuika, you truly are a remarkable leader. It is my honor to have met you. ｜ 开始与结束，创造与改变。玛薇卡，你是一个相当了得的领导者。能见到你，我很荣幸。

- Looks like you know what you're doing! I don't have anything else to add. ｜ 看来你很有一套嘛！我都提不出什么建议啦。

- #Huh? {NICKNAME}, Paimon, imagine running into you here! What're you doing in Qiaoying Village? ｜ #欸？{NICKNAME}，派蒙，这么巧，你们也来翘英庄玩吗？
- The tunnel vent looks like it could allow one person passage, barely, but leaving along with the missing lady seems an unrealistic prospect. ｜ 地道里的通风口，从空间上看勉强可让一人通过，但想要带上失踪的少女一起离开不太现实。
- "There's something huge, in the sky!" ｜ 有什么巨大的东西…在天上飞！

- Seeya. Sign up soon if you want to join my fleet! ｜ 嗯，再见，想要加入我的船队的话，就尽快报名吧！
- Well, eating too many sweet treats might send all that sugar to your head. You wouldn't be able to think clearly about the case on a sugar rush, would you? ｜ 嗯，甜食吃多了不好，小心等下脑子晕晕的，案件的事想不明白哦。
- You're up, Paimon. ｜ 靠你了，派蒙。
- <color=#FFD780FF>Blood-Debt Directives</color> are now already Blood-Debt Due when first applied.\nWhen Arlecchino absorbs such a Due, she unleashes Balemoon Bloodfire in front of her, dealing 900% of her ATK as <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color> and increasing her All Elemental RES and Physical RES by 20% for 15s. This effect can trigger once every 10s.\nYou must first unlock the Passive Talent "Agony Alone May Be Repaid." ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>血偿勒令</color>施加时即为血偿勒令·结。\n阿蕾奇诺回收血偿勒令·结时，将在前方唤出厄月血火，造成相当于她的攻击力900%的<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>，并使她的所有元素抗性与物理抗性提升20%，持续15秒。此效果每10秒至多触发一次。\n需要解锁固有天赋「唯苦痛可偿还」。

- "Rules, logic, and exceptions... Once I've grasped these three major aspects, there's no match I can't take with ease!"\nHint: Yanfei's deck is based around Food and Charged Attacks. - Even the lengthiest of battles have their end. As for how long this one shall last, I suppose that remains to be discovered... ｜ 再漫长的争斗也终有停歇之日，这里的战斗又会持续到哪一刻呢。
- At a guess, he probably snuck off to follow his brother... ｜ 我猜是偷偷跟着「公子」去了…
- Would you be interested in discussing plans to improve Chihu Rock with me? ｜ 有兴趣和我讨论讨论吃虎岩的改进规划吗？

- The commissioner should be pleased. ｜ 委托人会很高兴的。
- The Knights of Favonius have been mobilized to contain Stormterror's destruction. Venture forth with Cavalry Captain Kaeya to the Temple of the Wolf and stop Stormterror from gaining the power within. ｜ 为了遏制风魔龙的灾厄，骑士团的成员前往各地展开行动。与骑兵队长凯亚一同深入北风之狼的庙宇，阻止风魔龙获取其中的力量吧。
- Event Card ｜ 事件牌
- But Uncle Tian thinks so highly of him. Why would he do this? ｜ 连天叔都夸他很厉害，为什么这样的人要为愚人众做事呢？
- Let's see... If you like poetry, Humor From Tianheng is selling well at the moment. Seems to have a mass appeal. ｜ 推荐啊，读诗的话《天衡绝倒集》卖的还不错，比较符合大众口味。
- Kama, Paimon's got a question: why are the names here on Tsurumi Island all so weird? ｜ 阿釜，我问你喔，鹤观的地名，为什么都这么奇怪？
- I remember seeing the thick notebook next to the control panel once. Its contents were all about the General Mahamatra — his activities throughout the day, preferred methods of enacting judgment... everything. ｜ 有一次，我在操作台旁找到一本厚厚的笔记，里面的内容都与大风纪官赛诺有关——行动报告、处刑习惯…方方面面。
- After a party member triggers a Pyro-related reaction, the equipping character's Elemental Skill DMG is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>32%</color> for 8s. This effect can be triggered even when the triggering party member is not on the field. ｜ 队伍中的角色触发火元素相关反应后，装备者元素战技造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>32%</color>，持续8秒。该效果队伍中的角色处于队伍后台时也能触发。
- ...Elder Allpa? ｜ …阿尔帕长老？
- Different people of different backgrounds come here for all kinds of different reasons. Here, they can live peaceful, regimented lives, free from fear — no matter what they've gone through. ｜ 不同身份的人因为各自不同的理由来到这里。但无论他们此前的遭际如何不同，在这里他们都可以平等地过上作息规律、风雨无忧的生活。
- Lacquerware-making techniques are truly fascinating. My goal is to combine everything I have learned and become the best of the best. ｜ 漆器的技艺令人着迷，我的追求便是精通一技，融会贯通。
- Good Morning ｜ 早上好…
- How dare you go behind our backs like this, Ororon! Colluding with the Fatui? Really? ｜ 欧洛伦，你好大的胆子…竟敢背着我们跟愚人众勾结？
- Hehe, it's my duty to protect Sumeru's citizens, after all. ｜ 呵呵，毕竟守望须弥的子民们是我的义务嘛。
- Stupid Nara got it wrong. ｜ 糊涂那菈，记得不对。

- Diona and Margaret aren't here? ｜ 迪奥娜和玛格丽特不在吗？
- Diagram: Footprint of the Rainbow ｜ 图谱：虹的行迹
- Tall mushrooms with special "iron-brown" caps. Their standing forms imitate those of trees, and they also have the traits of shrubbery, which has given them the name "Treeshroom." Rumors amongst some adventurers claim that those who wish to delve deep into the forests can even use the stipes of these mushrooms as emergency weaponry. ｜ 挺拔高大的菇类，菌盖呈现出特别的「铁棕色」。它们直立的形貌相仿于树木的，又具备丛生的特性，因而得名「林立菇」。在某则冒险家的传闻中，深入雨林之人甚至能用这种菇类的菌柄制作应急的武器。
- We can't hear any music right now, but if she's really as nice as the story suggests, she'd definitely come to help anyone who was drowning, right? ｜ 虽然现在没听到乐声，但既然仙人这么好心，不管什么时候有人落水，应该都会出手相救吧？

- So, it's my time to shine. It's my time to eliminate The Withering from its source! ｜ 所以，也是时候由我出马，从根本上消除死域的成因了！
- See the Daydream Club itself blown sky-high, more like... Ugh... ｜ 哦，得了吧！我可不想空想俱乐部飞上天…
- But I must walk this path, or freedom dies by my hand. Goodbye, my tribe and kin. Farewell, sweet land of my birth. ｜ 但为了自由，我不得不这么做。再会了我的亲人，再会了我的故乡。

- Use this to create a temporary Teleport Waypoint at your current location. Only one can exist at a time.\nA pocket-sized item that creates a temporary Teleport Waypoint. It is capable of connecting with the ley lines, at least to the extent necessary to bring about teleportation.\nAlthough it offers an incredible convenience to Vision bearers, the actual principles behind Teleport Waypoints are not yet fully understood. We can only hope that using them does not cause any undesirable side effects... ｜ 使用后会在当前大世界设置虚拟的「传送锚点」。同时只能设置一个。\n模仿传送锚点创造的道具，一定程度上能与地脉相连，实现传送的功能。\n对神之眼持有者而言，应当是非常便利的小物件。虽然传送锚点的运作原理还没有完全解明，使用时说不定会产生未知的负面影响…？
- After which I shall be dragged into the watery depths, never to be seen again... I... Oh, Archons... ｜ 然后我就会被暗流卷到水底，谁也发现不了我，天哪，哎哟…

- Oh, don't mention it. Just glad you're okay. ｜ 不客气，不客气，你们没事就好。
- So I've just stayed here watching them. Otherwise, I'm not sure how I'd be able to face their parents. ｜ 所以只好一直看护他们了，不然没办法和他们的父母交待。

- A flying squirrel wearing both a crown and a noble, resolute appearance. Can be placed on a "Good Shelf" for display.\nThis model is based on a certain Princess from the Kingdom of Breezes and Bells. Interestingly, when this princess was posing for the model, she chose an identical pose to that of Clanche — arms folded in, ready to vault into the skies. Perhaps the scene of themselves "seizing the skies" is something that all flying squirrels envisage in their hearts. ｜ 头戴冠冕的的飞鼠模型，形貌高贵且坚毅，可被摆放在「好架子」上进行展示。\n这个模型是根据铃风王国某位公主的形象制作的。有趣的是，这位公主在担任模特时，选择了与克朗谢一致的姿势——双臂收拢，仿佛随时准备飞身一跃的造型。或许「搏击天空」正是每位飞鼠心中潜藏的愿景吧。

- Wish ｜ 祈愿
- No Artifacts to unlock in Inventory ｜ 背包内没有可解锁的圣遗物
- Madame Lan? You mean, from the Chenyu Vale Artisans Association? ｜ 蓝师傅？是那位沉玉谷手工艺工会的蓝师傅？
- The first night, he dreamed of a cold stone cave.\nTurning to one side, he saw the cave's entrance behind him, a few scattered beams of moonlight finding their way in like shafts of white sand; though not a sliver of light reached its depths, whence came a faint rustling sound as if inside there lived a dense black fog. Water droplets fell from above, landing on his outstretched hand. They were sticky to the touch.\nThere was moisture, and within it, nutrients. He nodded to himself; this place could probably birth life.\nIt was at this moment that he awoke. It did not feel like a good dream, yet neither was it a nightmare. He'd felt cold in the dream. It was pretty cool, so could it simply be the nighttime chill? "I should prepare a thicker blanket for tomorrow," he thought.\nOn the second night, he dreamt of a scorching wind.\nAll he could see were pale stone pillars and clouds trimmed with crimson linings. There were clouds, so he must have been high up in the sky. But despite seeing neither sun nor fire, there was an intense heat in the air, as if even his soul was to be seared.\nHe did not know where he was, but somehow, he felt sure that this was the end. Just one step forward and he would reach it... Just one more step...\nHe awoke with a start. People naturally gravitate toward warmth, and he himself had always loved the fires of Natlan, but the sheer heat of that dream filled him with dread. Not a good call, he thought, shaking his head; unsure if he was rejecting the dream or reality itself. It seemed that the Alpaca wool blanket might have been a bit too much, given the current season.\nOn the third and final night, he dreamt of a pitch-black universe and a labyrinth of mirrors. He stared at the overlapping surfaces that encircled him, upon which countless other Ororons stared back.\nHe heard an imaginary voice say, "If your shadow reflects itself enough times, maybe you can piece together your entire self!" There was no kindness in that voice, yet nor was there malice either — simply the teasing tone of a detached observer.\nBut how could a reflection reveal something that was not there in the first place? And what was it that moved through the mirrors in this dim space...?\nUncharacteristically irritated, he shouted back, "If you wanted to make a complete shadow, then you'd at least need to start out with some light!"\nApparently, people can still hear when they are dreaming, for it was this outburst of his that woke him up. This time, he did not even try to explain the cause of his dream; the temperature and his blanket were simply excuses that he had now exhausted. Even after fully waking, he could still feel a lingering anger, along with an unusual heaviness weighing him down.\nYet the things he wore and carried on his person could not have been lighter. What weighed upon his chest was none other than the so-called gaze of the gods. ｜ 第一个夜晚，他梦见冰冷的石窟。\n侧过身，背后就是洞口，洒进一小把白沙一样的月色。洞窟深处则容不下半点光，传来窸窸窣窣的响动，像是有一团漆黑的雾活在里面。水滴从头顶落在他摊开的手上，触感黏腻。\n有水分，水分中又有养料。他点了点头，这里应该可以诞出生命。\n他在此刻醒来，不觉得这是一个好梦，也不认为它是一场噩梦。梦里感觉到冷，是因为夜里降温了吗？他想，明天应当准备一条厚被子。\n于是第二个夜晚，他梦见炽热的风。\n视野里只有苍白的石柱与镶红边的云。既然有云，那应当是在高天之上。但看不到太阳，也没有火，空气却热得惊人，像是要把灵魂也烤化。\n他不知自己身在何处，但没来由地，他似乎知晓这里就是终点。再往前一步就可以了，再往前一步…\n他倏地惊醒。人理应是趋向温暖的，他也一向喜欢纳塔的火，但刚刚梦里的温度令他恐惧。不是一个好的决定，他摇着头，不知道是在否定梦境还是现实。看来在当下的季节里，绵驮兽毛的毯子还是太过分了点。\n最后第三个夜晚，他梦见漆黑的寰宇，与镜子的迷宫。在层叠环绕的平面中，他与无数个欧洛伦对视。\n他听见一个不存在的声音说：「等你的影子反射得足够多，没准就能拼凑出完整的自己了！」听不出善意，也没有恶意，只像一个戏谑的旁观者。\n但究竟怎么反射，才能照出原本没有的东西呢？而且在这黯淡的空间中，到底是什么在镜中穿梭…\n他少见地有些生气了，大声喊道：「想要补全影子的话，至少得先有光吧！」\n大概人在梦里是能听到声音的，所以他被自己的梦话吵醒了。他不再试图解释做梦的原因，因为什么气温或者被子的借口已经用无可用。彻底清醒后，他仍能感受到残余的怒火，以及格外沉重的身体。\n但他身上的东西轻到不能再轻。压住他胸口的，是所谓神明注视的目光。

- Wasn't he brought here? ｜ 他不是被带走了吗？
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> The people and saurians of Natlan have a great relationship, huh? They live together, fight together, even fly together...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Just like us, right? Except you're too small to take me flying... It's just a shame you can't grow any bigger. Not for want of trying, of course — you do eat a lot of Chicken-Mushroom Skewers...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Hmph... Let's not forget that saurians can't be your guide. Or your conversation partner.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> It's strange to think that there was once a time when humans and saurians were enemies. And now they co-exist peacefully. Must've taken a lot of work to get to where things are today.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> If Paimon was a saurian, all it would have taken is some tasty food.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> You say that, but... what if you demanded a hundred chicken skewers per day, and the humans couldn't provide that much?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Umm... Paimon could probably settle for fifty a day...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Or even better — maybe the humans could team up with you and you could go hunting together. Then there'd be enough meat for everyone to eat their fill!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Uh-huh! Peace between species all starts with a full stomach! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>纳塔人和龙之间的关系真好啊，可以一起生活，一起战斗，一起飞行…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>有点像我和派蒙哦。可惜派蒙不会长大，也没法背着我在天上飞…明明吃了那么多的野菇鸡肉串呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哼，但是龙又不能给你当向导，也不能和你聊天。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>其实很早之前，有过人和龙互相争夺的时代，变成如今这样和平共处的样子，一定很不容易吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>如果我是龙的话，只要给我足够的食物，我就完全不想打架了。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>可是如果派蒙一天要吃一百个鸡肉串，人类却没有那么多食物该怎么办？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那我可以只吃五十个…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>或者人类也可以和派蒙约定好一起打猎，拿到更多的食材，这样两边都能吃饱了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哦！和平的关键是更多的肉！

- Peculiar fishes that look like a heart from the side, which are said to be related to bass. Their dorsal and ventral fins are comprised of flexible bones that are as slender as feathers, hence why researchers proposed the name "Heartfeather Bass."\nAs an important subspecies of the Heartfeather Bass family, Rippling Heartfeather Bass are much better at swimming than their appearance suggests — they can even travel across roaring waves. It is said that their fins produce a rippling sound when they swim above the water against the current. Identifying the fish is already extremely challenging given their protective coloration, so most anglers have never heard this unique sound with their own ears. ｜ 侧面样貌呈心形的奇特鱼类，据说与鲈鱼有着一定的亲缘关系，又因羽毛般细长软骨构成的背鳍和腹鳍，被学者们形象地命名为「心羽鲈」。\n作为心羽鲈中重要的品种之一，波波心羽鲈有着与外貌不符的航渡能力，甚至可以穿行于怒涛之间。据说这种鱼类露出水面，迎着激流游动时，独特的鱼鳍会发出「波波」的声响。单单从蓝色的水体中辨别出具有保护色的这种鱼类，就已经是一大难题了，大部分鱼师尚未亲耳听见这种独特的音色。

Once the <color=#E165B8FF>last</color> Skill-Ball shoots past the <color=#E165B8FF>lower boundary</color>, it will be considered lost, and will permanently reduce the number of balls in your reserve.\nWhen reserve balls are at zero, you will fail the challenge. ｜ 「百炼难度」的「闲畅游艺」和「破邪游艺」挑战中，将新增<color=#E165B8FF>备球数量限制</color>。当场上的<color=#E165B8FF>最后一枚</color>「术球」飞越场地的<color=#E165B8FF>下边界</color>时，即被视为损失，并减少备球数量。\n备球数量为零时，将导致挑战失败。
- Due to special circumstances, all theatrical performances have been cancelled and the resumption time has yet to be determined. Sorry about the inconvenience. ｜ 由于特殊情况，剧场公演全部取消，恢复时间待定，敬请见谅。

- A special report privately printed by Chronie. It is said that the contents record the "truth" that the Fontaine Research Institute wishes to hide... ｜ 由克洛妮艾私自印制的「特别报告」，据说上面的文章记载了所有枫丹科学院想要隐藏的「真相」…
- You can spend as much time as you need here, Navia. We'll stay with you. ｜ 你想在这里待多久都可以，我们会陪你的。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- A gift for having fun with Klee in Dodoco's Bomb-Tastic Adventure, as designed by Lisa. It looks exactly like the Special Jumpy Dumpty Dodoco, and now this pair of best friends are here to stay in the Realm Within!\nKlee went home early every day to use Albedo's scrapbook as a reference, and finally managed to craft it! According to Klee, "I hope it'll remind you of the fun we had together and blast away your troubles and boredom!" ｜ 与可莉一同游玩丽莎设计的「嘟嘟可轰轰奇遇记」后获得的礼物，外形与投掷「特别蹦蹦」的嘟嘟可完全一致，两位好朋友一同入住了壶中洞天！\n为了准备这个礼物，可莉每天晚上都早早回家，看着阿贝多的手工画册，一边学习一边制作，最后大获成功！按照可莉的话来说，「只要看到这个玩偶，就能想起这几天的开心时光，烦恼和无聊丢光光！」
- Of course! ｜ 当然有兴趣。
- My Master, Naphis, and Professor Zaha Hadi, who had a seminar with him that very afternoon. ｜ 我的老师纳菲斯，还有那天下午和他一起开研讨会的萨赫哈蒂女士。

- Okay, I see... ｜ 这样啊，我知道了。
- No enemies? Hold on... ｜ 没有敌人？不对…

- How did I get on the ceiling? Did the room turn upside down, or gravity itself...? ｜ 我这是在…天花板上？是房间倒转了，还是说重力…

- Carpets may be priced, but art is priceless! ｜ 毛毯有价，艺术无价！
- *sigh* He must've done more than just adjusting the brewing method and modifying the amount of ingredients used. ｜ 唉，如果他只是在原来药汤的基础上调整药材的比例和药汤做法，绝不会出现这种事。
- The third act requires a little more from Mr. Sasano. This new character, Wakayama Kojuurou, is Wakayama Keisuke's younger brother and it is more appropriate to have Mr. Sasano play him. ｜ 第三幕需要笹野先生做一点小小的突破，这个新角色若山小十郎是若山敬助的弟弟，仍然由笹野先生饰演比较合适。

- HP increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>. Additionally, provides an ATK Bonus based on <color=#99FFFFFF>1.8%</color> of the wielder's Max HP. ｜ 生命值提升<color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>。此外，基于装备该武器的角色生命值上限的<color=#99FFFFFF>1.8%</color>，获得攻击力加成。
- Thank you so much, you saved the day. The enemy attacks grow stronger with each wave... We're nearly at breaking point. ｜ 非常感谢你们伸出援手，攻势一波强过一波，已经快要顶不住了。
- This weather is perfect, we should move out. ｜ 这样的天气，正适合行动。
- I never thought that such a huge place could be rebuilt just like that... ｜ 没想到那么大一个群玉阁，说建好就建好了…

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- I'd like something made. ｜ 委托锻造…
- Character and Weapon Enhancement Material ｜ 角色与武器培养素材
- Hey, it's me! Phew...! I made it, just in time! ｜ 唉，两位两位。呼——赶上了。
- Huh? Did you guys hear a sound coming from the other room...? You all keep resting here, I'll go have a look. ｜ 嗯？里面的屋子好像有声音…你们休息，我去看一眼。
- "As I was traveling alone, I discovered this vast and terrible ruin. Perhaps this is all that remains of an ancient civilization that was punished and destroyed. This ancient city seems to resist the presence of any outsiders... It might even have something to do with those purple-black crystals, or that mud-like substance."\n"I stayed for a time, but I had to leave its ominous, upended silhouette behind." ｜ 「独自探索的路上，发现了这座宏大可怖的遗迹。或许是千百年前遭受惩罚而湮灭的古老文明，这座古城似乎在抗拒着外人的存在…或许与那些来历不明的紫黑色晶体与泥状物有关。」\n「驻足片刻，我只得远离这不祥的倒吊剪影。」
- Dear Traveler,\nThe "Legend of the Vagabond Sword" event will end soon. Please remember to take part and claim your rewards in time~ ｜ 亲爱的旅行者：\n「风来人剑斗绮谭」活动玩法即将结束，欢迎旅行者及时参与活动，获取活动奖励~
- Indeed. No matter how hard I tried, I could not attain that perfect harmony that your personal blade does with you. ｜ 是啊，无论我再怎么努力，也达不到你和你的惯用刀那样的契合程度。
- Traveler, could you please help me gather some Padisarahs? It's certainly been a long day for everyone, and I wanna prepare a fine meal to treat everybody. ｜ 旅行者，你能帮我拿几株帕蒂沙兰来吗？辛苦了这么久，我来做一道好菜犒劳一下大家。
- Did you just say you wanted to have some Liyue cuisine? ｜ 你刚刚说想吃璃月菜？
- Yeah, he was so selfish! He doesn't have a heart! ｜ 真可恶，眼镜仔的心里没有一点爱！
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>When played: </color>Generate 1 Die of the same Element as the attached character. If you have 3 different Elemental Types in your party, generate 2 such Dice instead.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>When the character to which this card is attached is your active character, then when an opposing character takes Elemental Reaction DMG: </color>Draw 1 card. (Up to twice per Round)\n(A character can equip a maximum of 1 {SPRITE_PRESET#3004}Artifact) ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>入场时：</color>生成1个所附属角色类型的元素骰。如果我方队伍中存在3种不同元素类型的角色，则改为生成2个。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>所附属角色为出战角色期间，敌方受到元素反应伤害时：</color>抓1张牌。（每回合至多2次）\n（角色最多装备1件「{SPRITE_PRESET#3004}圣遗物」）
- Humans would create high towers in later years to allow the Human Realm to interpose itself between the two, thus creating a stable space — one held up by three towers in three corners. ｜ 随后人们建造了高塔，让人界介入其中。三角三塔撑起了一个稳定的空间。
- Haha, sure. Once upon a time, there was a young man who looked up to his brother, and wanted to be a castle guard and serve Her Highness the Prinzessin... ｜ 呵呵，曾经啊，有一位年轻人，他视自己的哥哥为榜样，立志成为城堡的守卫，为皇女殿下效力…
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- "To the wind that guides me: When I'm exhausted, bless me with the strength to keep going forward. When I'm uncertain, bless me with the wisdom to distinguish good from evil. When I suffer from injustice, bless me with the courage to fight back..." ...Oops, my apologies, I was just doing my prayers. *giggles* You need something? ｜ 「指引我前进的风啊。在我困顿时给我继续前行的力量，在我迷惑时给我辨明善恶的智慧，在我遭受不义时给我抗争的勇气…」…哎呀，抱歉，刚才在专心祈祷。有什么事吗？
- ...That he is, yes. I do still think of him as a child. It takes time for an old man's mind to adjust. ｜ …是啊，我这心思一时转不过来，还把他当成孩子。
- Prince ｜ 小王子
- Synopsis (Shots 1 to 4):\nShowcase <color=#e5870a>Sucrose's</color> concerns about the effectiveness of the <color=#e5870a>ordinary potions</color>, but at <color=#e5870a>Noelle's</color> insistence, she chooses them all the same. However, when <color=#e5870a>faced with hilichurls</color>, the potions prove unsatisfactory, failing to improve Noelle's terrible state and causing her to <color=#e5870a>perform poorly</color>. ｜ 脚本规划（第1至第4镜）：\n展示<color=#e5870a>砂糖</color>对<color=#e5870a>普通药剂</color>的药效心存担忧，在<color=#e5870a>诺艾尔</color>的坚持下她们仍旧选择了普通药剂。但在<color=#e5870a>对阵丘丘人</color>时，药剂效果不尽如人意，并未改善诺艾尔的糟糕状态，导致她<color=#e5870a>表现不佳</color>。
- (Wait, does that mean he gave Dain a... false memory!?) ｜ （难道说…是「虚假的记忆」！）
- By the way, I imagine Adventurers' Guild members are good at making order of things? ｜ 说起来，冒险家协会的冒险家，应该特别擅长「对号入座」吧？
- New places are meant for exploring, after all! You've gotta try all kinds of new things to become a good and experienced guide. ｜ 每到一个新的地方就要尽情地自由探索！这就是成为好向导的秘诀，哼哼。
- A small but exquisite Liyue-style house. It was designed with an open roof that may be used for drying clothes, or for drinking wine and gazing at the moon.\nBest to watch your step while using the stairs to the roof if you're one to get drunk, however, lest you fall onto some unfortunate passerby. ｜ 小巧玲珑的璃月民房，设有开放的天台，晾晒衣物和饮酒赏月皆可。\n但上下天台需要通过梯子，醉酒后还请注意安全，避免砸到路过的行人。
- If I'm back home too late, my vegetables will get thirsty... ｜ 要是我回去得太晚，家里的蔬菜会口渴的…
- "Delightful Encounter" ｜ 「美好相遇」
- I like food with robust flavors. Spicy fried meat or spicy tofu are my favorites. Sitting down to a big hearty meal together, where everyone can fill their bellies — now that's when things get lively! Haha, alright, alright, all this talk is making me hungry! ｜ 我喜欢味道重的菜！什么炝炒肉片啊，麻婆豆腐啊我就很喜欢。能填饱肚子，大家围坐一圈一起吃的时候，气氛也会变得火热火热的。哈，说得我都想去吃一顿了。
- Still, Paimon is probably the safest choice... but only because you two maniacs are a danger to yourselves and others when you're in a competitive mood. ｜ 不过，你们两个斗虫狂人有可能把握不好轻重，确实应该由我来和她较量。
- How can things ever be the same again, knowing that your life was saved when others weren't? In a way, salvation can also be a burden. ｜ 被救下来的生命，就能毫无负担地活下去吗？承受恩惠可不是那么简单的事。
- I can help you clean the other springs. ｜ 我帮忙去清理其他池子吧。
- Art of Transport ｜ 「输运的要诀」
- Qucusaurus ｜ 绒翼龙
- #Hmm? Is that not a more pedestrian thing than Grainfruit? Ah, Noble {NICKNAME}, do you not have your servants attend you as you partake in sacrifices? ｜ #欸？这难道不是比颗粒果还常见的事情吗？高贵的{NICKNAME}，您祭祀的时候，难道从来都不带您的侍仆参加吗？
- Disgusting alcohol... ｜ 难喝的酒…
- But we still haven't seen her anywhere. Where the heck is she? ｜ 不过到处都没有看到她，她究竟在哪里呢？
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}
- Okay... then we'll get out of your hair. Paimon does hope Uncle Rocher will come out soon. Have a nice day! ｜ 嗯…好吧，那我们就不打扰夫人啦！希望罗谢大叔能早点出来面对自己！
- Hehe, pretty amazing, right? I never thought I'd be able to keep this outfit in the real world! I really like the texture, too — it feels so nice against my skin. Still, not the best thing to wear when I'm out on a delivery... ｜ 嘿嘿，很神奇吧？希穆兰卡的衣服居然能穿到提瓦特来！我还挺喜欢这套衣服的质感呢！虽然送快递的时候不太方便…
- Character Story 3 ｜ 角色故事3
- *sigh* Just... ignore him, please. As you can see, some of my guys aren't particularly bright. If the guards at Caravan Ribat hear of this, we'll get questioned all over again... ｜ 哎，如您所见，兄弟有些不会说话，你别往心里记。这要是报告给喀万驿卫兵的话，免不了又是一顿盘问…
- Which is to say, all the tracks are fixed. If a machine is set up to move forwards, it will never move in reverse. ｜ 换句话说，它们的轨道都是固定的，写着往前走的车子，就不可能向后退。
- Alright! That concludes the tour of Wangshan Hall! ｜ 好！如此一来，王山厅的游览便也就告一段落了！
- Network connection error. Please check and try again. ｜ 当前网络连接状态异常，请检查后重试
- Paimon's heard that couplets are a traditional art form in Liyue. If you can write a line that works as a second half to one that someone else has written, you'll be well paid! ｜ 听说对联是璃月的传统文化，有人写完上联以后，会为下联悬赏千金！
