- A weapon that mostly appears near sunken ships. When a character appears within its line of sight and attack range, it will <color=#FFE14BFF>lock on and attack</color>. ｜ 大多会出现在沉船附近的兵器。当角色位于其可视射程范围内时，将会<color=#FFE14BFF>持续锁定、攻击</color>。
- But can't you control the elements? What was it? Oh yeah, "Prepare to be blown away!" ｜ #不过，{NICKNAME}不是能驾驭元素的力量吗？像是什么…对了，「随风而去吧！」
- You seem... troubled. Traveler, do not lose heart! For with my left eye, the Auge der Verurteilung, which sees the threads of fate, I will surely keep you from harm. And Oz, the raven that has witnessed the demise of countless worlds, will watch over you on your journey. Should this world, like a beast prowling in the night, covet your dreams, then I, Prinzessin der Verurteilung, shall fell it with my ensorcelled arrows of judgment! ｜ 看你有什么烦恼的样子…？旅人啊，不必困惑。因为，我以我的左眼，这只透彻因果之丝的「断罪之眼」，守望着你的命运；以奥兹那见证过一千世界寂灭的鸦眼，观察着你的进路。假若名为「世界」的夜巡凶兽觊觎你的梦想，那我便以断罪的圣裁魔矢将其射落！
- #Good day to you, {M#Mr.} {F#Ms.} {NICKNAME}. ｜ #向您问好，尊敬的{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}。
- Increases incoming healing by 20%. ｜ 角色受到的治疗效果提高20%。
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- We'd like to borrow your kitchen, please. ｜ 我们想要借用一下厨房。
- If this is the case, the seeds will be unable to germinate. However, the probability of this hypothesis proving true is low. ｜ 这种情况下，种子当然是无法发芽的。不过，这种假设成立的可能性较小。
- Continue asking after Avin's whereabouts ｜ 继续打听艾文的去向
- It's also essential to clean it often to avoid a buildup of dust, and it's best practice to hire a craftsman to perform regular maintenance... ｜ 务须时时勤拂拭，勿使染尘埃，最好再请位匠人上门保养…
- It's just that... Well, never you mind. ｜ 只是…嗯，不好意思，没什么。
- On festive occasions, one should offer words of blessing. ｜ 佳节应赠吉语。
- Adhigama Wood "Repose" Couch ｜ 证悟木「招宴」坐榻
- And you know what? I think she's got a point there! ｜ 嗯，她说的未必没有道理啊…
- Wha... M—Mere hallucinations, born of your exhaustion! Why, I remain full of spit and vinegar! ｜ 你…你累到做梦了吧！我现在精神抖擞得很！
- Mysterious Crystal HP: #1#% ｜ 神秘结晶体完整度：#1#%
- #No, so Nara {NICKNAME} was the one breaking the lock...? Aradashan thought the Big Iron Chunks escaped on their own! ｜ #什么呀，原来破坏石头锁的是那菈{NICKNAME}…兰提沙还以为是「大大铁块」自己跑出来了呢…啊！
- Because the Pyro Dragon is too weak. ｜ 因为火龙太弱了吧。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Played by Clorinde ｜ 克洛琳德饰
- About Varesa ｜ 关于瓦雷莎…
- See you, and may you stay happy. ｜ 再见，祝你开心。
- Ahem! I mean... get ready to fail! ｜ 呃咳！是做好失败的准备！
- Statue ｜ 雕像
- Hahaha, now that you mention it, it makes sense. I almost can't believe it — I am the legendary Darknight Hero! ｜ 哈哈哈，好有道理，没想到我就是大名鼎鼎的暗夜英雄啊！
- In the most ancient stories, Aramuhukunda had already left his mark. ｜ 在最古老最古老的故事里，兰穆护昆达就已经留下了他的痕迹。
- You might have the body of an adult, but you've been acting like a little baby. Haha. ｜ 看你这样子，虽然是大人的身体，脑子却还跟小孩子一样呢，哈哈。
- In Liyue, where the God of Contracts reigns, only contracts may not be betrayed. I for one have no issue with little maneuvers outside their remit. ｜ 在「契约」之神治下的璃月，唯有契约不可违背。至于契约之外的小动作，我倒是无所谓的。
- Detective-Looking Dude ｜ 探长模样的人
- You can go have a look if you're interested, I think their locations were... ｜ 你感兴趣的话就去看看吧，具体位置在…
- Hehe, I'm so glad you like it! When I saw this view before, I just knew I had to find a chance to bring you here to see it too. ｜ 嘿嘿，你能喜欢就太好啦！之前我看到这番景色的时候，就想着一定要找个机会，带你也来看看呢。
- Thank you. I presume the two of you have heard of the tea village of Chenyu Vale, Qiaoying Village? This land has been famous for its cool, fragrant waters since ancient times. The people are of gentle character, and the pristine pebbles in its streams are exquisite. ｜ 谢谢。沉玉谷的茶庄，其名翘英庄，想必二位也曾有所耳闻吧？此地自古以香茗冽泉闻名，民风温润，河中所盛产的卵石也精致漂亮。
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- I know. I remember how Autumn grew up. It began when she stopped stepping in puddles as she passed. ｜ 我知道。我记得秋是怎么长大的。起初，路过小水坑时她不再去踩了。
- This has gotta be where the newcomers rendezvous with whoever they're working for. But all the evidence has been destroyed. ｜ 这里应该是那些新人与幕后势力接头的地方，不过所有证据已经被销毁了。
- Then let's go down and have a look. Who knows what nasty things wait for us down there! ｜ 既然这样我们就下去看看吧，不知道会有什么坏东西在等着我们呢！
- Disappointed Paper Frog ｜ 失望的纸蛙
- Mmm! Mmmm! ｜ 嗯，嗯！
- You are free to choose how you want to live your lives, but as your archon, I should first make this information known to everyone. ｜ 你们有选择生存方式的自由，但作为神，我需要先叫醒你们。
- On one occasion, they secretly followed him, and saw him and his friend tinkering around with something at a camp. ｜ 他们有次悄悄跟了过去，发现勒拉和那个朋友在一个营地里鼓捣什么。
- Dvalin's tears restored the Holy Lyre back to its full power. Now, you are finally ready to purify Stormterror. ｜ 借助风龙泪滴的力量，天空之琴完全恢复了力量。净化风魔龙的准备已经完成。
- So there are no real ghosts here? ｜ 果然这里没有鬼吧？
- What... what the? Wait, listen! ｜ 搞、搞什么？！等一下，给我好好听人说话啊！
- What say you, outlander? Do you wish to make an enemy of me, the Prinzessin der Verurteilung, who even now begins to strum the strings of fate that shall sound out the Traveler's Requiem? ｜ 怎么样，异邦的旅人啊，做好与我为敌，做好与拨动命运之弦、奏响幽邃离魂曲的「断罪之皇女」为敌的觉悟了吗！
- Let's check in with Baizhu. ｜ 等会去问问白术吧。
- Actually, I'm not that strong. I'm still a little scared and want to cry a little... ｜ 其实…其实我也没那么勇敢，我还是有点害怕…还是有那么点想哭。
- Wow, just look at it... My Vision is so shiny and beautiful, isn't it? Don't you think you should pay me a fee for the privilege of seeing such an exquisite beauty? ｜ 哎呀哎呀，我的神之眼亮晶晶的，很漂亮吧？既然看到了这么漂亮的东西，你是不是应该付摩拉呢？
- Catch up to Little Liu (if she gets more than 30m away, the quest will be failed) ｜ 追上小六（>30米失败）
- Cause a total of {param0} Elemental Reactions in victorious matches. ｜ 在获胜的牌局中，我方一共造成{param0}次元素反应。
- Hmmm, let's try <color=#00E1FFFF>following those drag trails</color> to return the stones to their original locations! ｜ 嗯嗯，我们试着<color=#00E1FFFF>按照拖行的痕迹</color>，将石头的位置复原吧。
- The Day the Sword Departs ｜ 剑去之日
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- They say that the "legendary elixir that heals all wounds" can be found there, in fact! ｜ 传说中那个「治疗一切创伤的秘药」其实就藏在那里！
- Karkata? Karkata? ｜ 卡卡塔？卡卡塔？
- But don't worry, they're harmless now. Under my control, they can't do anything bad. ｜ 不过它们在做坏事之前就被我阻止了。不会有危险的。
- 3-Hit Swing DMG|{param3:P} ｜ 三段挥舞伤害|{param3:P}
- The guardians who have accompanied Apep for countless years are also lured in by the powerful waves of energy and attack you.\nAs the din of combat rises, recent memories seem to ring in your ears... ｜ 陪伴阿佩普度过无数时光的守护者，也被强大的力量波动吸引而至，向你们发起攻击。\n兵戈铮鸣间，耳畔似乎响起了不久前的回忆…
- What we're seeing is a doomsday clock, not doomsday itself. Time is just an invention by man to measure changes. ｜ 首先我们在此所见的只是末日的「时钟」，而不是末日本身。时间归根到底不过是人用来丈量万物万象变化的尺度。
- Complete the challenge ｜ 完成挑战
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param9:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param9:F1}点
- Red Vultures are careful and wicked by nature. She's probably sensed the danger and fled already, leaving us an empty lair. ｜ 赤鹫的性子谨慎狡诈，她大概已经闻到异样的气味，提前飞走了…所以并没有在巢穴里。
- Well? Shall one lead the way? ｜ 如何？要随我来吗？
- But... Miss Candace said I'd improved... ｜ 呜…明明坎蒂丝姐姐说，我已经很有进步了…
- We made the Water Droplets' wish come true. ｜ 我们完成了「小水珠」的愿望。
- Teachings of Contention ｜ 「角逐」的教导
- What can I say — I like to talk. I'm a strong believer in the power of words. ｜ 因为我喜欢说话嘛，我相信，语言拥有强大的力量。
- Help Vahid ｜ 帮助瓦希德
- 谢莹 ｜ 谢莹
- Message ｜ 留言
- Time for a walk... ｜ 散步时间…
- Ha! I finally get to hear you say it, centuries later. Oh, I must say it feels good. ｜ 哈啊——过了几百年终于听到你这句话，真让人心情舒畅。
- A feather from a bird of prey that flies almost too fast for the human eye to detect. ｜ 来自速度极快的猛禽，那奇迹般的一击肉眼几乎无法捕捉。
- Leave. ｜ 离开。
- When she obtained her Vision, she had not yet been given a name or surname.\nShe originally lived in a quiet mountain forest that had, from a time unknown, become plagued by great evils that robbed it of its former peace.\nThough she had the strength of the tengu, she was still young and could not stand against the monsters alone, and was hurled from a cliff during the battle, her wings having been damaged prior.\nPlummeting from the heights, and unable to unfurl her injured wings, she seemed fated to fall to her death.\n"No! It can't end like this! I... I always believed that I could protect this place forever with my strength..."\nWhen day dawned the next day, some passers-by discovered an unconscious girl by the roadside. She looked a little worse for the wear but seemed otherwise unharmed, adding to the mystery of how she had ended up here.\nAstonished, the people brought her back to the city and reported the matter to the Tenryou Commission immediately.\nThat was when the Kujou Clan Head, Kujou Takayuki, noticed that the glowing item in her hand was a Vision — a thing that many desired but few ever gained.\nRealizing that she this child had gained the attention of an Archon even at her young age, Takayuki believed that she was a destined child, sent to the Tenryou Commission by the heavens.\nTaking her in, he named her "Sara," and would train her to become an all-around warrior, asking that she serve the Shogun and fight for Inazuma.\nKujou Takayuki believed that in raising such an excellent general, the status and future of the Kujou Clan would become more secure. And indeed, all that he had hoped would steadily come to pass.\nSara, armed with her Vision, would swiftly distinguish herself, rising through the ranks to become a general of the Tenryou Commission at a young age, just as many had hoped.\nYet it was precisely because she possessed a Vision that Sara knew this better than anyone: her surviving that fall unscathed was due to the Archon looking upon her with favor in that instant.\nIn but a single glance, she had been given the power that sustained her life. Everything she had, therefore, could be described as existing by the Almighty Shogun's grace.\nFighting for the Shogun...\nSara believed that this was neither her duty nor a result of her foster father's schemes, but was instead her truest calling. ｜ 获得神之眼时，她还未被赐予名与姓。\n她原本栖居于一片平静的山林之中。不知从何时起，邪祟作乱，周遭安宁不再。\n虽有天狗之力，年幼的她却仍无力单独对抗魔物，更曾在战斗中被击落山崖，羽翼受损。\n她从高处坠落，受伤的翅膀无法张开，眼看就要绝望地摔落地面。\n「不应该是这样的！我本以为，凭我的能力，可以永远守护这片山林…」\n翌日清晨，路过山脚的居民发觉一个小女孩昏倒在路边。女孩模样有些狼狈，但周身毫发无损，竟不知为何躺倒在此。\n众人觉得惊奇，便带着她返回城中，即刻上报给天领奉行。\n九条家主九条孝行一见此女，便察觉到她手中那枚发光的物件是可遇而不可求的「神之眼」。\n如此年幼就已获得神明的注视，九条孝行认为，这个女孩便是上天赐予天领奉行的「命运」。\n他收养了女孩，赐名「裟罗」，培养她成为全能的战士，并要求她服从将军，为稻妻而战。\n九条孝行认为：若能培育出名将，九条家的地位与民望也将愈发稳固。一切也如他所想，稳步发展着。\n拥有「神之眼」力量的裟罗迅速崭露头角，年纪轻轻便不负众望成为天领奉行的大将。\n然而，正因为拥有神之眼，裟罗才比任何人都清楚，她之所以从高山上坠落还能毫发无伤，正是由于神在那一瞬间望见了她。\n一眼的注视，赐予她一生的力量。她所享有的一切，都可说是将军大人的垂怜。\n如果是为将军而战…\n裟罗认为，那不是命令，不是养父的计谋，而是她真心所向。
- Kimosi ｜ 基莫西
- We're all doing our best for Nechca. ｜ 都是在为了妮赫佳而努力。
- ...Goodbye. ｜ …再见。
- Yep, let's go. ｜ 好了，走吧。
- Ah... I'm sorry. ｜ 嗯…抱歉。
- A sundial that has survived the ages, always silently recording the cycles of the sun and moon as they pass through the sky. ｜ 饱经沧桑的时晷，永远在静默地记录着日月循环。
- Ah, it's all in the past now, let's just chalk it up as an intriguing experience I had on my trip here. Besides, that's not what I wanted to investigate anyway. ｜ 本来我就没想怎么样嘛，就当作是一件旅途上的奇妙见闻吧，毕竟我想调查的可不是这个。

- An island cluster suspended in mid-air. A typical feature of many adepti realms.\nA boundless world featuring nothing besides a cluster of islands. ｜ 悬于空中的诸岛。是仙人们最常幻化出的洞天形态。\n除却诸岛，天地茫茫，再无一物可见。

- You will be unable to use Elemental Skills or Bursts during these duels, but you will obtain new abilities: a Parry and Honed Techniques. When using Parry, you will raise your weapon in a defensive stance, greatly decreasing DMG taken. Parry is subject to a cooldown before it can be used again. ｜ 对阵期间，旅行者将无法施放元素战技和元素爆发，并获得新的战斗技能：「格挡」和「锐意剑技」。施放「格挡」期间，旅行者将举起武器摆出防御架势：受到的伤害大幅降低。「格挡」拥有一定的冷却时间。
- On a battlefield consumed in darkness, our soldiers fought against dark forces, creatures capable of possessing people and trapping them in nightmares. Even the Yumekui-Baku could do nothing to wake them. ｜ 征战于漆黑战场的将士，被深黯的魔物侵染，陷入不醒的噩梦。尽管有食梦貘一族尽力救助，却也只能缓解。

- In front of the camping tent, both you and your opponent are sitting cross-legged. The desert dweller shuffles the cards with dexterous hands, and those pieces of paper almost seem to flicker under the sun. You can clearly sense the tension in the air, to the point where you can even hear the sound of the wind blowing over the gravel in the distance. Now everything is set, and after a brief silence, someone says "Duel!" Thereupon, the game starts... ｜ 在营地的帐篷前，你牌局的对手和你一样盘腿而坐。沙漠人用灵巧的手切牌，无数纸片在光芒映照下烁动。气氛有一丝紧张，你绷紧神经，甚至感觉自己能清晰听到远处风吹拂过砂砾的声响。一切准备完毕，短暂沉默之后，不知是谁说了声「来吧！」，于是一场牌局就此开始…

- We were pretty quick. You're only angry because you have no sense of time. ｜ 挺快的啊，派蒙的时间观念有误。
- Yeah! ｜ 嗯！
- Calm down, bro. Now's not the time to start drinking your sorrows away. ｜ 哥哥，你冷静一点，现在不是借酒消愁的时候。
- Haha, which is it, I wonder? ｜ 哈哈哈，答案是哪一种呢？旅途中的疑问，总是如此复杂。

- "Experiment number sixteen aims to verify Jakob Ingold's research conclusions on the Primordial Sea, and use his theory as a foundation to achieve a breakthrough..."\n"The experiment was a failure. No individual managed to resurface from the Water from the Primordial Sea. Female specimens twenty-two, twenty-three, and twenty-four were dissolved..."\nThere are many more records like these. ｜ 「第十六号实验，旨在对雅各布·英戈德的原始胎海研究结论进行验证与突破…」\n「实验失败，原始胎海之水中并未有人浮现，二十二、二十三、二十四号少女被溶解」…\n诸如此类的记载还有很多。

- Still, it does not have a "sinful form." Perhaps it was merely unlucky to have been caught in the crossfire and sealed here. ｜ 不过这家伙并非「有罪之身」，应该只是单纯因为运气不好被牵连才会被封印在这里的。
- (This fancy chair really stands out in front of such an old tattered tent.) ｜ （摆在有些破旧的帐篷前的豪华椅子，看上去很是突兀。）
- Well, since he started it... ｜ 在对方报上名字的时候，你也要报上名字……
- That work is pretty much done, but I've discovered a lot more people with Abyssal Corrosion Syndrome in the process. ｜ 这块工作差不多了，但我发现患上那个「渊蚀综合征」的人比想象中还要多。
- As you are bidding farewell to Dehya, a stranger is surveying you from afar... ｜ 在你们忙于和迪希雅作别时，远处一个陌生人正窥视着你们…
- Those aren't ordinary ruins. If the records are correct, they should be King Deshret's Mausoleum. It's where the tyrant is buried. ｜ 那可不是普通的遗迹，如果文献的记载没错，那应该就是「赤王陵」，是埋葬暴君的地方。
- You ask a reader named Oosuke some questions... ｜ 你们询问了一位名叫大助的读者…
- If you're interested in a business partnership, just talk to me and I'll faithfully inform the commerce guild of the specifics of your intentions! ｜ 如有合作意向，随时可以找我聊聊，我定将您的想法准确转述给商会！

- There's No Restoring This Past Land of Beauty ｜ 恨繁囿兮作土…
- Thanks to your efforts, the rain has stopped, the clouds have cleared, and the air is freshening up. It will take time for the Tatarigami in the atmosphere to dissipate, though. ｜ 多谢你的努力，现在雨霁云散，空气不那么浊重了。只是散布在大地上的「祟神」还需时日才能消散。
- Kazuha still hasn't arrived... ｜ 枫原万叶还没来…
- She said it was alright, though. Said that her graffiti would record our tribe's famous warriors, and that if I couldn't draw anything good, I could at least become a good drawing. ｜ 「炫彩呆子」说不要紧，涂鸦还会记录著名的部族战士，我画不出厉害的涂鸦，但是可以成为涂鸦上描绘的有名人。

- Initially, the people of Aaru Village greatly resented having to take in the mad scholars. But a strange incident one night changed that... ｜ 一开始，阿如村的人们对接收疯学者一事多有不满。但后来的一天晚上，意外发生了。
- Torch Wood ｜ 炬木
- But the door looks closed... ｜ 不过门看上去好像关着…

- Once you've done what I ask, I'll treat you to something from the Good Hunter special menu! Much obliged. ｜ 等你帮完我的忙之后，我，我就请你吃猎鹿人特制料理，就拜托你了！

- Today, I will redeem myself and take back my weapon! ｜ 今天我就要洗刷耻辱，夺回我的武器！
- Were it not for the Geo Lord's power, Liyue would not be as prosperous as it is today. That is why I come here every year to pay my respects at this temple, no matter how long the journey is and no matter what other pressing business there is to attend to. ｜ 如果岩王爷不灵，如今的璃月哪里会这么富裕？所以不管路再远，事情再多，我每年都会来这倚岩殿。
- And with that, let me officially welcome you both to Sumeru City. May the wisdom of the Dendro Archon always be your guide. ｜ 二位旅客，欢迎你们来到须弥城，愿草神大人的智慧能常伴你们身边。
- Now that Paimon thinks about it, The Withering... Uh, Marana... We've dealt with it before, right? ｜ 不过这么说来，死域…也就是「无留陀」，我们之前也对付过吧？
- This one bottle must be worth at least... like, fifty thousand Mora? Hee-hee, and he gave it to us for free...! ｜ 毕竟，这瓶葡萄汁至少值好几万摩拉吧…嘿嘿，就这么送给我们…

- ... ｜ ……

- Ah, yes. Is there something you need? Things have been quite busy back here with the Tanit... ｜ 嗯…对了，你现在找我，是有什么事吗？呃，最近塔尼特的事情稍微有点多…
- Sorry, Uncle Hai, I'll move my stage someplace else. But, your musical taste needs to evolve if you wanna keep up with the times. ｜ 海伯，对不住，我换个地方就是。不过您这听曲儿的品位，可得赶赶时髦喽。

- When breaking new ground, laying foundations, and furnishing a home, it is best to select an auspicious day for the work at hand. ｜ 破土筑基，添置家具这种事嘛，挑选良辰吉日动工，才是上策。
- Don't be so cold. I'll never forget what you did for me that other time. ｜ 别这么冷淡嘛，上次那事，我可记在心上了。

- I've been waiting here far too long... But finally, I have the chance to be alone with you. All the precious time I wasted has finally paid off. ｜ 在这里等了这么久，终于找到与你独处的机会了。耗费的那些宝贵时间，也还算有点价值。
- I'm fine for now. ｜ 先不用了。
- C'mon! We were almost done here! ｜ 可恶，明明就快结束了…
- I will do my best. You have my thanks. ｜ 嗯…我会尽力记住，这次多亏二位。
- Lechlade takes the Pure Water and drinks all of it immediately. ｜ 勒克莱德接过「纯洁之水」，一饮而尽。
- The strange taste in my mouth has been washed away. ｜ 嘴里的怪味也被冲洗的一干二净了。

- #Hunts his prey using the techniques taught to him by his master and his lupical.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press}</color>\nSwings the Thunder Wolf Claw, dealing <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color> to opponents in front of Razor.\nUpon striking an opponent, Razor will gain an Electro Sigil, which increases his Energy Recharge rate.\nRazor can have up to 3 Electro Sigils simultaneously, and gaining a new Electro Sigil refreshes their duration.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Hold</color>\nGathers Electro energy to unleash a lightning storm over a small AoE, causing massive <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color>, and clears all of Razor's Electro Sigils.\nEach Electro Sigil cleared in this manner will be converted into Energy for Razor.\n\n<i>In the moment when lightning strikes, you can sometimes glimpse the look of a predator sizing up his prey deep within Razor's eyes.</i> ｜ 用师父与他的「家人」教他的方法，来解决猎物。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>点按</color>\n向前挥动雷狼之爪，对前方的敌人造成<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>。\n若命中敌人，则会为雷泽积攒一个雷之印，提高雷泽的元素充能效率。\n最多同时存在3个雷之印，叠加刷新持续时间。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>长按</color>\n积聚雷电力量引发小范围的雷爆，造成大量<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>，并清除已有的雷之印。\n每个因此被清除的雷之印，都会转为雷泽的元素能量。\n\n<i>雷击落下的一瞬，偶尔能瞥见雷泽灵魂深处那头狼打量猎物的眼神。</i>
- I don't know how Sigewinne is faring these days. But if I hear so much as the whiff of a rumor that she's being bullied, I shall summon Wriothesley here and demand an explanation. She's so kind and vulnerable... She brought me some Kamera film the last time she visited, and asked to listen to more of my commentary on the water of Natlan... How long is it until her next vacation? ｜ 希格雯不知道过得好不好。要是她受欺负了我一定要把莱欧斯利喊进城里质问。她是那么脆弱，又那么的善良。上次她回来还给我带了留影机底片，还说想要听我继续点评纳塔的水…距离她下一个假期还要多久？
- Paimon can fly. What is Paimon scared of? ｜ 派蒙会飞，为什么害怕？

- True, but the issue is... where did his sudden celebrity come from? It almost seems too good to be true. ｜ 没错，但问题就是…「这突如其来的名声，有点好过头了」。
- Uh, it's nothing. I'm just thinking... that if it were you... ｜ 唔…没什么，只是…如果是你的话…
- Not going to tell them yourself? ｜ 你为什么不自己去？

- Ah, they all disappeared... right when he was about to make his wish. ｜ 啊，都消失了，最关键的东西没听到。

- A Geovishap? It turned into a Geovishap in the water!? ｜ 岩龙蜥？那个东西放到水里变成了岩龙蜥？

- I don't care if he was a researcher that could turn dirt into Mora, once you're in the Fortress of Meropide, you're just another inmate like everybody else. ｜ 管他是能上天还是能反重力，来了梅洛彼得堡一样是阶下囚。

- #<color=#D3BC8EFF>"Old Memories, New Beginnings" - Lantern Rite Gifts</color>\nFrom February 1 to February 5, your "Old Memories, New Beginnings" Lantern Rite Gifts will be sent in 5 separate pieces of mail. These will be sent at 00:00 AM ({TIMEZONE}) each day.\nEach mail can be collected until the end of the current version.\nOnce collected, the mail will expire after 30 days.\nIf you are unable to collect the mail in real-time while logged in, please try logging in again. ｜ #<color=#D3BC8EFF>【旧忆新桃·海灯节答谢】</color>\n「旧忆新桃·海灯节答谢」将于2月1日至2月5日分为5封邮件发放，发放时间为当日0点【{TIMEZONE}】。\n每封邮件的可收取时间持续至当前版本结束。\n收取邮件后，邮件有效期为30天。\n若登录期间未能实时收取，可尝试重新登录。

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nUses Mehrak to perform up to 4 consecutive attacks.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nDrains Stamina over time to perform continuous slashes.\nAt the end of the sequence, performs a more powerful slash.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n驱动「梅赫拉克」，进行至多四段的连续攻击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n持续消耗体力，快速进行连续的斩击。\n重击结束时，会进行一次格外有力的挥砍。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。
- More youkai have expressed an interest in the human world lately. I wonder if that's a good thing or not. You want to know what I think? Hehe, I would tell them to live for the moment. Besides, how could I ever dislike a little youkai who would willingly take us out to dinner and pay for the meal? ｜ 最近对人类社会感兴趣的妖怪真是越来越多了。这种趋势，该说是好事吗？我的态度？哎呀，当然是劝大家及时行乐啦。再说，乖乖掏钱请客吃饭的小后辈，谁会不喜欢呢？

- Don't worry about it! ｜ 不用客气哦。

- Really? I mean, sorry to trouble you... Since you must be very familiar with Lady Ningguang, a permit from her might hold still more weight. Could I see it, please? ｜ 哦哦！抱歉冒犯…天权凝光大人一定与你很熟，她的许可更有分量。可否让我看一眼？

- Sounds like he hasn't changed a bit. Looks like you can stop worrying so much, Sigewinne. ｜ 听上去还是老样子，看来护士长不用担心了。

- Absolutely not... ｜ 不要…

- I do rather envy Huffman for having such a caring little brother. Mika takes care of everything around the house and even looks after him when he's drunk... Ah, how nice it must be to lounge around all day without a care in the world... Hmm? What do you mean, I already do that? You're getting quite bold these days, aren't you, cutie? ｜ 真羡慕霍夫曼先生有这样一位擅长照顾人的弟弟。不仅帮着打点生活起居，连喝醉后的护理也无微不至。啊，我也好想什么都不用操心，懒洋洋地度过每一天啊…嗯？你说我现在也差不多？哼，小可爱…胆子变大了嘛。
- What a waste of time... I'm very thankful something like that has never happened to me. ｜ 很浪费时间的行为，不是吗？我很高兴我从没遇上过。

- Yeah, I can never memorize that name, but I do remember that after the Pyro Dragon Sovereign's death, and after the first Pyro Archon was revived from the flames... ｜ 嗯，这个名字我始终记不住，不过我记得，是在火龙王死去，而最初的火之神从烈焰中苏生之后…

- I like the way you think. ｜ 嗯，我同意。

- A meat dish with the fragrant fullness of fruit. The citrusy flavor of tangerine gives the succulent duck a unique, fresh sweetness. It's so irresistibly delicious that you can barely stop yourself from reaching for the next piece even before you've swallowed the last one. No matter how much Fontaine's food culture has evolved over the years, it's no surprise that this dish has always kept its place among the classics. ｜ 带有果香的肉肴。柑果香气为腴润的鸭肉添上一丝别具一格的鲜甜，上一口还未咽下，叉子已不受控制地伸向下一块，正是如此令人迫不及待的美味。难怪无论枫丹饮食文化如何演变，这道菜肴始终能在经典中占据一席之地。

- Once you have reached your daily Encounter Point limit, any further Points gained will be converted to Long-Term Encounter Points.\nLong-Term Encounter Points will be stored, and not reset along with Daily Commissions.\nIf your Daily Encounter points are not full, you can expend Original Resin to convert Long Term Encounter Points and make up for the shortfall in daily Encounter Points, thus obtaining the corresponding rewards.\nLong-Term Encounter Points have no temporary storage limit, but they will be reset with certain version updates once a year. ｜ 每日获取的历练点达到上限后，再次获取历练点时，将转为获取长效历练点。\n长效历练点将被暂存，不会随着每日委托刷新而清零。\n每日的历练点未满时，可以通过消耗原粹树脂，将长效历练点直接转化为当日所需的历练点，从而获取对应的奖励。\n长效历练点没有暂存的上限，但将在特定版本更新时清零，每年清零一次。
- One version says that Bunkoku was the second Prime Minister in Byakuyakoku's history. He and the Sunchild bled the people white through heavy taxation and made a huge fortune. After that, he hid his treasure in a secret chamber inside the Dainichi Mikoshi. ｜ 有个故事说，文谷是第二任宰相，和「太阳之子」一起横征暴敛。然后他把财宝藏在了大日御舆的秘密房间里。

- No one knows more about ore than a blacksmith! ｜ 矿石的事，应该是铁匠最清楚吧。
- Borenka ｜ 鲍连卡
- Perfect. Okay, so I have some paper, paintbrushes, and paint at the shop. Let's go to the shop and paint your story there. ｜ 很好，那么可莉，我家店里有纸笔，还有颜料，我们一起去店里把故事画出来吧。
- Trigger Condition quantity at max ｜ 触动条件数量已达上限
- Rainbow Macarons ｜ 缤纷马卡龙
- Ah, that old trinket... I remember it being here with me, but I've grown old. I can't quite recall where it is exactly. ｜ 喔，那个老物件啊…我记得。确实在我这，但是具体放在哪…我老婆子就记不清啦。
- Spiritbreath Thorn DMG|{param9:F1P} ｜ 灵息之刺伤害|{param9:F1P}
- Come on, even the chirpiest birds clock out for the night, right? I'm no different. ｜ 再怎么伶牙俐齿的鸟儿也有休息打烊的时候，很正常吧？我也是这样哦。
- Number of Rebels captured as the Hunter ｜ 扮演猎手时，捕获游侠的次数
- (They look quite happy... Maybe that's what Windblume's all about.) ｜ （…他们看起来非常开心，或许这就是风花节该有的景象吧。）
- I didn't go in there, but I could feel some strange pulsing within... Something amazing must have been back there, I'm sure of it... ｜ 虽然并没有进入那扇大门，但我能感觉到门内奇异的搏动…那里一定存在着不得了的东西…
- ...That way. ｜ 上去的路在那边…
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- The current formula will exchange 1 of this type of fish for 1 serving of Fish ｜ 当前配方1份可兑换1块鱼肉
- An exquisite flower that has been dyed red. It represents the qualities of the Berserker. ｜ 被染红的精致花朵，与狂战士的气质微妙地相符。
- Your aid shall not be forgotten. For the completion of this errand shall one await you here. ｜ 自然忘不了你的。那这件事就交给你了，本仙就在这里等着你。
- (Passive) When battle begins, create 1 initial <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C132081]</color>. ｜ 【被动】战斗开始时，初始生成<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C132081]</color>。
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Then, we move on. ｜ 然后，我们继续前进。
- The exact same shade of green, what a coincidence. ｜ 真的是同一种色号呢，好巧啊。
- Um, I think they probably ended up... in the sea? ｜ 应该…都沉到海里去了？
- Currently in Co-Op Mode, unable to use. ｜ 当前处于多人游戏状态，不可使用
- Edit ｜ 编辑
- My wish is to grow in confidence and courage, just as I have grown in strength. I know that one day, I'll be able to go into battle without a mask on, and still have the unshakable confidence of a true hero! ｜ 我希望，我的信心和勇气，也要像不断变强的力量！总有一天，就算不佩戴任何英雄的面具，也能像英雄们那样信心满满！
- *sigh* That's the thing... We're not some high-profile theater troupe. Just a group of amateur enthusiasts. ｜ 唉，你有所不知，我们不是什么很厉害的剧团，只是一个草台班子而已。
- Ah, and isn't that a complex question? To be honest, I've read many fine texts from many a scholar, but I still don't know how to evaluate it... ｜ 这个问题非常复杂，老实说，我查阅了很多学者的著作，也不知道该怎么评估——
- Sure you don't want to back out? This is your last chance. I'll count it down... three... two... one. Welcome to the Test of Courage... Enter at your own risk. ｜ 现在你们还有退出的机会。我数三个数，三、二、一…好了，欢迎来到试胆大会。
- Find the Great Song of Khvarena in the cavern ｜ 取得洞穴中的「灵光绝唱」
- Prized Isshin Blade ｜ 「一心传」名刀
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- "Can a fisherman claim victory if he fails to bring back his catch?" — that's what he asked me in the end. ｜ 他问我，「火神大人，没能带回渔获的渔夫，究竟是赢了还是输了？」
- So please, help us, Traveler! You're our only hope! ｜ 所以，只能拜托你了！旅行者！
- Shrine Maiden ｜ 巫女
- ...Well, that was quick. ｜ …答得真快！
- Fungi Buster ｜ 绝不菇息！
- Umm... We appreciate your thought, but please give us some time to decide if we wanna keep it. ｜ 唔，到底要不要接收这份礼物，请等我们再仔细考虑考虑。
- Cryo Hypostasis's Voiceless Cry ｜ 无相之冰的清音
- It was an expression, okay? A figure of speech! I'm just... embarrassed. Here you are thanking me, even after you helped me all this time... ｜ 打个比方不行吗？真是的…明明是你们在帮我，居然还对我说谢谢…我太糗了。
- In the outset, supposing each of the Seven Archons had their criteria for granting Visions to living beings — then, does the current Electro Archon now doubt these criteria, or even the act in and of itself? ｜ 如果当初七神心中各有标尺，将神之眼赐予众生，那如今的雷之神，是对这个行为产生了怀疑吗？
- Something seems to be troubling Sakuya the florist... ｜ 花匠咲耶似乎正为了某事而烦恼…
- Rumor has it that people who've ascended to Celestia have also witnessed the same helix-shaped divine ladder that can be seen within Visions. Venturing out into the universe and down into the abyss are the same in that both are braving the dark unknown. ｜ 相传通往天空岛之人，在神之眼中——在幻视中，看到的天梯也是如此螺旋的形态。我们走向宇宙，或者下到深渊。并没有差别，因为都是未知的漆黑。
- Sorry, but I can't just take your word for it. ｜ 抱歉，我没法就这样相信你说的话。
- Goodbye. I hope that you will have a safe journey. ｜ 再见，一路顺风。
- "Spino Blaster" is approved by Lady Idyia, so you know it's safe! ｜ 「飞迸湍流大作战」得到了伊迪娅女士的批准，安全性你们大可放心！
- According to Lady Sumida, her plot setup says that the local ley lines will reproduce the will of the Thunderbird at these times. Perhaps this might yet be a lead we could use. ｜ 墨田大人说，按照她的设定，这时候鹤观的地脉活动会再现雷鸟当时的意志。或许是一个新的切入点。
- (I knew it...) ｜ （果然已经能听到了啊…）
- Perhaps I can offer you this consolation, at least — as our guests, you two will not be held accountable along with them. ｜ 唯一能安慰你们的是：作为客人，你们并不在清算范围之内。
- Chapter 1 ｜ 第一章
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- So the further we go, the more dangerous things get? I'm suddenly reminded of my quest to break the 200 push-up barrier... ｜ 越前进，越危险吗？我忽然想起了做俯卧撑突破两百大关的时候呢。
- Word of mouth isn't always reliable. As information gets passed along, it becomes incomplete, forgotten, and, sometimes... even distorted. ｜ 口口相传的话语总是不牢靠的。在转述的过程中，它会变得残缺，逐渐被遗忘，甚至被讹传。
- So anyway, is Master Diluc back yet? We didn't see him at Falcon Coast. ｜ 说起来，迪卢克老爷回来了吗？我们去鹰翔海滩的时候，并没有看见他啊？
- A feather from a bird of prey that flies almost too fast for the human eye to detect. ｜ 来自速度极快的猛禽，那奇迹般的一击肉眼几乎无法捕捉。
- Look... Look who's back! ｜ 你们看…你们看看是谁来了！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Uhh... ｜ …这。
- Ohh! Paimon gets it now! So you wanna find where that crack is, right? ｜ 哦！这么说的话，我好像明白了。你是想找出那条裂缝在哪里对吗？

- Please, just give up on me already! ｜ 赶快给我放弃！
- Energy Cost|{param8:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param8:I}
- Haha, treasure isn't something you just randomly find! You know, in all these centuries, many a disciple has sought out the grand master's treasures, but none have succeeded... ｜ 哈哈，遗宝这种东西，毕竟是可遇不可求嘛！要知道，千百年间，多少弟子都想要找到宗师留下的宝物，但终究也没人发现…
- (The next few pages are smudged and unintelligible. There is a comment from the 3rd Master at the side: This advises future generations to read extensively.) ｜ （此后数页均被涂抹，无法阅读。旁有第三代掌门批注：此为劝诫后世之人博览四方书卷。）
- Aren't Finches the Cutest? ｜ 团雀是否最可爱！
- Urubamba ｜ 乌鲁班巴
- My grandfather was so angry at the time that he smashed my great-grandfather's cherished bonsai tree... ｜ 当时我爷爷还一气之下，把曾祖父珍爱的盆栽摔坏了…
- Rest assured. As long as the accounts are in my hands, you will be paid fairly. ｜ 请您放心，只要账目还归我管理，您就一定能收到合理的报酬。
- Hello. ｜ 您好。
- You march to an end you cannot change. ｜ 继续前进也不会有任何改变。
- Rumors? About what, exactly? ｜ 坊间的传闻具体是指？
- Oh, what mein Fräulein means is that she entreats you to celebrate the arrival of the Immernachtreich with utmost zeal and great joy... ｜ 噢，小姐的意思是，诚心邀请诸位奉上最大的热忱，尽情庆贺这至夜圣土降临于世的…
- An elegant-looking Liyue dish. Once the crab is steamed, its roe and meat are carefully removed, stir-fried, then returned to the shell. Egg whites are whipped into a frothy coating to seal the crab shell, topped with finely chopped ham for a touch of color, then the whole thing is baked. Together, the succulent crab meat and fluffy egg whites make a combination that's sure to impress. ｜ 造型清雅的璃月菜品。螃蟹蒸熟后，拆好蟹黄与蟹肉，入锅煸炒后，放回到蟹壳内。将蛋清打发成雪衣糊，封住蟹壳，撒上火腿碎增色一分后烤熟。鲜美蟹肉与蓬松蛋白的组合，有让人拍手叫好的实力。
- Maybe they're resting. ｜ 没准去休息了。
- Perroux ｜ 佩鲁
- The gods have already punished us! What does one more sin matter now? ｜ 神明都已经制裁了我们，「禁忌」又算得了什么呢？
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- Fires a Super Shark Missile that can track opponents, dealing Nightsoul-aligned <color=#80C0FFFF>AoE Hydro DMG</color> based on Mualani's Max HP.\n\n<i>Mualani picked this moniker for launching her Shark Missile because it combines the warmth of explosive passion with a more chill, laid-back vibe — most hot spring-ish.</i> ｜ 发射能追踪敌人的特大号鲨鲨导弹，基于玛拉妮的生命值上限造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n<i>玛拉妮之所以把鲨鲨导弹叫这个名字，是因为里面有水有火，听起来很温泉。</i>
- But don't worry, Lady Ningguang! If you're here for an inspection, then I'm here to make it happen. Hang tight, I'll grab some of the smaller items for you right away! ｜ 不过没关系，凝光大人不用担心！您是要检查对吧，我现在就拿一些小东西过来！
- Thank you, Traveler. I'll make sure to savor these treats. As for this letter... I'll read it with great care. ｜ 谢谢你旅行者，这些点心我会好好品味的，这封信…我也会好好看一下的。
- Wanderer's Troupe ｜ 流浪大地的乐团
- A standard-issue honorary instructor's cap, only granted to those who turn down a promotion. ｜ 制式的教官帽子。是拒绝了晋升的军官才能获得的殊荣。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- You have a real knack for your work. ｜ 你果然有一套。
- Yes, we've traveled a long way for this, and gone through many adventures together. ｜ 是啊，为了这个目标，我们走过了很远的路，一路冒险一路寻找。
- "Destruction inexorable!" ｜ 「毁灭，不可阻挡！」
- From the sound of it, as long as you have the necessary commitment and the motivation, learning graffiti over a short period of time... isn't completely impossible, then? ｜ 看来，只要认认真真充满干劲，短时间内学会涂鸦…也不是不可能？
- Not that this means they wouldn't eat you too, of course! ｜ 虽然，还是会被吃掉就是了。
- Hello, how do you do? We don't often see young people like you. ｜ 呀，你好！像你这样的年轻人近来很少见呢。
- Surprise: Keen Choice ｜ 惊喜·敏锐选择

- Capture time remaining {0} ｜ 剩余诱捕时间{0}
- It can't be... The anonymous donation that was used for the venue's final round of preparations... ｜ 难道说…最后一批场地布设经费的来源，那笔不明来由的钱是…
- Restores 10% of Max HP and an additional 1,200 HP to the selected character. ｜ 为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的10%，并额外恢复1200点生命值。
- I've seen people avoiding sea monsters, but I've never seen people running to them. From what I heard, it seemed like they were studying marine life or something. ｜ 见过躲海兽的，没见过奔着海兽去的，听他们的意思，好像是什么研究海洋生物。
- That is because our go{RUBY#[S]Harvisptokhm}d cannot... be considered alive. ｜ 因为神明{RUBY#[D]万种母树}大人如今…并不能算是活着。
- About the power of the heavens... ｜ 关于「天空」的力量…
- "Why can't I draw the sword in the stone?" ｜ 「石中剑为什么拔不起来。」
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Then let's fill its tummy up! But, uhh... what do fireballs even eat? ｜ 那就把大火球的肚子填饱吧…呃，是要用什么呢？
- ? ｜ ？
- I don't understand. Then why is Lesser Lord Kusanali's birthday called "Sabzeruz Festival"? They're just being obtuse, aren't they? ｜ 我不懂啊，那为什么小吉祥草王的生日庆典要叫「花神诞祭」呢？真绕！
- Hero's Blade ｜ 勇者之剑
- Oh, so... Rex Lapis wanted me to have power beyond the average mortal so that I can be a great leader? Huh... I like to think I'd do an admirable job even without his blessing! Yeah, I'll show him... I won't give him any reason to be disappointed with me... ｜ 原来…帝君是想让我用超乎常人的力量，去带领大家。哼，就算没有这份认可，我也可以把工作做得很好！等…等着看吧！我不会让他失望的！
- Y'know what? Why don't we go back to the previous room? ｜ #对了！刚才的岔路！{NICKNAME}，不如我们返回刚才的地方看看吧！
- It has been a long time since the Sabzeruz samsara, and many things cannot be ascertained until Nahida gets back in form. Today, you go to the Adventurers' Guild as usual... ｜ 「花神诞日的轮回」事件已过去许久，在纳西妲回复精力之前，许多事情还无法查明。这天你如同往常一样，前往冒险家协会…
- Ally at Low HP: II ｜ 同伴生命值低·其二
- You mean Klee's camp. ｜ 你说的，是可莉的营地吧。
- Follow Barbara ｜ 跟随芭芭拉
- Hello. ｜ 您好。
- These guys are throwing classified documents everywhere again. Let's see what they've left behind! ｜ 唔…这群家伙又把机密文件到处乱丢了。我们看看他们留下了什么吧！
- Kind soul, so good to see you again! Would you like to sit awhile on my farm? ｜ 好心人，又碰上你了，要在我的农场里坐坐吗？
- Wow, the atmosphere suddenly got so... formal... Does Paimon, um, also have to speak really formally too? ｜ 气氛突然变得好正式！我，我也要用正经的语气说话么？
- On the other side... ｜ 与此同时，在另一边…
- On the day of my return to Fontaine, he came to say goodbye, and there I asked him if he considered his unlucky disposition bothersome. ｜ 我返程的那天，他来与我告别，我问他，这种倒霉的体质是不是很麻烦。
- Why don't you return to Mondstadt and tell your parents what you just told us? ｜ 回去以后把你刚才那番话说给你父母听听，如何？
- Hehe! Aw, you just miss us already, don'cha, you big lunk? ｜ 嘿嘿，说到底大家伙还是很挂念我们的嘛！

- You check out the fishing rod left behind by the legendary angler Matavaru... ｜ 查看传奇钓手马塔瓦鲁留下的鱼竿…
- Summer Night's Moment ｜ 夏祭之刻
- But worry not, I had a quick word with the constabulary in advance. They'll ignore the alarm if we get the questions wrong. So answer without fear. ｜ 不过不用担心，我打过招呼了。所以报警的话警卫也不会过来的。放心大胆地试一下吧。

- (Rural life is so idyllic. Living in Qingce Village would probably feel the same.) ｜ （乡村生活真惬意啊，大概住在轻策庄也差不多是这样的吧？）
- People have ever been made to choose between status and freedom. ｜ 地位与自由，自古二者只能择其一。

- 弭洋 ｜ 弭洋
- How have you been? ｜ 最近怎么样？

- Because we are oni, that's why. We share the same blood, brother. ｜ 因为我们都是鬼族啊，身上流着相同的血。
- Huh? What are they going to use it for? ｜ 啊？民众要这种魔术道具做什么？

- Very well. Goodbye. ｜ 好吧，再见。
- I once traveled to and studied at Sumeru Akademiya. The secret crafting techniques that I learned there has helped me create unique paints. ｜ 我曾去往须弥教令院游学，在那里学到的合成秘法可以让我制出世上独一无二的涂料。

- But that which is sealed beneath them is, in truth, the Abyss. ｜ 不过真实的历史是这样的，那柱子之下的其实是被封印在此的深渊。

- The things that my father has taught me, I haven't forgotten them. Let us encourage each other in our walk down the road of life. ｜ 老爹交给我的东西，我并没有全然忘记。这些为人之道，你我共勉。

- <color=#FFFFFFFF>When the character to which this is attached takes DMG:</color> If possible, $[K56] 1 card from your Hand with the highest original Elemental Dice cost to negate 1 DMG, and then gain 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Stoic's Symbol</color> point. (Once per Round)\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>When the character deals DMG:</color> If there are <color=#FFFFFFFF>Stoic's Symbol</color> points already, consume all points and increase DMG dealt this instance by 1, then draw 1 card for each point consumed. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>所附属角色受到伤害时：</color>如可能，$[K56]原本元素骰费用最高的1张手牌，以抵消1点伤害，然后累积1点<color=#FFFFFFFF>「坚忍标记」</color>。（每回合1次）\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>角色造成伤害时：</color>如果此牌已有<color=#FFFFFFFF>「坚忍标记」</color>，则消耗所有<color=#FFFFFFFF>「坚忍标记」</color>，使此伤害+1，并且每消耗1点<color=#FFFFFFFF>「坚忍标记」</color>就抓1张牌。

- A seemingly unremarkable display stand which in fact cunningly conceals secrets. Its unassuming appearance allows it to cleverly blend into its surroundings, often escaping attention from passersby. The Palais Mermonia has supposedly taken advantage of this to use it to hold spare parts for whenever they might be needed in the future. Whenever a part is required, try looking in these display stands, and you might just be pleasantly surprised by what you find. ｜ 外表平平无奇的陈列台，实则内参玄机，有着足以巧妙融入环境之中的外观，经常被人无视。据说沫芒宫就利用了陈列台的这一特性，将维修物品需要的备件放置其中，以备不时之需。每当有着备件需求的时候，就可以寻找这种陈列台，说不定会有意料之外的惊喜。

- What is it? I just finished reading today's Steambird, and the Maison Gestion wasn't mentioned. ｜ 什么消息？我刚看完了今天的《蒸汽鸟报》，上面没有提到复律庭啊。
- Thanks for bringing this. And make sure you thank him profusely for me when you get back. ｜ 谢谢你，回去的时候，也记得帮我谢谢他。
- Ohh, Paimon remembers, too! We saw that abandoned <color=#00E1FFFF>Ruin Guard sitting atop the tower</color> when we went there before! Can't forget something like that! ｜ 哦！我也懂了！没错没错，那台<color=#00E1FFFF>「坐在高塔上的守卫」</color>，确实很让人印象深刻呢！
- May the Anemo Archon protect you. ｜ 愿风神护佑您。
- What now... ｜ 这又是什…
- And that's the "fear"? ｜ 这就是恐惧？
- Yeah, let us help you. ｜ 我们也来帮忙。
- Achieve victory within 5 Rounds ｜ 5回合内胜利
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 2 ｜ 好感等级达到2后开启
- I thought I'd be steering The Alcor in a battle simulation. ｜ 我以为海战是驾驶「死兆星」号呢。
- You were out there all this time and yet you still haven't managed to learn a single crucial bit of information. Heh, I'm impressed. ｜ 你出去问了半天，一个重点都没打听到，我也很佩服你啊。
- Hehe, we weren't just watching, y'know! We've also collected loads of "pure ore." Awesome, right? ｜ #哼哼，{NICKNAME}和我也不只是在旁边看着呢！我们也采集到了很多「纯净的矿石」，怎么样，很厉害吧！
- When that happens, we often live by the principle that the quicker we can get away, the better. ｜ 这个时候，我们往往就需要…跑得越快越好。
- Are you ready? Don't shame your master now — we're about to meet that successor. ｜ 马上就要见到那位继承者了，你准备好了吗？可别让你的师父丢脸。
- Having the guts to compete with Manyoya, help little Acomitl... and you even gained Matahga's recognition — a true warrior, you are. ｜ 有胆量和曼尤雅比赛，帮阿科米蒂这小子的忙，马塔伽也认同你，是个勇士。
- Go to collect ｜ 前往采集
- Err... Err? ｜ 嗯…嗯？
- So I won't insist that you comprehend the meaning of my actions. What matters is that I tread the path of eternity on my people's behalf. ｜ 所以，我无意要你理解其中意义，仅由此身为这天下人间代行「永恒」之道便好。
- I— I mean sure, but... ｜ 这、这个，话不能这么说…
- *sigh* It's the Moonchase Festival, and the food here's only getting better... But my brother is still as weak as ever... ｜ 唉，难得的逐月节，璃月的食物更加丰富了，但我的弟弟还是那么弱…
- A uniquely-shaped container of considerable volume that has been dyed Ajilenakh Nut green. It has the unique ability to allow grape wines from Mondstadt to "breathe." Some local wines tend to produce some sediment, which is then poured alongside many bottles of said wines into containers of this kind and shaken to evenly distribute. Some free-spirited mercenaries have used these containers as a way of judging someone's capacity for alcohol. Someone capable of drinking it all will have their respect, but this is also sometimes the result of incidents. ｜ 外形特别，容积可观的器皿，漆成枣椰叶片般的绿色，对于进口自蒙德的葡萄酒而言，具有特别的「醒酒」功能。而本地自酿的一些果酒有时会出现沉淀物，人们会将多瓶果酒一同倒入其中，充分摇匀。一些豪放的佣兵则会以这种器皿作为衡量酒量的单位，能饮一壶烈酒之人，往往受到他们的尊敬，但也常常因为喝酒误事…
- If you were holding the invitation in your hand the whole time, then why did you put it down? ｜ 既然你之前一直把邀请函拿在手上，为什么又要把它收起来啊？

- Neuvillette, Sedene, hey there! What are you two talking about? ｜ 那维莱特、塞德娜，你们在聊什么呀？

- Hmm? Did you come up with that story? ｜ 编？
- Gathered by the team: #1# ｜ 队伍聚集计量：#1#
- Consumable ｜ 消耗品
- "<color=#FFACFF>Violet</color> Flower" heading to the <color=#FFACFF>desert</color> in the southwest. ｜ 「<color=#FFACFF>黛紫</color>之花」，开往西南方的<color=#FFACFF>沙漠</color>。
- Hearing you say this makes me feel more at ease. ｜ 听上去好像轻松多了。
- Paimon can't understand what he's thinking at all... ｜ 真不知道他在想什么…

- ...Sadly, I was the only one who returned home to Mondstadt with tears in my eyes... ｜ …可惜最终再次踏上故乡土地的只有我一人，任凭蒙德的风吹落眼角的泪花…
- Oh no, it's the Treasure Hoarders! ｜ 呜哇，是盗宝团！！
- Well... Guess I'll make preparations. We'll head out later! ｜ 那…那我先去做准备，待会儿我们就出发！
- Tirzad, these symbols on the stone slate should be your area of expertise, right? So, isn't it time to give us an explanation? ｜ 提尔扎德，石板上的这些符号…这些可是你的专业领域了吧？那么，你是不是该给我们讲解一下呢？
- Hm... Feels plain and ordinary. Eh? So is this place different from the other places? ｜ 哦…感觉就普普通通的。欸？那这里和其他地方不一样吗？
- Max. players reached. Cannot join Co-Op session. ｜ 多人游戏人数已满，无法加入。

- ... ｜ ……
- As for the rest, they have been captured on Kamera. Here, have a look. ｜ 更多的，便都呈现在画片中了，喏。
- Alright... Even though we feel pretty badly for him, we'll take your word for it for now. ｜ 好吧，虽然公子那家伙有点可怜，但我们就相信你吧。

- I've experienced that pain in your consciousness. It must've been a horrible experience. ｜ 我在你的意识中见识过那种痛苦了，那是很可怕的体验吧？
- These things were prepared by Hibiki. If memory serves, Domeki gave them to her because she loved playing with me and other children. It took quite a lot of effort to find them again. ｜ 这些东西是阿响之前准备的，记得是说百目鬼看她喜欢奴家和别的孩子们，特地送给她的。奴家好不容易才找到。
- Reputation Level: <color=#FFCC33>3</color> ｜ 声望等级：<color=#FFCC33>3级</color>

- Approving Audience Member ｜ 赞同的观众
- "I won't be so careless this time."\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: "Diluc" starts with the Talent Card "Flowing Flame" equipped.</color> ｜ 「嗯，这次的牌局，可不会轻忽大意了。」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「迪卢克」初始装备有天赋牌「流火焦灼」。</color>
- A picture recording the scene in Mondstadt during Windblume Festival. With fresh flowers, the Statue of The Seven, and the free people of Mondstadt, "Windblume" could be deemed synonymous with "romantic." ｜ 记录了风花节期间蒙德景观的画片。鲜花、神像还有自由的蒙德人，风花节大概就是浪漫的代名词吧。
- Perhaps it needs to regain strength after your defeat... Or, perhaps it is biding its time because it knows, with whatever rationality remains, that it cannot defeat you... ｜ 也许是被你击败后实力大损，需要休养；也许是残存的理性意识到无法击败你，所以蛰伏了起来…

- Geo ｜ 岩
- Look for Aurele and Verut ｜ 寻找奥雷勒和韦吕
- Rhodeia's Rage ｜ 洛蒂娅的愤怒
- Mwoo? Mmmmrawr... ｜ 呜…？呜呜…
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- When did you put that order in? ｜ 你什么时候订的？
- What are you doing? ｜ 你在干什么？
- Look, he really is over there! ｜ 你看，真的在那里！
- This is awkward... ｜ 有些尴尬…
- Ah... right! I shouldn't disturb the mixing process. I'll uh... be over there, just let me know if you need me. ｜ 啊…对！我可不能打扰你们调酒，我去旁边，你们需要评判的时候，叫我过来就行了。
- I was also able to see those memories just now. They were probably the ones that leaked out while Ilyas was connecting to the collective consciousness. ｜ 刚刚我也「看」到了一些。应该是伊利亚斯与集群意识连接的过程中，泄露出了部分记忆。
- About the training... ｜ 关于修行…
- "Epitomized Path" is a mechanic included in this "Epitome Invocation":\n·Once you have charted a course towards your chosen weapon, you will obtain 1 Fate Point upon <color=#f39000>receiving a 5-star weapon that is not the one you chose</color>.\n·Once you have accumulated enough Fate Points, your next 5-star weapon will be the one you chose through "Epitomized Path."\n·Your Fate Points <color=#f39000>will be reset upon obtaining an "Epitomized Path" weapon</color> during this "Epitome Invocation."\n·If you do not choose a weapon, wishes will not accumulate Fate Points.\n·You can change or cancel your selection. <color=#f39000>This will reset your accumulated Fate Points.</color>\n·<color=#f39000>When this "Epitome Invocation" ends, your accumulated Fate Points will also be reset.</color> ｜ 「神铸定轨」是本期「神铸赋形」所特有的祈愿机制：\n·对期望的5星UP武器进行定轨后，当通过祈愿在本期「神铸赋形」中<color=#f39000>获取非定轨的5星武器时，将获得1点命定值</color>。\n·命定值充满后，在本期「神铸赋形」中祈愿获得的下一件5星武器将会是通过「神铸定轨」选定的武器。\n·在本期「神铸赋形」中祈愿<color=#f39000>获得「神铸定轨」的武器时，已积累的命定值将会清除</color>。\n·未通过「神铸定轨」定轨武器时，祈愿将不会累积命定值。\n·武器的定轨状态可以进行更换，也可以取消定轨。<color=#f39000>更换或取消时，会清除已积累的命定值</color>。\n·<color=#f39000>本期「神铸赋形」结束时，已积累的命定值也将清除</color>。
- This really is the place. "The sole path to knowledge" are these bridges. ｜ 果然在这里啊，「通往知识的必经之路」说的就是这些桥了吧。
- In my department, the number of great talents who study alchemy and the function of the ley lines are many indeed. ｜ 在我们学派内，研究炼金术以及地脉运行的优秀人才实在太多了。
- You're back, Rana! Anything new? Who's the one beside you? ｜ 哟，拉娜，你回来啦！有什么收获吗？身边的客人是？
- Oh... ｜ 喔…
- This island looks pretty normal. ｜ 看起来是正常的岛屿呢。
- Hmm... Out of a maximum of 10 points, I'd give that a 9! ｜ 嗯…满分10分的话，我的评价是，9分！
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Artificer Point Details</color> ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>神工点说明</color>
- I'll tell you the rest of the story next time. ｜ 剩下的故事，就下次再讲吧。
- A fee? You mean just for introductions!? ｜ 费用？这个也要收费？！

- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Blood? Mamere, are you okay? What blood? ｜ 血…？你没事吧，玛梅赫？什么血？

- Aaagh!!! ｜ 呃啊！！
- Attack the miasmic tumor. It will struggle when it is attacked, and may create demonic creatures to stop you. ｜ 抓紧时机，攻击瘴晦瘤。但它受到攻击时，必定会奋力挣扎，甚至会有妖物滋生，以此阻挠您的行动。
- Sure. Is there something you want to talk about? ｜ 好的呀。有什么想说的吗？
- Dodocommunication Device ｜ 嘟嘟通讯仪
- Are you willing to travel together with Her Highness? ｜ 你愿意和公主殿下同行吗？
- Unlike other desert tribes, the Tanit value the power of words and knowledge, but they do not seem to trust the Akasha. ｜ 与其他沙漠部族不同，塔尼特人重视文字与知识的力量，但他们似乎并不信任「虚空」。
- "Meow?" "Many in Mondstadt know the story of the Dragon of the East and the Anemo Archon, Barbatos. But we also wonder — what does the Dragon's voice sound like?"\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: "Dvalin" is immune to Frozen, Stun, and Petrification, and starts with the Talent Card "Rending Vortex" equipped. End Phase: Attach "Total Collapse" to your active character.</color> ｜ 「喵？」「许多蒙德人都知道东风之龙和风神巴巴托斯的故事，我们也会好奇，东风之龙的嗓音是什么样的呢？」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「特瓦林」免疫冻结、眩晕、石化，并且初始装备有天赋牌「毁裂风涡」；结束阶段：对我方出战角色附属「坍毁」。</color>
- Magatama scattered through the dreamscape. Collect them to open the corresponding doors.\nSome beings within the dreamscape can also assist you in collecting these... ｜ 散落在梦境各处的奇妙勾玉，收集后，就能开启相应的门扉。\n梦境中某些存在的协助，似乎也能将其收集…
- Cheerful Torchbearer is a player from Mondstadt. This player is an old hand at the game and not to be underestimated. ｜ 来自蒙德的牌手「快乐小火把」。这位牌手久经牌局，实力不容小觑。

- Duniya ｜ 度尼娅
- Increases all party members' ATK by 274 for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色攻击力提高274点，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Before the challenge starts, adjust your <color=#FFE14BFF>attack delay</color> to optimize your toy's reaction precision.\nWith suitable attack delay parameters, you will be able to hit toys to the rhythm more easily and score higher in the challenge. ｜ 开始挑战前，可以通过调整<color=#FFE14BFF>打击延时</color>，使得玩偶更准确地响应指令。\n打击延时的数值调整得当时，即可更轻松地根据节奏打击玩偶，在挑战中获得高分。

- When Character HP is less than 50%, ATK +60%. ｜ 角色生命值低于50%时，攻击力提升60%。
- Paimon took a peek at their diagram. Your uncle had mapped out all of the Knight's patrol routes and marked out key information about Mondstadt. ｜ 我偷偷看了一眼，你的叔父靠观察和绘画，把西风骑士的巡逻路线，还有其他好多信息，都标记出来了…
- ...! The nerve! I only got involved because of you, you little scamp! ｜ 臭小子！我是因为你！
- What's more, our gourmet journey has only just begun. We can't just stop here. ｜ 而且，我们的美食之旅才刚刚开始，可不能在这里中断了啊。
- I want to hear him talk about human father and mother. ｜ 想听他说，人类的爸爸妈妈。
- See you later. ｜ 再见。
- #Okay... {NICKNAME}, let's head back and talk to Arapandu. ｜ #好哦…{NICKNAME}，那我们回去找兰般度吧。
- Watch out. It's the Fatui. ｜ 小心，是愚人众。
- A rare Medaka that glitters like crystal. Its patterns are very intricate indeed, to the point where it is often called the "Medaka Aesthete."\nSome merchants will claim that these Medaka will lay a crystal pearl under certain extreme conditions and that this pearl is both an item of great price and a sign of quality. This has made these fish very sought after by people from all walks of life and caused their market value to soar. However, this is just amusing to the fishermen, who know the inside story: That object is merely a Loach Pearl that the fish ate by mistake. It rolled into the fish's salty intestines, only to spat back out of the mouths of merchants with an agenda. Some grounds for a price hike that is! ｜ 如水晶般闪耀的珍稀鳉鱼，花纹繁复，堪称鳉鱼中的美术家。\n有商贩宣称，这种鳉鱼在极端条件中会产下一种水晶珍珠，十分名贵，是上流的象征。这让它们受到各路人士的追捧，市面上的价格也一路水涨船高。但这在了解内情的渔师眼里却颇为滑稽：那珍珠明明只是被误食的鳅鳅宝玉而已，打腌臜鱼肠滚进去，再从有心商贩嘴里吐出来，怎就摇身一变、价值连城了？
- "Guard" ｜ 「守卫」
- Magnifico ｜ 马尼菲科
- One's curiosity was piqued when Rex Lapis chose to serve as her consultant. But only now does one understand the true intent behind his decision. ｜ 早前只因为帝君在那当什么客卿，本仙才对她有些兴趣，如今方知其中真意啊。
- Mute Chat ｜ 屏蔽聊天
- Thanks to Ms. Iris, I received and read a truly enlightening document recently. ｜ 托玉霞姐的福，前段时间我有幸得到了一份文献，真是让我受益匪浅！
- So adaptable, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙太能融入环境了呢。
- Phew... That's an adventure and a half. Do all storybook heroes have to work this hard? ｜ 呼…这趟冒险还真是不简单。难道每个故事里的勇者都这么累吗？
- What if you dived from above and messed up my hair? ｜ 要是你俯冲下来弄乱我的发型，我该怎么办？
- Gods and ghosts, I've seen it all before. ｜ 神神鬼鬼的，我可见得多了…
- <color=#FFCC33>Hold your Elemental Skill</color> to adjust direction ｜ <color=#FFCC33>长按元素战技</color>以调整方向
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Skill Activation Healing|{param3:F1P} ATK+{param2:I} ｜ 技能发动治疗量|{param3:F1P}攻击力+{param2:I}
- I agree. We should at least give him a chance. ｜ 是的，我也赞同。无论如何，我愿意给他个机会。
- I am calm! You just mentioned Azariq, didn't you? I've already dealt with that filthy creature, and I wouldn't mind having a repeat performance with you! ｜ 我很冷静！你刚刚提到了阿萨里格是吧？那老狗我已经处理掉了，现在我不介意再脏一次刀！
- Try the Illumiscreen ｜ 试玩「玲珑霄灯图」
- Hmm? Hello, is something up? ｜ 咦？你好，有什么事吗？
- I'm afraid I've already told you before: Fur from The Cat's Tail staff is not for sale, no matter how much Mora you offer. ｜ 不过，已经说过很多次了，虽然你出价很高，但是想要购买我们家店员毛发这种事…还是不能被允许的哦。
- Virgil ｜ 维吉尔
- Yes, something like that. Dougier must have told them something to make them think I won't take their side. ｜ 嗯，杜吉耶一定对他们说了什么，让他们认为我不会为他们出头。
- Well, that's not what I meant... But if you're really starving, I do have some grilled meat in my bag. Anyway, let's set that aside for now... ｜ 倒不是这个意思…要是你肚子实在饿的话，我随身带的包里还有点烤肉。不过这个先放到一边…
- (It seems to hiding the distinctive flavor of some kind of <color=#00E1FFFF>spice</color>.) ｜ （似乎藏着某种<color=#00E1FFFF>香辛料</color>的独特风味…）

- Plunge DMG|{param9:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param9:F1P}
- It's just my job. Some people don't trust my origins, and if there's one thing I hate above all, it's doubters. ｜ 分内之事而已。有些人对我的出身不够信任，而我最讨厌质疑的声音。
- We have been unable to find a way to deal with that ice, so we've had to go around it... ｜ 我们也一直找不到对付那些冰的办法，只能尽量绕开走…

When a character is within a Lush Field, they will gain a <color=#f39001>{2}%</color> Electro and Dendro DMG Bonus. <color=#f39001>1</color> such <color=#f39001>Lush Field</color> can exist at once ｜ <color=#7bb100>茂雷飞核</color>命中敌人后，将在角色的位置产生持续<color=#f39001>{1}</color>秒的<color=#f39001>丰茂区域</color>，此效果每<color=#f39001>{0}</color>秒至多触发一次。角色处于丰茂区域内时，将获得<color=#f39001>{2}%</color>雷元素和草元素伤害加成。至多同时存在<color=#f39001>1</color>个<color=#f39001>丰茂区域</color>

- We'd like to borrow a censer and some lamps. ｜ 我们想借一下这里的香炉和灯。

- There is another who wishes to take part in the ceremony, and I cannot disregard their intentions. I must wait for them to arrive. ｜ 想要参与这场仪式的人还没有到齐，我不能不尊重另一人的意见。

- I... I... ｜ 我、我…
- A joyful pose. ｜ 开心的姿势。

- Come now, you should thank these two. Without them, we would have never been able to rescue you. ｜ #来，快感谢一下{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}们两个人，是{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}们救了你。

- There is nothing here now. Just a majestic yet suppressed life force. ｜ 这里已经不存一事，只有被压制的磅礴生命之力。

- Even if we'd ended up running into an incredibly strong demon, I would've felt much safer with an experienced adventurer like you by my side. ｜ 就算是遇上了非常强大的妖邪，有你这样经验丰富的冒险家在我身边，我也会安心不少。
- I never doubted you in the first place... ｜ 我一直都认可着烟绯。

- Let's play Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 进行「七圣召唤」的对局吧。
- Every so often, you see him glance toward a particular direction with a pained expression on his face, as if an invisible thread is tying him to an unknown place. ｜ 他经常会向某个固定的方向望去，眼神痛苦，仿佛有根无形的细线一直纠扯着他。

- Please follow me. We have already confirmed its whereabouts. All that needs to be done is to track it down. ｜ 请您随我来，我们已经探查到了赤鹫巢穴的位置，接下来只需要追踪它就可以了。
- Safe to say, were it not for my previous experiences in combat, my skills would not have been up to the challenge. I would most certainly have been defeated. ｜ 可以说，若是没有此前的经历与见闻，没有刀中之力，我定会落败。

- A dark-colored pastry. The Ajilenakh Nuts were first roasted and powdered before being sieved, added to a batter, mixed evenly, and then baked. The final product by no means looks impressive, but it exudes the fresh aroma of Ajilenakh Nuts, and it tastes better still with some jam. ｜ 乌漆墨黑的甜饼。先将枣椰烧制成粉状，过筛提纯，再加入面糊，搅拌均匀后烤熟。其貌不扬的成品带有淡淡的枣椰清香，搭配果酱尤为香甜。
- Losing a talisman like that is definitely a bad omen... ｜ 护身符遗失，这显然是特别不好的预兆…
- Ahhhh, it's Prince Qubad... Could I please get your autograph? ｜ 呜哇，科巴德王子…请问你可以给我签名吗？

- Anyone that dares to mess with one of my friends deserves a stern talking to and then some. ｜ 更何况，他居然敢对我的朋友下手。
- Oh, uh... And if you've got any unfinished business, best take care of that first then call me when you're done. ｜ 哦…如果你有什么事要办的话，你就忙完再叫我。
- Look, there's a line of text under the photo... ｜ 咦？画片下有一行小字…

- That's amazing! You can do something like that? ｜ 哇，好厉害！还能做到这种事吗？

- Ah, she does often have impressive, curious ideas. She really does know how to use unexpected things as potions ingredients... ｜ 啊，药剂师大人经常会有了不起的奇思妙想。总能用意想不到的东西作为配方的材料…
- Evolving out of the primordial elemental creatures into dragons, then evolving step-by-step into humans, until you step onto the stairway to heaven itself... How puerile. How childish. ｜ 由原始的元素生物进化为龙众，再一步步演化为人，直至踏上登天之梯…真是幼稚。

- I think she's a kid from Fontaine. She's the wee small sort, and has a very cute nose... ｜ 好像是从枫丹来的小朋友呢，个子小小的，鼻子也长得很可爱…

- The Flower-Feather Clan has survived to this day by relying on such human-Saurian cooperation. That's something that will never change even in the future. ｜ 花羽会就是这样靠着人和龙的合作留存至今的，这一点在今后也不会发生改变。
- Raw Meat ｜ 兽肉
- So, you are Masseira's daughter? ｜ 孩子，所以说…你是马塞拉的「女儿」？
- They have a great future ahead of them, so no complaints from me. I just want to know how they're doing. ｜ 孩子们都有远大的前程，我没什么好抱怨的，就是有点担心他们过得怎么样。
- Oh! That's right! Then let's get going. If we run into any trouble, you can count on me to protect you. I am a guard after all. ｜ 哦！对哦。那就走咯，我也会保护好你们，毕竟我是镖师嘛。

- ...Hah, so Ms. Yun sent you. ｜ …是云老板叫你来的吗？
- Click on the corresponding button or avatar and select the Fungus to unleash its Skill, which is a powerful ability that can help you take control of the battle. ｜ 使用对应的按键或点击头像，选择蕈兽，则可以施放该蕈兽的「战技」，用这种强大的招式主导战局。
- Freminet's working really hard. ｜ 菲米尼很努力。
- Hello, traveler. Welcome to Mondstadt. ｜ 你好，旅行者，欢迎来到蒙德城。
- I can only give you surface-level help, like bits of information and subtle hints. For the rest of the time, I'll be doing all I can to slow down Dunyarzad's illness. ｜ 我会提供一些知识层面上的帮助和一些潜移默化的暗示，而剩下的时间…我都会在这里全力减缓她身上魔鳞病的恶化。
- Ah, so that's what you uncovered in the end. Hmm, I'm not quite sure how I feel about that. ｜ 原来谜底是这样…让人不知该以怎样的表情面对呢。
- No problem! ｜ 没问题！
- Panicking Toy Guard ｜ 慌张的积木小人
- In addition, I also do some composing, choreography, stage design, and action direction. ｜ 此外，也做些作曲、编舞、舞台设计、动作指导等工作。
- Lightning Protective Tent ｜ 硬顶避雷帐篷
- Adventurer, did you place a Dandelion in this envelope to try and prove you are from Mondstadt? ｜ 冒险家，请问是您把蒲公英夹在里面，想以此来证明您从蒙德来吗？
- This place is not what I'd call soundproof. ｜ 这里隔音不好。
- Seize the Day ｜ 把握每日
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- That can't be... ｜ 不应该…
- "The Stove God cared for the people, turning himself into minions who went into every home, fostering food and solidarity alike." ｜ 「灶神惜护民生，化出分身潜入千家万户帮着生火做饭，助人团圆。」
- I respect your curiosity, but I'm off the clock now, so I'm not going to field any questions. ｜ 尊重你的好奇心，但现在是下班时间，我不会回答了。
- Ooooh, look at the little white snowflakes dancing in the wind, to and fro, and... whew, isn't it... beautiful! C'mon, c'mon c'mon, sit with me... Watch... ｜ 白茫茫的雪在风里跳舞，真好看呢。嗯…我旁边的座位还空着，没人坐哦。
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- *sigh* When can we go back to the way things were, with everyone going down into the mines together... ｜ 唉…不知道什么时候能恢复到以前，大家一起下矿时那样啊…
- It's natural to fear strength. I take no objection to it. ｜ 畏惧力量是正常的。不必介意。
- Don't forget your promise! You'd better convict that two-timing traitor! Pin him to the wall! ｜ 别忘了你们答应的，要狠狠给那狗老贼定罪啊！
- I don't use this pot to brew tea. So don't worry. ｜ 我不会用它泡茶的啦，放心。
- Obtain 10,000 realm currency. ｜ 获得10000份洞天宝钱。
- Ask away, judges! ｜ 请尽管提问吧，评委！
- I mean, I can take them. I have a few regular customers I can talk to, they should be able to salvage the raw materials. Shouldn't take long at all. ｜ 这些东西我倒是可以收，原料类的东西我联系一下老主顾，应该很快能卖掉。
- I hope I never end up on the wrong side of you. ｜ 以后可不敢得罪你了。
- Adventurer's Bandana ｜ 冒险家头带
- You could almost certainly pawn this for a not-insignificant amount of Mora. ｜ 要是处理得当，也能卖出个能看的价钱。
- <color=#FFCC33>Recommendation:</color> Complete tribal challenges ｜ <color=#FFCC33>「推荐」</color>完成部族挑战
- (When did this dagger get here?) ｜ （这里…什么时候多了一把匕首？）
- Please enter a valid Sharing Code ｜ 请输入正确的分享码
- By process of elimination... ｜ 排除其他可能…
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- Goodbye, the one blessed by the Anemo Archon. May the Wind of Mondstadt always be with you. ｜ 再见，风神庇护的人，愿蒙德的风一直护佑着你。
- To my surprise, as soon as the melody began, my mind began to drift, and I could hear the sound of someone playing along with me... somehow, it all felt so familiar... ｜ 没想到，琴声初起，我便一阵恍神，彷佛有人正与我合奏，那感觉，似曾相识...
- Traveler, what's wrong? ｜ 旅行者，怎么了吗？
- How could this— ｜ 欸——？！
- Go to the Lesser Shadow Pin with Titu ｜ 与蒂图一同前往「小缝影针」
- He even said that about Tirzad! That was too much! He's saying we faked it just because he couldn't find a way into the ruins himself! ｜ 并且还那样说提尔扎德，太过分了！明明是他自己没有找到进入遗迹的方法，就说别人在造假。
- You are most filial, Shenhe. One is flattered by the likeness. ｜ 申鹤孝顺，本仙甚是欣慰。
- B—But, your son... ｜ 可是…可是…你儿子他…
- Hero Who Stood Against Defilement ｜ 曾以身躯抵挡污秽的勇者
- And what about you, Paimon? ｜ 那派蒙你呢？

- In fact, those pigeons even... ｜ 而且，那群鸽子还…
- Then let's go! Next stop, Dragonspine. "If there's a mountain, we shall climb it!" ｜ 那么，出发吧！目标是龙脊雪山！「因为，山就在那里！」

- Awanyu ｜ 「阿万尤」
- Hah! Have you come here to mock me, Eula? ｜ 哈！你是来嘲笑我的吗？优菈。
- Search for the item Bao'er lost ｜ 寻找宝儿丢失的东西

- Accept ｜ 接受
- Suspicious Fruity Duet ｜ 奇怪的双果清露
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Ah, so there is a night raven dozing off while stepping on this platform. No wonder we couldn't activate the lift! Let's try waking it up... ｜ 原来是有个夜鸦踩在踏板上睡觉，怪不得电梯没有办法启动，我们得把它叫醒…
- Based on the Quartier Lyonnais in the Court of Fontaine, this place is filled with tons of Fontainian specialty stores and tables at which to also rest and enjoy some tea.\nSome experienced tourists will tell you that you can ask the residents here if you are unfamiliar with the stores and characteristics of the goods on sale. Since many stores strictly follow the price controls set by the Palais Mermonia, very few people will purchase items with incongruent prices. ｜ 参照枫丹廷利奥奈区所布置的街道，有着多种枫丹的特色商铺，以及购物之余休息品茶的桌位。\n据一些游览经验丰富的游客所说，若是来到枫丹后，不太熟悉各种门店和所售商品的特点，可以放心请教附近的市民。由于大部分店铺都严格遵循沫芒宫定制的商品价格管控原则，很少有人买到不符价格的商品。
- What was the purpose of Grand Master Varka's expedition? ｜ 法尔伽大团长为什么要发起远征呢？
- I'll put in a good word for you with the gentlemen at the winery. ｜ 我会记得跟酒庄的老爷们美言你几句的，拜拜。
- May our cooperation be fruitful. Farewell. ｜ 希望我们能够愉快合作。再见。
- Cabin of Intense Purity ｜ 猛烈纯洁小屋
- Purchased from the Rag and Bone Shop ｜ 「破烂骨头商店」购买
- I—I'll stop you in your tracks! ｜ 我，我会在这里拦住你们的！
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param5:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param5:F1}点
- "Wolfgang." ｜ 「沃尔夫冈留。」
- Mhm! Being free sure feels pretty special now. ｜ 嗯！自由的感觉好特别呀。
- Unlocks at Ascension Phase 4 ｜ 突破等级「4」阶后开启
- Madam Madeleine! Why did your son go to the newspaper? What did he do there? Tell us everything! ｜ 马德莱娜夫人！你家小孩为什么去报社？去报社干嘛了？把你知道的都告诉我们！
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利

- Aloof, huh? Well, to be fair, there was a period when I was like that. Around the time when I first joined the tribe. ｜ 「孤傲」？要说的话…确实也有过那么一段时期…差不多是我刚来花羽会的时候吧？
- Besides sandstorms, we also occasionally get earthquakes... According to an investigator who stayed in the village a while ago, these unusual natural phenomena are related to the withering of Irminsul. ｜ 除了沙尘暴，偶尔还会出现地震…这些反常的自然现象，听之前在村里暂住的调查员说，是跟世界树枯萎有关的。

- King of Constellation Metropole ｜ 星轨王城国王
- Aeval ｜ 爱贝尔
- (There is a wine jar in front of the chair on the south-west side. Engraved on this chair is: "Here sits Retainer.") ｜ （位于西南面，前面的桌子上摆着一个酒壶的椅子上刻着「此处居留云」。）

- Yazadaha Pool ｜ 天臂池
- Of course! I mean, not as intensely as those other places, but once I've got them ready, they're just as good as anywhere else. ｜ 没错~虽说温度比官窑要低一些，但烧制出来的瓷器品质丝毫不比官货差哦。
- Surging Blade Interval|{param6:F1}s ｜ 流涌之刃间隔|{param6:F1}秒
- It's you! What a coincidence! I never expected to meet you here of all places. ｜ 是你啊！这可真是太巧了，没想到会在这里遇见你。
- There will sometimes be spherical beam <color=#FFE14BFF>relays</color> on the tracks, and their <color=#FFE14BFF>movement</color> can be <color=#FFE14BFF>controlled</color> by regulating valves.\nWhen they receive a beam, the beam relays will fire off another beam in a certain direction. ｜ 有时轨道上会有球形光束<color=#FFE14BFF>中继器</color>，通过调节阀等装置能<color=#FFE14BFF>控制</color>其<color=#FFE14BFF>移动</color>。\n接收到光束时，球形光束中继器会向一定的方向射出光束。
- Clever Stratagem: Assault Tactics ｜ 巧策进斗·攻坚战法
- Learn about the situation from Jahangir ｜ 向贾汉吉尔询问情况
- You're not trying to trick me into going to Xocolatl Beverages again, are you? How about... No. ｜ 不会又要骗我去卡考苦饮铺了吧？别。
- <color=#498fccFF>Sharktacular</color> Surfari ｜ <color=#498fccFF>鲨鲨</color>逐浪游
- Seed of Skandha ｜ 蕴种印
- Oh? Do you know him? ｜ 哦？难道你们认识他？
- You head to Ritou with Sumida to ask Kama some questions... ｜ 与墨田一同前往离岛，询问阿釜…
- A cutting obtained from the Seed Dispensary. A quality cutting full of life, just waiting to be planted in the Realm Within's fields. After some time it will grow into a Sea Ganoderma. ｜ 通过「化种匣」获取的样本，富有活力，品质上佳，种植于壶中洞天的田亩后，可在一段时间后生长为「海灵芝」。
- Sharky's Surging Bite Additional DMG Bonus|{param3:F2P} Max HP ｜ 巨浪鲨鲨撕咬伤害额外提升|{param3:F2P}生命值上限
- But I promise you... all will eventually end in a magnificent and dramatic trial, and everyone will be saved. ｜ 而我承诺你，一切都会在一场盛大的，如同戏剧般的审判中结束，所有人都会得救。
- Thundersoother's Plume ｜ 平雷之羽
- Dragon Blood Buff ｜ 龙血BUFF
- Ahangar swings his hammer so fiercely that Garcia has to back away from him... ｜ 阿汉格尔猛烈挥舞着铁锤，加尔恰不得不躲到了一边…

- About the Scholars ｜ 关于学者…
- Let's go have a look! ｜ 我们也跟上去看看吧！
- *sigh* I feel so ashamed. I was tied up with administrative work when the two of you were fixing the Mikage Furnace. ｜ 唉，我真是惭愧啊，在您和泽维尔先生修理「御影炉心」的时候，我居然被文书工作给绊住了手脚…
- Shall we? ｜ 那我们出发吧。
- Huh, this child... Did you see what they look like? ｜ 你看清那个小孩的模样了吗？
- Didn't I tell you before? I'm not looking for more workers. ｜ 刚刚不是说了吗？我这里不缺帮工了。
- It might be time to check the durability of the bearings... ｜ 是不是该检查一下轴承的耐久度了…
- "Who is that fox at the Yanshang Teahouse? Last time I had the misfortune of sharing a table with her I spent all of my money!" ｜ 「岩上茶室的那个女狐狸是什么来头！上次晦气与她同桌，我的钱全搭在里面了！」
- See you, Blanche. Bye, Bulle Fruit. And goodbye to the two of you too. ｜ 再见了，小布兰奇。再见了，泡泡桔兄弟。再见了，两位朋友。
- Wreath Arrow DMG|{param7:F1P} ｜ 花筥箭伤害|{param7:F1P}
- Really? Thank you so much! ｜ 真的吗？那真是太感谢你们了！
- Wooden Dummy 1 ｜ 123木头人
- Strolling around the streets, roasting Lavender Melons with friends in the open country... I know it sounds pretty silly, but that's the life that I want. ｜ 走街串巷，和大家一起蹲在田间捧着烤得热乎乎的堇瓜…有点笨，是吧？但应该是我想要的生活。
- Haha! If you want to teach unsavory characters a lesson, you must become yet more unsavory. Looks like you already know that. ｜ 哈哈！要惩治恶人，必得比恶人心肠更硬。看来你已经懂得这个道理了。
- I will let you prepare. Takatsuki Dougire and I will be here, no matter how long we must wait. ｜ 我可以让你准备，无论你要准备到何时，我和「贵月胴切」都会在这里等你。
- As for Ajaw, after his time out is over, I'll let him experience the thrill of ropeless bungee jumping for himself. ｜ 至于阿乔，我会在禁闭结束之后，让他体验「无绳蹦极」的快乐。
- Complete the prerequisite conditions to unlock ｜ 完成前置条件后解锁
- The Statue of Her Excellency, the Almighty Narukami Ogosho, God of Thunder that Sara has been hankering after. Go on, go give it to her. ｜ 裟罗心心念念的「御建鸣神主尊大御所大人像」，快带去给她看看吧。
- "The waters gleam, the fish they leap~" Ring a bell? ｜ 「水光鳞澜，鱼儿跃~」怎么样，是不是有印象了？
- (Chili Pepper hums in a low voice. It seems to really enjoy your hugs.) ｜ （椒椒发出了低沉的哼哼声，你的拥抱让它很开心。）
- #Right? {NICKNAME}? ｜ #对吧，{NICKNAME}？
- According to the leader of the adventure team at that time, they'd started to lose patience with this place after exploring it for some time to no avail. ｜ 据当时领导冒险的冒险队队长说，他们在那个灰蒙蒙的环境里折腾了很久，大家都开始有些失去耐心了。
- #{M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} {NICKNAME}, let's jump in from above, or else we'll step on the little purple flowers and make the giant really mad! ｜ #{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}，我们从高处跳进去吧，不然踩到紫色小花，巨人肯定会发脾气的！
- Did you say, ore veins? ｜ …矿脉？
- Battle-Hardened Foliar-Swift Wayob Manifestation ｜ 历经百战的疾叶·大灵显化身
- If we can dredge all the blockages, we will be able to connect the islands to form the giant instrument described in Albedo's notes, and play music using the islands themselves. ｜ 如果所有脉络都被打通，它们就会连接起来，形成阿贝多笔记中所说的「巨型乐器」，以岛屿为单位演奏了。
- Excuse me, but can you both take a moment to discuss something else for now? The adventurer assigned to your commission has returned. ｜ 先生，女士，可否先将矛盾放到一边，为你们执行委托的冒险家已经回来了。
- Wonderful! There should be some in the woods. ｜ 太感谢了，应该就在周围的树林里。
- There's a lot that goes into managing an orchard: watering, weeding, fertilizing the soil, making sure the temperature's right... But most importantly, you have to keep the fruit in a good mood! ｜ 种水果要考虑很多事，及时浇水除草，配好矿石粉末，补充土壤养分，保持温度不冷不热..不过最重要的，还是要照顾好水果们的心情，嗯！
- They will definitely meet again, someday. ｜ 它们还有机会见面的，总有一天…
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Why do you struggle when you are so weary? Why must you seek pain? ｜ 为何疲苦挣扎，为何自寻痛楚…
- ...I've got a gift for you, too. ｜ 那我也有东西送你。
- Sangonomiya Samurai ｜ 珊瑚宫军士
- Oh yeah, that's right! Taisuke and Etsuko are adventurers, so they might know something. ｜ 对喔，大祐和悦子是冒险家，说不定他们会知道些什么。
- When there are less than {0} bricks on the board, and the ball lands another hit, the bar will frontally unleash {1} fireworks. Should these fireworks hit a brick, they will inflict DMG. This effect can be triggered once every {2}s. The number of times that the fireworks impact bricks will be counted toward the total Combo count. ｜ 场上剩余游艺方块数量小于{0}时，成功击球后，弹板将向前方发射{1}枚焰火弹，焰火弹命中游艺方块，将造成一定的伤害。此效果每{2}秒至多触发1次，焰火弹命中游艺方块的次数将被计入连击。
- See you. ｜ 再见。
- Got launched into the air by items 5 times or more ｜ 被道具击飞5次及以上
- Confused? Well, it is quite normal to, after having re-attained wisdom, be flooded by the sea of information. ｜ 感到迷惑吗，重新获得智慧时，自我会被淹没在如海的信息之中，感受到迷茫是正常的。
- Did it escape? Whatever it is, it's definitely an elemental life form with a reaction like that. ｜ 它是逃走了吗？明明是元素生物，居然会有这种反应。
- This must be Petrichor's natural charms at work. ｜ 一定是佩特莉可镇的镇子魅力。
- Your point of view on these matters has truly been eye-opening for me, I have a lot to learn! ｜ 前辈你看待问题的角度，真的很值得我学习！
- You once got their sales up to record numbers, I'll have you know. ｜ 而您，曾经帮他们攀上了销量最高点。
- Now, before we head back to the campsite, there's one more experiment: intelligence. ｜ 好了，在返回营地之前，让我们进行最后一项，也就是智能方面的实验吧。
- This epic will be remembered in the actions of every valiant warrior and brave saurian, all equally important and indispensable. ｜ 每一位坚强的战士，每一只勇敢的龙，都是组成这段史诗的符号，同等重要，意义非凡。
- Zero Hour Invokation ｜ 零时召唤
- Honestly, I was starting to get worried that I might take longer than expected to finish the whole statue. Well, that's not a problem now, thanks to you! ｜ 我还在担心，一直这样的话，说不定整个雕像的工期都会延长…还好你帮我找了这些肉过来。
- Is it... because she actually doesn't have money? ｜ 是因为…她其实很缺钱吗？
- During the "Search for Lost Spirits" challenge, the scattered Roaming Spirits will <color=#FFCC33>stay away from nearby characters</color>. Use this to drive the Roaming Spirits away and gather them in the <color=#FFCC33>Spirithub</color> to accumulate Spirit Count.\nWhen you successfully gather a "Shining Spirit," you will receive more Spirit Count. ｜ 在「迷途灵性的搜觅」挑战中，散落的游灵将<color=#FFCC33>远离周围的角色</color>，利用这一特性驱赶游灵，将其聚集至<color=#FFCC33>回归区</color>，即可累积游灵计量。\n成功聚集「辉光游灵」时，将获得更高的计量。
- It goes without saying that Venti clearly does not match up with our culprits. ｜ 而温迪明显不符合犯人的特征。
- Oh! There is no way she— Well, actually, you know what, you could be right... she gets treated pretty well in the Arataki Gang. I mean, every time we win some snacks, she does get first pick... ｜ 嗯？也有那么点道理…阿忍在荒泷派的待遇这么好，每次赢到新的零食都是让她先挑…
- Viridescent Venerer's Diadem ｜ 翠绿的猎人之冠
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Eh? Well, it's alright if you don't wanna know. I'll just play with Ms. Contarini then. ｜ 欸？要是叔叔不想知道的话就算了，我去找康塔莉妮姐姐打牌啦。
- This culprit really knows how to pick his targets. Aside from Mr. Kanbei, the owner of Netsuke no Gen Crafts, Mikoshi Genichirou, was also a victim. ｜ 这个犯人的作案手法还真是准确。除了勘兵卫先生之外，「根付之源」的店主御舆源一郎先生也是受害者。
- Mysterious Letter ｜ 神秘的信笺
- Just like the Pyro Archon's concept of time — the past, the present, and the future exist at once. This moment is a convergence of all three. ｜ 我很赞同火神大人的时间观，认为过去现在与未来同时存在，而我们现在就站在这样的一个节点之上。
- Ugh, fine, I—I'll try my best not to eat anything in the middle of the night. ｜ 我…我尽量不在半夜吃东西。
- Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Chihayaburu</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>千早振</color>的技能等级提高3级。\n至多提升至15级。
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- Haha... Ahh, you make me laugh. ｜ 哈，说笑了。
- #{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} CD|{param3:F1}s ｜ 点按冷却时间|{param3:F1}秒
- So, have you chased those boars away? ｜ 你把那些林猪都赶跑了？
- Wait... Paimon feels like we're forgetting something... ｜ 嗯…？总觉得好像忘了什么…
- Trusting another person isn't easy, especially for someone of high status. Place your trust in the wrong person, and it can quite literally cost you your life. But you have placed your trust in me, and of course I will not let you down. ｜ 信任他人不是一件容易的事，特别是对于位居高位的人来说。一旦错付了，付出生命的代价也不算少见。不过，你已经给了我信任，那我自然也不该辜负。
- Bounty of the Earth ｜ 大地的馈赠
- Hey, c'mon, enough about the pages! Aren't you trying to make "That Dish" and prepare the relevant ingredients for it? ｜ 不要再提书页啦！是你们刚才说的「那件事」啦，准备食材的事情！
- Unfortunately, given that said antagonist is under the protection of two Commissions and the Raiden Shogun, we would be rather hard-pressed to track them down. ｜ 只可惜如今，在两奉行与雷电将军的庇护下，还揪不出那个搅局人的尾巴。
- Attack here first. ｜ 先攻此处。
- Fruit Pit ｜ 果核
- Unlocks in: {0} ｜ {0}后解锁
- The following labor shall be little, but it is still a radiant shard. Yasnapati mine, record it down with a reverent heart, and use even this mote of shattered light to grace your mighty hymn. ｜ 接下来的功业虽小，但也是光辉的破片，「谒颂主」可要怀着虔敬之心好好记录，以便将这零碎的光彩点缀于吾之颂诗之上啊。
- The place that Fassben wants to take a picture of appears to be nearby... ｜ 法斯宾想要「留影」的地点，似乎就在这附近…
- What an ambitious project... ｜ 好宏大的工程…
- #So what do you think, Kazuha? {F#She}{M#He} totally dominated that guy, and did it with style, too. ｜ #你也看到了吧，万叶！{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}战斗的时候一点都不拖泥带水，赢得又干净又利落。
- Huh? Paimon doesn't think this is another riddle... ｜ 咦？这次好像…不是谜语？
- We walk the righteous path, and the Pyro Archon will guide us. ｜ 我们走在正确的路上，火神大人会带领我们。
- Seymour ｜ 西摩尔
- Exactly, just like that. Now, set yourself a small goal to start with, for example, knit a scarf by the time winter arrives. ｜ 没错。先定一个小目标，在冬天之前织出来一条围巾吧。
- In my opinion, we face two obstacles in this case. Firstly, we have very little information to go on, and I must be cautious about taking a stance. This makes it difficult to investigate. ｜ 在我看来，无非两点。首先，我们掌握的信息太少，我办事又要顾及立场，这件事不好查。
- Go back to Yanshang Teahouse and check the manifesto ｜ 回岩上茶室调查规划书
- Too ordinary! Hmph, such an uninspired dish will never have my approval! ｜ 太「普通」了！哼，这种缺乏特色的料理得不到我的认可！
- "The wind is very strong here, so I'm not going to use a notebook." ｜ 「风很大，就不用笔记本了。」
- It's finally Paimon's turn! I'm Kevin, a problem child! I'm here to get Sir Arthur to spread the word that my dad's a big fat weasel. ｜ 终于轮到我出场啦！我是凯万，一个问题小孩！我来这里，是想要让亚瑟先生公开传播我爸爸是个混蛋这件事。
- Crossa ｜ 克洛莎
- I need to rest. Everyone, please excuse me for a while. ｜ 我要休息一会儿，各位，暂时失陪了。
- But take a look at this specimen. The build, the coat... And there's a distinct force at work here. ｜ 但你看这一只，它的体格，它的毛发，它的姿态，你能看到它与众不同的生命张力。
- Fixed Torch: Safeguard ｜ 固定火炬-「卫护」
- Let's go work in the production zone. ｜ 去生产区打工。
- Alright, let's contact the caravans first and purchase some Vasanti Grass. We can also ask about the contaminated region. ｜ 好。那我们先去联系商队，向他们购置一些「逢春草」，顺便打听一下污染区的事情。
- Thanks for your concern. ｜ 多谢关心。
- Anyway, I've brought them to the Akademiya as ordered, but it took some time and trouble. ｜ 总之，人我已经按照您的吩咐带到教令院里来了，尽管费了一番周折，花了不少时间。
- You have returned. Have you fed those rascals? ｜ 汝等回来了，喂过那群小家伙了吗？
- Raooo... ｜ 呼呼…
- But I'll try my best for Lesser Lord Kusanali. If I can somehow use my abilities to help you, then count me in. ｜ 但为了小吉祥草王大人，我愿意尝试。假如我的力量能帮到你们，就再好不过了。

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙

- Yi Zhu ｜ 一柱
- They pertain to three whose Visions were taken from them... Perhaps once you've met them, you will understand... ｜ 是关于，三个失去神之眼的人…等你见过他们，或许就能明白…
- Icy Harvest ｜ 冰冷的收获
- Explosions and the sounds of a collapse echo from the ruins. ｜ 遗址中传来爆炸和倒塌的声音。
- Venti ｜ 温迪
- Of course not. I'll be staying here for some time to stop other rash researchers like you from entering the desert. ｜ 当然，接下来我要在这里待上一些时日，防止再有像你一样的急躁学者进入沙漠。
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 打倒所有敌人
- I imagine most people think of academia as so strict and rigorous that they think scholars are uninterested in works of fiction. ｜ 可能大家会觉得，学术是严肃和严谨的，所以学者们多半不喜欢故事书。
- I'm not writing your obituary! ｜ 喂！我可不想写讣告！
- Become an Advanced player;You can earn more rewards after completing tougher Guest Challenges\nCan reach Player Level 4\nCan accept Tavern Challenges ｜ 成为七圣召唤高级牌手;来客挑战的难度与完成挑战后的奖励得到提升\n牌手等级的上限提升至4级\n可以进行酒馆挑战的对局
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Attaboy! ｜ 就是你了！
- Wow... You've got a wild imagination, huh? We don't have that sort of relationship. ｜ #哇！你这胡思乱想的角度也太奇怪了吧！我和{NICKNAME}的关系可不是你说的这样。
- We offer a lot of fun courses for our newcomer training, including fishing, photography, chess... ｜ 我们新人培训里提供了很多兴趣爱好课程，包括花式捕鱼、留影、下棋、斗虫斗鸟…
- If I start to doubt myself in the future, all I need to do is think of this experience and everything I've learned along the way. ｜ 以后在我紧张或者害怕的时候，我都会想起这段经历，想起在这条路上我学会的道理。
- Bye, Dehya. ｜ 拜拜，迪希雅。
- Defeat all Mechanici ｜ 击败所有棋阵机关
- It never rains, but it only pours. Rex Lapis had just left us, and then some unidentified scoundrel broke into the Golden House... ｜ 真是屋漏偏逢连夜雨…就在岩王爷离去之际，身份不明的贼人强行闯入了「黄金屋」…
- A diary left behind by the famed adventurer, Roald. The pages are littered with a small amount of shiny but bitter salt crystals. ｜ 著名冒险家罗尔德留下的日志。书页间夹着少许亮晶晶的苦涩盐屑。
- Oh? In our line of work, this means that you want to silence me... How interesting. Draw your sword. We shall— ｜ 哦？在「道上」，这句话就是要灭口的意思咯…很有意思，拔剑吧，我们就在这里——
- My brother once said that fear stems from one's heart, and if your heart is at peace, then fear naturally dissipates. Now I understand what he meant. ｜ 兄长曾说恐惧出自人心，内心安宁，恐惧自然消散，现在我明白了。
- Good night, Dori. ｜ 晚安，多莉。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Plunging Attack ｜ 下落攻击
- Found any nice shells on the beach? ｜ 沙滩上有好看的贝壳吗？
- To our surprise, it was rather well-received. Quite a few people offered to pay a small fee for us to bring the Kamera to them and "take a picture"... ｜ 没想到反响还不错，不少居民还愿意付点小钱，让我们带着「留影机」过去给他们「留影」…
- Reminiscent Regimen: Thrill ｜ 追想练行·烈趣篇
- The combination you used to make your accord... How did you figure it out? ｜ 「奥古斯都」谐香里用到的那几种香型…你是怎么判断出来的？
- Phew! All this swimming is tiring Paimon out. ｜ 呼，我有点游累了。

### Part 027

- Young people these days... I do wonder whether they will be able to cope... ｜ 也不知道…那帮后生们应付不应付得来…
- Tidy the camp up ｜ 整理营地
- Why did its initial creator make it in the first place? ｜ 它最初的设计者到底是出于何种目的制造了它呢？
- But be careful. Since the filth has been building up for centuries, I have no idea what will emerge once I remove the seal. ｜ 不过请小心，毕竟淤积了这么多年的污秽，不知道会有什么东西被释放出来呢。
- I don't know much about rescuing stray animals, but this seems to be quite the milestone. Allow me to offer my congratulations. ｜ 虽说不太了解流浪动物收养的细节，但你们似乎迈过了一个里程碑，恭喜你们。
- #Apologies, {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} {NICKNAME}. ｜ #抱歉，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}。

- Kujou Sara ｜ 九条裟罗
- But, I am getting better! You can tell, can't you? ｜ 不过我也是有在进步的哦！应该看得出来吧？
- Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Sadly, I can't leave Ritou yet. If you can figure out a way to get into Inazuma, could you help me ask around? ｜ 可惜，我现在还没法离开离岛。你若是有进稻妻城的门道的话，不如去帮我打听打听？
- Hmm. Why not go into water to catchy fish? ｜ 呶，为什么不能直接到水里去抓鱼呢？
- Ugh... I... H—Have I been called to the Night Kingdom already? I believe I see a floating person... ｜ 唔…唔，承蒙夜之神传召，我现在已经在夜神的国度里了吗，我竟然看见了飘着的人…
- His whole body floated up with that hat and was carried out the window, soaring high over the stunned guards, and over the heavily guarded walls. ｜ 帽子匠的整个身子都随着那顶帽子飘了起来，他一下子飞出了窗户，高高地越过了目瞪口呆的守卫，和戒备森严的高墙。

- Haha, we've done it! ｜ 哈哈，完成啦！
- Doesn't sound like you'd be in a hurry to sell them, then. ｜ 那看来还不急着卖…
- Somehow, having you by my side is... soothing... ｜ 只要想着有你在我身边…就有一种安心的感觉…
- Don't give up. Let's see what Mona says. ｜ 别放弃，拿给莫娜看看。
- It's just that we have more important, more pressing matters at hand. Would you mind, then, if we looked into the mysteries surrounding us later? ｜ 只不过我们有更重要、更紧迫的事情。我们之后再解答关于自身的谜，你可以接受吗？
- Sure am! Although... I don't exactly have any team members anymore, haha... ｜ 嗯，我是队长！只不过，现在是没有队员的队长了，哈哈…
- My older brother's sword. If I find it, I can finally give him a proper burial... ｜ 是我大哥的那把剑，找到的话，就能好好把他下葬了…
- Oh? And why might that be? ｜ 怎么不会啊？
- (*sigh* Why can't I remember it...) ｜ （唉…记忆都去哪里了…）
